name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I don't just want to win — I want to win big
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our country's history.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115118114/569247948/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-12_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVhOTc5MjUtMzU5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ogn5ZzR4bd_W1C6CaLqE-d0L6OgPwM7YELdqeNt_HnA=)
Peter, I don't just want to win. _I want to win big._
**Because as Democrats, the bigger we win here in Virginia, the louder a message we'll send ahead of the 2026 midterms.** Our race has become a beacon of hope, an opportunity to chart the path out of this dark chapter in our country's history.
_And can I be honest for a minute?_ That's a lot of weight on my shoulders.
_But I'm ready to seize the moment._ And with you by my side — giving $25 or whatever you can to emails like this one — we'll have the resources to keep airing ads, contacting voters, and setting an example for the entire nation to follow for years to come.
[_**Peter, I can't do it without you! Will you make a donation of $25 or more to my campaign today? Each contribution helps us stay on track to flip Virginia blue this November.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115118115/569247961/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-12_4&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGVhOTc5MjUtMzU5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Ogn5ZzR4bd_W1C6CaLqE-d0L6OgPwM7YELdqeNt_HnA=)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: I need your support to Save New York from Zohran Mamdani
body:
Help me Save New York from communism

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, this is a wake up call.
Bernie Sanders, a **self-described socialist** who spent decades as an **apologist for the USSR,** has now pledged to join AOC, a Far-Left Radical Democrat, to do everything in their power to **get Zohran Mamdani elected** as the next mayor of New York City.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Zohran Mamdani is a communist ally of Bernie and the Squad who referred to Bernie Sanders as “one of my heroes” and if elected will do everything in his power to help them undermine the progress of the Trump administration.
His new friends are already parading him around Washington, D.C. as they seek to make him the new face of their party.

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Bernie, AOC, and their socialist supporters are all in to help Zohran Mamdani win because they know that if they can make Marxists like Zohran Mamdani the mayor of NYC then they will be able to transform the Big Apple into ground zero for their agenda to remake America into a socialist country.
**_[I will not stand by while New York, my home, is destroyed by Zohran Mamdani and I am laying the groundwork to fight back](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

**[We can not Make America Great Again if NYC, our nation’s largest city, remains a sanctuary for criminals, illegal immigrants, and anti-American extremists.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**

[HELP ELISE SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
President Trump’s administration and Republicans in Congress are fighting every day to implement an America First agenda and restore our nation but New York Democrats at every level are resisting as they bitterly cling to their power and failed leftist policies.
New York is already suffering with **failed leaders** like _Gov. Kathy Hochul_ and _Rep. Hakeem Jeffries_ , with**corrupt partisans** who weaponize our government like _AG Letitia James_ and _DA Alvin Bragg_ , and with**out of touch leftists** like _AOC_. Electing Zohran Mamdani as Mayor may be the final act that brings the Empire State to its knees.
**Here is what you can expect from Zohran Mamdani and NY Dems if they succeed this November:**

* **Local law enforcement defunded** and replaced with community activists.
* **ICE banned from NYC** and more taxpayer money directed to illegal immigrants.
* Millions of taxpayer dollars allocated to provide **sex changes to children**.
* **Government run grocery stores** that undercut small businesses.

Zohran is a radical that is capitalizing on the frustrations that Americans have had with the years of inflation under Biden and the Democrats. But instead of providing an America First vision like President Trump for the restoration of the American Dream Mamdani chose another path...
His Marxist vision for America involves making everything “free” by**heavily increasing taxes**.
He wants to target “wealthier” and “whiter” neighborhoods first to fund his programs and when businesses close and every New Yorker who is able to flee his socialist experiment has left then he will also come for what remains of the middle class and the working class.
**When he runs out of taxpayer money his “free” programs will collapse and NYC will be left to resemble a third world country.**
It is no wonder that Bernie Sanders - who honeymooned in the Soviet Union and once praised breadlines as a good thing - wants to hand him the keys to New York City.
Friend, the good news is that we haven’t thrown in the towel yet and my team of American patriots is mobilizing to fight fire with fire.
**_[I am going all in to Save New York from communism and I am calling on every American patriot to help provide the resources needed for our team to hold the line](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**

_**[This isn’t just about one city.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**__**[This is about the future of our country.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)**_
[HELP ELISE SAVE NEW YORK](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
Last year, the American people rejected the Radical Left and gave a resounding victory to President Trump and MAGA Republicans with a mandate to implement our America First agenda.
Patriot, this is a major test for the MAGA movement and I need you with us in this fight.
Together, we can overcome Bernie and AOC’s socialist machine, defeat Zohran Mamdani, and defend the freedom and values that have made America the greatest nation on earth.

_Your fellow patriot,_
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Elise Stefanik**
Proud New Yorker
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/baAA/?__vbtrk=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MzE5MjMzOjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

It is no wonder that Bernie Sanders - who honeymooned in the Soviet Union and once praised breadlines as a good thing - wants to hand him the keys to New York City. Friend, the good news is that we haven’t thrown in the towel yet and my team of American patriots is mobilizing to fight fire with fire. . Last year, the American people rejected the Radical Left and gave a resounding victory to President Trump and MAGA Republicans with a mandate to implement our America First agenda. Patriot, this is a major test for the MAGA movement and I need you with us in this fight. Together, we can overcome Bernie and AOC’s socialist machine, defeat Zohran Mamdani, and defend the freedom and values that have made America the greatest nation on earth. Your fellow patriot, Elise Stefanik Proud New Yorker | | | | | | | | | | | 215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Marie
subject: I’ll be honest with you
body:
| | Peter, I’ll be honest with you: I’m a little worried.

Our September 30 FEC deadline is truly the most important I’ve faced in my re-election campaign so far. The numbers we report this month will set the stage for the rest of this race. And right now, we’re falling behind where we need to be.

Supporters like you have come through in our critical moments before, and I’m hoping you will again.

Will you rush in a donation before midnight to help me continue fighting to make sure our decisions stay loyal to the soil?

#### Hey folks, Cliff here!
#### _[Don't let predators track our pasts and steal our futures](https://substack.com/redirect/364b34ee-e668-4e1e-8b56-b453c3c548cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58769aed-d1b4-4d6f-aacf-1c686ce22636?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Look, that _**anyone**_ online can get our most private info _keeps me up at night_. Your data doesn't vanish when you leave a job or move--_**scammers get it from data brokers, genealogy websites, even your social media**_**.**
That makes **[Incogni](https://substack.com/redirect/364b34ee-e668-4e1e-8b56-b453c3c548cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** vital. It tracks and removes your personal data--_and keeps removing it_. When you move or change jobs your info is deleted. Gone.
**[Protect your privacy with Incogni!](https://substack.com/redirect/364b34ee-e668-4e1e-8b56-b453c3c548cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ Use code BLUEAMP for 55% off Annual Plans and start removing your personal data today.](https://substack.com/redirect/364b34ee-e668-4e1e-8b56-b453c3c548cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *

_" It's on the TV, f*k. Turn off your TV. Can you say "brainwashing?" (b-b-b-b-brainwashing)" \- "Violent Pornography" System Of A Down_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9536f363-12fe-4d23-a327-abd811482b3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
God I'm tired.
No, it's not a drooping-Donald-Trump-face kinda tired, where the right side of my pumpkin visage decides to take the express elevator down to LL like it did yesterday at the 9/11 Memorial event for the lumbering lecherous lummox.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/6207c586-17cf-40ba-bf98-f648003a91f4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yet, still, emotionally exhausted from the political insanity this week I talk and write about to make a living.
You know, there was a brief moment after I got my MA in International Affairs and prepared to set off for Washington to become a speechwriter, that I contemplated just saying f*k it and moving to Los Angeles to write comedy.
I had a few friends encouraging me to take that path...and I must admit when I get this gassed with our inane twenty-eight-ring DC circus...I do sometimes wonder.
But I digress! And we return to our regularly scheduled broadcast. So, look, my friends, I think every take and then some has been written about the Charlie Kirk assassination this week. I really have nothing else to offer about that specific event.
But it's broader meaning America, 2025? Now there I have some things to say.
Honestly, there may be no better encapsulation of the mutually reinforcing trends attacking our democracy. The ones that delivered us from a golden age of change, innovation, building big things, embracing civil rights and creating the largest middle class the world's ever known, to the increasingly necrotic democratic republic we now inhabit.
Think the Romans ever looked around and just said, WTF?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9728c4f4-f931-4832-9eee-26762435955f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Yes, with Kirk's killing, what I refer to as **The Iron Triangle of Fascism**.
The original term referred to Congress, the government bureaucracy and lobbyists/interest groups and it has been chugging right along for anyone who care to look up and see its true pathology.
It has corrupted our government, turned much of big business into sociopathic monopolies and deeply eroded key elements of our civil society. So what is it and how does it affect us?
Let me put it simply: a major negative event or mistake that can be portrayed as such occurs. It can be something close to home like the Kirk shooting or Hillary's emails, or something thousands of miles away like Benghazi or Somalia (1993).
And here's how it goes from there.
The Right and Republican Party--interchangeable at this point, and filled with so many cranks _there are caves the world over asking for its batshit back_ --acts in entirely bad faith, unleashing a torrent of vitriol, threats, fear, anger and hate (see Yoda) that end up, inevitably, at the level of bloodlust for the more unhinged among them.
Right wing pundits, tv hosts, social media influencers and yes, major elected officials, instead of trying to cool things down, because after all, we're all Americans, right!?
Instead, they turn up the flame way past _Firestarter_ and well past napalm all the way to _star going supernova_.
They blame Democrats (btw: with Kirk the shooter's white, Christian and from a Trumper family--and statistically I could've predicted all of that) call for some kinda generic revenge or even violence against specific groups or targets, which is exactly what is happening right now after Kirk's murder.
The new ingredient from the days when jabronis like Rush Limbaugh belched out "feminazi" or Rick Santorum tossed off some brain frothed theory related to abortion is now our President with the biggest mic in the land whose eagerly leading the digital lynchmob.
Trump, who literally never shuts his anus-lipped cakehole--[except when he spends a week seemingly near death and hands blotched](https://substack.com/redirect/fb570fd2-bee0-4fb6-a9ad-74549af2a5d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to hell--shows up with Semtex and C4 to add to any fire he can find.
[Here is drooly, Mcdrippy face himself](https://substack.com/redirect/cd8f7327-4de4-4a0f-af0a-29755510b351?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on _Fox & Friends_ doing all he can to inflame everyone at a dangerous moment:
> "For years, those on the radical left have compared wonderful Americans like Charlie to Nazis and the world's worst mass murderers and criminals," Trump said. "This kind of rhetoric is directly responsible for the terrorism that we're seeing in our country today, and it must stop right now.
> My administration will find each and every one of those who contributed to this atrocity, and to other political violence, including the organizations that fund it and support it, as well as those who go after our judges, law enforcement officials, and everyone else who brings order to our country."
> Trump's exclusion of political violence committed by his allies was intentional. When [asked](https://substack.com/redirect/0cd6fd2b-85eb-4bff-9f60-079c2751c7da?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about violence from right-wing radicals on Fox News on Friday, Trump replied, "I couldn't care less."
As we know, Trump never does any of this except when he does it all the time. From Trump's Dollar-Tree Twitter, Truth Social, four days ago, we see Trump totally not doing anything of the sort and I _' m shocked to find out there's gambling going on in here_:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9bcde238-0864-428c-81e9-2ec7636e40ab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I could share a ton more. But you know the story.
From bathroom cop, Rep. Nancy Mace, to right-wing activist Chris Rufo--who seemingly has "Critical Race Theory Will Kill Us All" tattooed on his buttocks right next to "I ❤️ Mom"--the calls for rounding people they think were involved and specific threats to Democrats were swift, per usual.
All amplified by a President and the richest pile of Apartheid blubber in the world, Elon Musk, tweeting out to the many tens of millions who follow this AI-infested doofus, "Democrats are the party of death."
So there you have Part 1 of the Iron Triangle of Fascism, the threats, the completely unhinged blame, lacking any and all proof, has now reached, conservatively, 200 million people?
We then take our horror story to Part II of the Iron Triangle of Fascism.
By the way, did I tell you I'm tired? I did? Ok, we continue...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/62b19387-852b-4c11-9817-95cbc5e615ac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So now the histrionic bullshit that caused right-wing heads to do a 360 lands in the purview of that choir of eunuchs called corporate media. Here, _they purposely choose not to provide any context or nuance._
_Or tell you what they know_ , if it doesn't balance Democrats with Republicans (it never does) or upsets the fascist-adjacent or tax-cut guzzling owners of their monopoly media organizations.
So, GOP Senator Mike Lee can make a joke about the political murder of MN Democratic State House Speaker, Melissa Hortman, and the attempted murder of State Senator John Hoffmann, shot by the same deranged, shitheel on the same night. A murderer who had a long list of Democrats he intended to target and had not been caught when Mike Lee tweeted out the following:
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dd45d979-6fc9-438a-8f0a-c4a526360ee2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Hilarious, Mike! Like the thought of your head not looking like a Pterodactyl egg!
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f872f403-50b4-40b4-af32-4ed5bb800dd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
And, as you'll guess, Mike Lee is still in good stead to go on any network or cable channel he wants to pontificate about politics.
Meanwhile, Matthew Dowd, now-former analyst for supposedly liberal MSNBC (see: Comcast write off. They want a few liberal hosts but enough Scarborough to make Homo Erectus go extinct again) simply pointed out Charlie Kirk helped create the atmosphere of division that has seen Melissa Hortman and Kirk get murdered.
Dowd was fired on the spot.
A Florida reporter was suspended for asking a whiny MAGA Congressman if he'd rethink his stance on gun control after what happened to Charlie Kirk. _Seriously, that question got a reporter suspended._
Mike Lee, though, I'm sure there's a mic at that outlet for him anytime he wants.
Because corporate media looks at one party with a leading Senator who thinks the murder of opponents is funny, plays hide the salami with genocidal man-boob-exposing maniac Putin, and _is not considered a normal party in a democracy by any number of objective international observers_ , and equate that total fucking mess with the Democrats. Because...both sides!
> Experts from the V-Dem Institute at the University of Gothenburg in Sweden said the US Republican Party had become more illiberal and populist in recent decades and that its recent retreat from democratic norms has left it resembling authoritarian ruling parties like Hungary's Fidesz and Turkey's AKP.
> "What we see is that the disrespect of political opponents, **the encouragement of violence** and also the violation of minority rights ... they have all clearly increased with the Republican Party in recent years, since [President Donald Trump] came in the leadership but also before that," Anna Luehrmann, V-Dem's deputy director and one of the lead authors of the study, told CNN.
Right, so from these atavistic gangsters our corporate media picks up the story, framing it on Benghazi or Hillary's emails or Charlie Kirk from these "sources" and 100% goes with it, normalizing every dehumanizing, demonizing or demagogic word Trump & the other nutters utter putting Americans, and America, in mortal danger.
And gets us to Part III, the final chapter of our Iron Triangle of Fascism. After a story has gotten into the consciousness of the public via right-wing lies and corporate media whitewashing, Democratic leaders says...well, often, they're reading a book.
If we're lucky, Chuck Schumer responds, looking at the press with his glasses hanging off the tip of his nose like he's Mel Brooks' _2000 Year Old Man_ sketch come to life.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3b7df653-2f99-44e2-8556-d5ccdbed56c7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
He'll talk in meandering sentences, express his hope to work with Republicans--no matter that that hasn't worked the last 1,197 times he tried it. And he won't put together a strong, stinging message against the most cruel, corrupt, openly criminal and completely incompetent leader since Caligula.
Meanwhile, Hakeem Jeffries, who I once had much hope for...I don't even know what he's doing anymore. Or if he's even in control, as Rep. Nancy Pelosi may have stepped down as Leader, but didn't retire, and we know who controls Democratic donors.
Jeffries responded two weeks ago to a Trump presser by talking about working with him on making housing more affordable, if Trump was willing.
This was a presser where Trump said people wanted him to be a dictator, right after he'd just had the DOJ raid his political enemy John Bolton's home. Trump had also just just armed the National Guard to enter Washington, D.C., violating posse comitatus--an 1878 law explicitly forbidding this.
And he attacked the independence of the Fed, which I'm not being hyperbolic when I say threatens to destroy our fiscal credibility worldwide. The end result could send the economy crashing faster than the right side of Trump's face.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a9cbcb91-2714-4713-9c4e-fe26902470fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After we just saw the effects of Trump's pro-recession policies in the 22,000 jobs we created last month! Which likely is right up there with Micronesia.
That is your Iron Triangle of Fascism, folks.
A fascist Republican Party saying and pushing insanity, normalized by the wusses of corporate media and then allowed to get away with it by feeble Democratic leadership scared of fighting, or their donors, or the life we just found on Mars.
Who the F knows. But whatever it is--they need to go.
The two exceptions here are thankfully we have leaders like Govs Gavin Newsom and J.B. Pritzker, and some fighters in the House and Senate who just kinda brushed their leadership aside, like Chris Murphy in the Senate and Jasmine Crockett in the House.
Also, luckily, we have a growing, more influential ecosystem of independent media able to get the message out about GOP evil even when corporate media won't--so as a reminder, **[apply to and support our Soundcheck Fund](https://substack.com/redirect/9fbe5546-031a-4326-bde7-8f569c6a72e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to be part of the solution!**
But none of this changes my current level of exhaustion. Because those last two factors are growing but not fully operational yet. So we still, too often, get treated to the new Iron Triangle that runs American politics.
Only broken up once in a while by a story so salacious, like the Epstein files, they have to cover it for clicks even if it damages Trump.
Independent-minded elected Democrats and independent medi--Let's speed this up and get this show fully on the road!
Til then, I need a nap.

And he attacked the independence of the Fed, which I'm not being hyperbolic when I say threatens to destroy our fiscal credibility worldwide. The end result could send the economy crashing faster than the right side of Trump's face. | | ---|---|--- After we just saw the effects of Trump's pro-recession policies in the 22,000 jobs we created last month! Which likely is right up there with Micronesia. That is your Iron Triangle of Fascism, folks. A fascist Republican Party saying and pushing insanity, normalized by the wusses of corporate media and then allowed to get away with it by feeble Democratic leadership scared of fighting, or their donors, or the life we just found on Mars. Who the F knows. But whatever it is--they need to go. The two exceptions here are thankfully we have leaders like Govs Gavin Newsom and J.B. Pritzker, and some fighters in the House and Senate who just kinda brushed their leadership aside, like Chris Murphy in the Senate and Jasmine Crockett in the House. Also, luckily, we have a growing, more influential ecosystem of independent media able to get the message out about GOP evil even when corporate media won't--so as a reminder, to be part of the solution! But none of this changes my current level of exhaustion. Because those last two factors are growing but not fully operational yet. So we still, too often, get treated to the new Iron Triangle that runs American politics. Only broken up once in a while by a story so salacious, like the Epstein files, they have to cover it for clicks even if it damages Trump. Independent-minded elected Democrats and independent medi--Let's speed this up and get this show fully on the road! Til then, I need a nap. Take Advantage Of Our Invite your friends and earn rewards If you enjoy Blue Amp, share it with your friends and earn rewards when they subscribe. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

body:
These attacks on democracy are rapidly accelerating. We must keep pace.
|

**🚨Missouri legislature just passed its extreme gerrymander. Here’s how we’re fighting back:🚨**
Peter,
Missouri lawmakers just passed an extreme gerrymander — ramming through one of the most unfair congressional maps in the country, which will deprive both urban and rural communities of fair and effective representation in Congress.
Now, our movement must fight back with everything we’ve got. **We have seen this movement step up to challenge extreme gerrymanders like this one in court, and we expect that fight to continue in Missouri.**
And our work to mobilize voters is far from over, in Missouri and Texas, and whichever states this fight goes to next. If they’re going to continue to try to silence voters and predetermine next year’s election outcomes, we’re going to do everything we can to empower those voters to push back and to voice their dissent.
If it wasn’t clear already, what the Missouri legislature just did confirms that this mid-decade redistricting fight is only just beginning — and we need your help to rapidly ramp up our response. The people of Missouri didn’t want this. In fact, some of the _lawmakers_ who voted for this map today are on the record opposing it. The House Speaker Pro Tem even told reporters in July that this kind of mid-decade redraw “would be out of character with the way Missouri operates.” Two months later, he brought it to the floor for a vote.
Let’s be clear about why this is happening. Power-hungry politicians in Washington are demanding that states they control change the rules and suddenly redraw maps to steal more seats in Congress. In Missouri, just like in Texas, the state’s lawmakers went along with it — in the face of opposition from civil rights organizations, labor unions, business groups, and Missouri voters themselves.
We’ve entered a new era of the fight for fairness. It’s been just 15 days since Texas signed its own extreme gerrymander into law. These attacks on democracy are rapidly accelerating — and we must keep pace.
[**All On The Line is prepared to fight back on multiple fronts wherever necessary to stand up for the future of our democracy. But we can’t do it without supporters like you — so if you can, make a donation today.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115119460/569278066/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_MOMapPass_email_20250912-AOTL-Tier1-MOMapPass_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250912-AOTL-Tier1-MOMapPass_&utm_campaign=MOMapPass&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjQxNDI2ZWY3LTNjOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=CiD7rYe-rf4ZOKxQmG9e35FKMHHvrUkwTsCduBG4Z0Q=)

— Team AOTL

name: Haley Stevens
subject: I just called on RFK Jr. to resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I want to be absolutely clear about this

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=830%2E49239%2EaabbU8)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5859?t=2&akid=830%2E49239%2EaabbU8)
---
Let’s be absolutely clear, null: **Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s anti-science crusade, backed by Donald Trump’s reckless politics, endangers Michiganders and all American families.**
Since becoming Secretary of Health and Human Services, RFK Jr. has **fired thousands of scientists and staff,** including CDC Director Susan Monarez, throwing federal agencies into turmoil.
He's**cancelled vaccine campaigns and downplayed deadly measles outbreaks** – pushing pseudoscience instead of proven immunizations.
And they’ve **slashed billions of dollars in public health funding and research** – halting lifesaving work on cancer, HIV, addiction, and MRNA vaccines and dismantling _decades_ of progress.
**Donald Trump put a fringe conspiracy theorist in charge of HHS, and now our entire public health system is in chaos.**
So let me make one more thing clear: I will always stand for science, for safety, and for the families who depend on both. **That's why I've called on RFK Jr. to resign – but it's not enough.**
**We must elect leaders who believe that science should drive policy, who will fight for our families, our health, and our future. That's a big part of why I'm running for Senate.**
As one of the only open seats ranked as a “Toss Up,” Michigan is a critical battleground in our fight to flip the Senate blue and provide a much-needed check on Trump and RFK Jr's anti-science agenda. **[Republicans spent nearly $80 million to win here last year, and they almost succeeded – so I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or more now to help me raise the resources it’ll take to win?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5860?t=3&akid=830%2E49239%2EaabbU8)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5860?t=4&akid=830%2E49239%2EaabbU8)
---
Thanks for being with me in this fight.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5861?t=5&akid=830%2E49239%2EaabbU8) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5859?t=6&akid=830%2E49239%2EaabbU8)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=7&akid=830%2E49239%2EaabbU8)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

body:
#
**Former President Obama has a message for Democratic donors:**
_"What’s being asked of us is make some effort to stand up for the things that you think are right. And be willing to be a little bit uncomfortable in defense of your values. And in defense of the country. And in defense of the world that you want to leave to your children and your grandchildren."_
**[CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94717?refcode=em20250912-9411&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9411%2E614464%2EhkLWdY)**
**If we’re going to elect Democrats and defend our country from the toxic MAGA agenda in 2026, we have a lot of work ahead of us.**
Every threat to our country + freedoms by the GOP must be met with immediate action from engaged citizens like YOU, Peter.
**That action could look like making a donation, which is what we’re asking you to do today.** But it could also mean calling your elected leaders, volunteering for a candidate or an organization you care about, or even just staying involved in your community and keeping in touch with your neighbors.
**We’re not powerless in this fight. We must meet this moment with the urgency it demands, in any way we can.[So please, if you’re able to today, chip in $5 or more to support our work to elect Democrats in all 50 states »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94717?refcode=em20250912-9411&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9411%2E614464%2EhkLWdY)**

clean_body: Former President Obama has a message for Democratic donors: "What’s being asked of us is make some effort to stand up for the things that you think are right. And be willing to be a little bit uncomfortable in defense of your values. And in defense of the country. And in defense of the world that you want to leave to your children and your grandchildren." If we’re going to elect Democrats and defend our country from the toxic MAGA agenda in 2026, we have a lot of work ahead of us. Every threat to our country + freedoms by the GOP must be met with immediate action from engaged citizens like YOU, Peter. That action could look like making a donation, which is what we’re asking you to do today. But it could also mean calling your elected leaders, volunteering for a candidate or an organization you care about, or even just staying involved in your community and keeping in touch with your neighbors. We’re not powerless in this fight. We must meet this moment with the urgency it demands, in any way we can. name: Devin
subject: Roxanne is FREE! A Trans Detainee's Story of Hope ✊
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Devin for Progress
body:
Join us for live-painting, powerful stories, and more in support of detainees. Let's make some noise!

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/157f5107edf5/seattles-biggest-teslamusk-protest-yet-47330?e=10cc7d1928)
---
|
---
[|
---](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=baecc11dd0&e=10cc7d1928)
| | | | [|
---](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=118f439247&e=10cc7d1928)
| | **We decry the murder of Charlie Kirk but refuse to ignore his legacy of bigotry.** Perhaps no group has been in the crosshairs of right wing hate more than immigrants. Join us in Tacoma for a rousing show of support for immigrants detained at the NWDC.
---
| [SIGN ME UP!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=b0ecd766ff&e=10cc7d1928)
---
|
---
| | “Hello, my name is Roxanne SL. I am a transgender woman. Two months ago, I was detained and transferred to [the Tacoma Detention Center.] I was put in a unit with men.
The conditions for us were terrible. [We went] hungry and there was no medication to even treat a severe flu/fever or my anxiety attacks. Inhumane conditions.
But on Thursday, August 21st, thanks to the efforts of my lawyers, my release was achieved.
Today I am with my family. But it is important to me that everyone knows that you must fight and never lose faith and hope...If your family member is detained, give them strength to continue. It will be hard and it will be a path full of obstacles, but we will succeed.”
**We’re showing up**[**Saturday with La Resistencia**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=e789f40054&e=10cc7d1928)**to give strength to the detained as Roxanne describes**. We will make enough noise that they hear us. And we will deliver letters of encouragement so they feel a little less alone.

[**Save Our Science**](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=5c03a5de8f&e=10cc7d1928)**\- 9/14** Join us at the Settle Waterfront Overlook Walk to stand up and fight back for science, for research, and for truth. [Register now!](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=0c17db6587&e=10cc7d1928)
**W ant to Help Spread the Word? **
Download and share these beautiful posters far and wide!
[Click here to download](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=be06e5f9d2&e=10cc7d1928) the **Solidary Day Poster**.
[Click here to download](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=79b0f498d5&e=10cc7d1928) the **Save Our Science Poster.**
**Our team and our partners are putting their whole hearts into these events** to make them powerful, inspiring experiences. Join us!
See you this weekend!
\- Devin

PS. [DONATE today and help fund our fight for democracy! ](https://devinhermanson.us22.list-manage.com/track/click?u=183f0f0d7b868d7a3cf101385&id=3fb91eb827&e=10cc7d1928)

---

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zn51404a4k6a3jh9khp7of09h0gesrbkap1hl4ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z23da4obvtsvhsce1mndvntsro99p3mg2k5jouio_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5cnqk2jrri7fdcnecqeg9ccdsms04qgtb1cnuh8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z1k1ihm8a9403jsv4rq96efq2f58a808pgb6ues8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmvtukkrrf6engde6cm3v5o33utbov9lthemntjg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z68mkna9uasgfdklgs8q7mh1srktd5e2vskq2cuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt85nc1aead40j7cn9h29lh43uu8j4846qs0o0mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zs5p0imr81kttnt7fkirabo6mell4doc58r8vr5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zhone587c8u9j40if391qsg8nvp6d2389hljq5r8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)
---
| | |
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2qhg9ja2lh703dk14qboc56blq2u615d0vjiuto_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)
---

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zcb9ckc0tm34nc71fka25mmubanie6ufgn0bupqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1lt7qv11bv3r8anp6c7nepd0ar1q8kgijlvug1o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq38fs8a04eaenlpo3ff7ueql9pd8bhq1eq5laeg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z74mp7ujr7uv8jj6a7dfj1cjnt7m1mepe76slm4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z634fhd144l1e08n8i0od2ouogvblu5tbeic8n80_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zug2r5klht45p6075qmf3qcsqm0bc5e53nam2o0g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctimeor2c9h2bs)

name: Gregory Wrightstone
subject: Help Kids Learn Facts Not Fear This School Year
body:
Sponsor science tools for students today: $25, $40, or $125 makes a direct impact.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zms2qefuue81q8s20dp0a9775eros2h5gtq6ma58_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
Friend,
---
As families send their kids and grandkids back to school this month, I'd like to introduce you to the **CO2 Coalition**. We are a group of more than 180 scientists, researchers, and policy experts -- including Nobel laureates -- working to tell the truth about carbon dioxide. While activists and the media label CO2 as a dangerous pollutant, the science shows it is essential to life: fueling crops, greening the Earth, and making our planet greener. Unfortunately, too many classrooms are filled with fear instead of facts. Students are being told to worry about crop failures, dying forests, and spiraling weather disasters -- none of which are supported by the real data. That's why we've made **educating the next generation** one of our top priorities. We're creating and distributing colorful, age-appropriate resources that show young people how CO2 benefits agriculture, strengthens ecosystems, and contributes to a greener world. This back-to-school season, you can be part of that mission by **sponsoring educational tools** for classrooms, teachers, and families:
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqtk5acia6eprj9b27fjq4gjbc5v7ouf24064tc8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
* For **$25** , you can provide a **homeschool resource pack** , helping parents teach truth instead of fear.
* For **$50** , you can sponsor an **illustrated children 's science book bundle** for a classroom, making real science fun and memorable.
* For **$125** , you can put a **carbon dioxide meter** in a classroom, giving students a hands-on way to see the science for themselves.

---
**[_Will you give $25, $50, or even $125 today to equip students with the truth about CO2?_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zpqklhmt9b2vg0mptu6vjnahqtfelr5kkois2jb0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)**
---
[ **Be The Reason Students Learn The Truth**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zb958ee95a4scdi4f5phnsclj30dmtm282c2rf88_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
**Teachers are asking for these materials. Parents are using them to correct misinformation. And students are discovering that science is not something to fear, but something to celebrate.** **[_Will you give $50, $75, or even $125 now to help us send illustrated books and lessons that show the real story of CO2?_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zvomavhctgqq9mbj7pcp87lmkr8k85u028nq2n98_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)**
---
[ **Become a Sponsor of Real Science Now**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zp9g8tkh1r3fk6f8138o527qlrhjpkms76liphj0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
The response has been inspiring. Homeschool families tell us our lesson plans are their children's favorite part of the week. Educators write to say they finally feel equipped to challenge the one-sided curriculum. And students are beginning to understand CO2 not as a threat, but as part of the cycle of life.But there's so much more to do. [_**Will you give $25, $50, or even $125 today to sponsor classroom tools like CO2 meters, illustrated books, and homeschool packs?**_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zecqcbjeo50vadgf1quafgdcqjcihepncj1oa520_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
[ **Be The Reason Students Learn The Truth** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqafone70u4t8g4qh6pi46phk0dmelv9ohl1ut3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
**Every dollar you give translates directly into resources placed in front of children and teachers. Together, we can replace fear with facts, propaganda with science, and anxiety with discovery.** This school year, let's give the next generation the truth. **[_Will you give $25, $50, or even $125 now to help students across America learn facts instead of fear?_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zolirjd4bj849lr7n03u1fbbfhrpr8qn9eudugv0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)**
---
[ **Help Teach Facts, Not Fear**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8f32ekfmq9m61uv996dp43vgcphvnre4cf4ics8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
Thank you for considering this important mission. Back-to-school season is the perfect time to act -- and with your help, we can make sure thousands of young minds grow up informed, confident, and ready to challenge the climate cult's narrative with real science.
---
**Gregory Wrightstone**
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition
---
P.S. Back to school is the perfect time to act. **[_Will you give $25, $50, or even $125 now to sponsor science education that replaces fear with facts?_](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9p665v5pf4edhh0fp339ikpvms2nep88a859gco_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)**
---
[ **Be The Reason Students Learn The Truth** ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zds1rsp2hs6nfeg5p4ovnrr6s0r4vlj1esq1fjio_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
2677 Prosperity Avenue, Suite 300
Fairfax, VA 22031
---

Pop Acta Media | Updates for Great Americans
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlcgbp5vrhj1v652rja62vt29gftlp90df07lsag_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pqas3h6gonadjj6up7ecjl6gon8ddl69qbcd1jmppqcdtlmuin7djle8r7ccjkm8qjf9v56ngj0trkm6or9djjctg1eddk6ior79hnmmpi9df4c5ie2ob2cdh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z37n33148si7tk8ucb50c9g4o7psjpqr8o7r7c10_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgcorplgoc269v9majtakptdqnve1cb8djmodhoo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo5qqc1v7snqab22avri3326h3eceqbg5nqk3lko_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zetqs3q3q5r7hjv51evr8i3pnf99dk6cds7f1lc0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z7njg6pdbuve8iii912oevs40v0v5tl5otkfb2k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znmarv25o02q4pjbr7aarhu0iiocj690g3tjpeio_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father

The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu4q0qoh9d44lm4717n0qdh3t0kh0l4qthspnbm0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7ctim1pb1cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk

# **[Civility Should Be Embraced After Charlie Kirk's Murder](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
The shocking assassination of Charlie Kirk on a college campus in Utah looked like the opposite of the Washington Post motto. # **[ICE agent 'seriously injured,' suspect dead in Chicago operation gone wrong](http://trk.libertyledger.-DFSpCYbH-PJLND9g)**
---
A law enforcement operation involving agents from Immigration and Customs Enforcement in Chicago led to serious injuries for one officer and the fatal shooting of a suspect on Friday morning.'We are praying for the speedy recovery of our law enforcement officer.'A Department of Homeland Security press release obtained by Blaze News revealed that an ICE officer was "seriously injured" during a traffic stop. The department described the stop as a targeted operation to arrest Silverio Villegas-Gonzalez. The suspect was described as "a criminal illegal alien with a history of reckless driving" who entered the U.S. at an unknown date.
[**Read More**](http://trk.libertyledger.-DFSpCYbH-PJLND9g)

---
A Chicago-area mayor and congressional candidate stood by his actions to thwart even passive cooperation with federal immigration enforcement operations as DHS launches “Operation Midway Blitz” in the area. Evanston Mayor Daniel Biss, a Democrat who is running to succeed retiring Rep. Jan Schakowsky, D-Ill., in 2026, told CNN he is “in the dark” as [...]...Click to read more

name: Andy Ngo
subject: Help me bring Antifa to justice
body:
I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs

| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zke561f1vif1uldanic0nue4rv838ge9k33o3710_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs)
---
My fellow concerned American, I was one of the first savagely beaten by lawless, violent Antifa thugs.And unless we do something to stop them today, I won’t be the last. **[I’m asking you to donate $35 or more today to help me bring Antifa and its members who assaulted me to justice.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv9ddfvf5a8566gampjo75tqtc9bgeghu7ommioo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs) ****I was at Antifa's "ground zero" in Portland, Oregon during the summer of 2019.** This was before most Americans had ever heard of the Antifa movement, but they'd caused havoc and violence before.I went to an Antifa "protest" as a journalist to document and report on their “protest.”As soon as I arrived, I feared for my safety.The mob was angry, and violence always follows Antifa. Most of them wore masks to prevent being identified when they commit crimes. Many had on helmets and carried riot gear. Some, I later learned, secretly had weapons like baseball bats, brass knuckles and even bricks.I was scared, but I had a job to do, so I pressed on.**People like you needed to know what was happening.** But I didn't go unnoticed for long.Somebody recognized me and bashed me on the back of my head in an ambush."F*** you, Andy Ngo!" shouted voices around me. "Go home, fascist!"**Fists started flying at my face and head. Then came the projectiles.** Before I knew it, I was being repeatedly punched, kicked, and hit with objects.I tried to protect my head. I did not strike back as I knew that would only escalate the situation and put me in more danger.The thugs robbed me of my camera so that I wouldn’t have evidence of the assault. What they did to me is unacceptable and criminal. And now they're trying to do the same to other innocent Americans like you.That's why I sued members of the Rose City Antifa organization to bring them to justice and send the loud clear message that they are NOT above the law.Now I need your help to hold their feet to the fire and make sure justice is served. [**Will you donate $35 or more to help me hold Antifa accountable?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1h7i696g39ad6dr4cgkr3nipiu7frack0h546b0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs) This is bigger than me alone. After I got away from the mob, police finally showed up when I was in the hospital. But my attackers stole my evidence and nearly silenced me permanently with a traumatic brain injury.Later, cell phone footage from a bystander surfaced online. Thank goodness! The video captured part of the attack, clear as day.I hoped I'd get the justice I deserved.Wrong.To this day, six years later, the Portland Police have done nothing.**No charges. No arrests. No suspects questioned.** It's not much of a surprise, though.Radical politicians have long since bowed to the dangerous left-wing mobs that terrorize their streets. That’s why the Center for American Liberty helped me file a lawsuit against my attackers. A judge ordered three of them to pay damages – but more than a year later and they have not paid a dime.So now the Center for American Liberty is helping me track them down and make them pay for nearly killing me and trampling upon the First Amendment.Unfortunately it’s going to cost at least $20,000 to get justice.[**That's why I hope you'll join the fight by donating $35 or more to fund my efforts to hold Antifa and its members accountable.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2ztefpem80d0vefej7049d41roq7s7dq1ok5jct18_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs) We have to stop Antifa and make them face real, legal consequences for their destructive actions before they get to you and your family.Antifa wants the literal end of America -- and they'll stop at nothing to get it. Believe me when I say that's not an overstatement. Some members are avowed socialists or communists. But many are much worse – open violent anarchists who want to tear down civilization and remake it in their own twisted vision with no law and order.By any means necessary.**_Rioting. Destruction. Mayhem._** And they know, as long as they choose politically favored protests to co-opt, the media and politicians will never have the guts to denounce their violence or hold them accountable. They did that with BLM. They’re doing it now against ICE.It's a sick strategy, but very smart – because so far, they've been successful.**For the most part, they've gotten off scot-free.** Our politicians and media are treating this terrorist group like peaceful protestors!As we saw in Los Angeles earlier this summer, their riots will only spread and intensify if Antifa continue to escape consequences.**So now I'm taking justice into my own hands – with the help of the talented lawyers at the Center for American Liberty.**

[**You can be a part of bringing Antifa to justice with a donation of $35 or more today.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgloanqnkhd17taeuadpefkmqeh3f8s5uqt1qn9g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs) Though I'm seeking justice for myself, the impact of this case could be so much larger.This is about standing up for our country when our own leaders won't.This is about saving America as we know it and keeping you and your family safe.And this is just the first blow we intend to deliver.By taking them to court for the attack against me we can prove they are NOT untouchable. **[Can I count on you to donate $35 or more to help me get justice from Antifa?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zo938823d5u5oq99ppoo94antghlpqe3jk1msnk8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs) **Please don't wait – if we don't fight back and win now, **these violent thugs will be in EVERY city across America** , destroying everything and everyone in their path. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
| | Sincerely,
---
| | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5fnpbfjqu47n37e6i6057tquebiv6ctrbeddifo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs)
---
**Andy Ngo**
---
|
---
| | P.S. I know firsthand that America's troubles with Antifa aren't over -- **they're just beginning**. Just look at what happened in Los Angeles earlier this summer. Today, we can make them face the consequences that left-wing politicians refuse to dole out. [**Please donate as generously as you can right away.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zb9cgcvl9t32alfs55lokoa6j6ic6gd6308poj48_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs)
---
[ **DONATE** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgplr3r3qovemrq1oqbhg5f7cb35v09qo2mjpfeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs)
---
| | |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zfo8djvtejbk06gr05p87agaiuva3sm4r8oojso8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm8oj4cjh2bs)
---
