name: AMAC Action
subject: Enemies of our nation
disclaimer_text: paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation
body:
Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros.

| |
---
| | I'm writing to you because YOU understand the George Soros threat.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk9t8rv5erfne3k8tb8uk5959s8kpstksetfkfl8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)
---
| | **STOP SOROS**
---
Dear Fellow Patriot, Today -\- right now -- you and I have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. **[And it depends on your rapid response to this urgent message- will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z4bmqs0l1m1hfomoreuv6esr03fpg19jotn1erp8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs) ** You're one of America's most informed seniors, so you know that George Soros has injected his poisonous ideas into every corner of American life: education, media, elections, and our justice system. And the results are disastrous for the nation we love.
---
>> We now have a generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. >> George Soros has tentacles everywhere influencing the news and information a majority of Americans see and read. Now he even has majority stake in the second largest radio network in America acquired through a shady Biden FCC deal. >> George Soros' push for the decriminalization of drugs has led to the worst drug crisis in American history. I hope no one you love has gotten tangled up in this! >> George Soros has hijacked our justice system by channeling millions into electing dozens and dozens of hand-picked radical left District Attorneys.
---
This includes New York's horrible Letitia James who's now using every trick in the book to try and stop President Trump and his DOGE efforts. But none of that compares to what George Soros and his heir apparent, Alex Soros, are doing to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants. It's their way of reshaping our population and setting themselves up as the puppet-masters for all future elections. Their ability to alter entire nations is so potent that Soros' native country of Hungary passed legislation they call the "Stop Soros Law." The law made it a crime to aid illegal immigration so Soros couldn't drown Hungary with illegal migrants in defiance of the government and the will of rightful citizens. That's exactly the kind of common sense we need here. **[It's why AMAC Action is spearheading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive - and why I need your name on the petition RIGHT AWAY!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zljnru6q924t0i9lk2fanjnfgkamlp2lmjl01r00_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrvq84kibl3ge8f74hdiq8uip420du04c23u9u70_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)
---
Your petition demands that House Speaker Mike Johnson take immediate steps to introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros' globalist goals. If the Hungarians can get it done, so can we! After the "Stop Soros Law" passed in Hungary, Soros pulled his dark money, equity-seeking, non-governmental organization, the Open Society Foundation, out of Hungary because of the pressure! His open border plans were thwarted. And he turned his attention to us. **Why are we allowing George Soros to sit behind the walls of his sprawling compound in Westchester County, New York, exploiting the wealth he accumulated using our capitalist system...** **...to turn our young people, media, elections, and justice system against us??** My fellow patriot, right now the Trump FCC is investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents who were arriving for deportation operations. **Yes, the George Soros-funded radio station tipped off the criminals!** There are no two ways about it. **_George Soros and his son Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, its people, and our rule of law._** We must make a move against them just like Hungary did. **_And we only have 20 months to do it._** On November 3rd, 2026, Americans head back to the polls for the midterm elections. Chances are good that we'll lose the House or the Senate -\- or both. So to pass legislation, we must move now. Great change comes from embracing great opportunities - and if you want to change this situation where a foreign billionaire is destroying the country we love from within... **[...your signature on your STOP SOROS petition is the greatest opportunity you will have before 20 months is up.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvv03g5ih7kgoh7mjc08itm8lv165erse4tg9a4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs) ** **My fellow patriot, my name is Rebecca Weber and I 'm the Chairwoman of AMAC Action. ** "AMAC" stands for Association of Mature American Citizens. And when it comes to standing up for the rights of conservative seniors, "action" is what we're known for. **With its 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative antidote to left-leaning AARP. And our 75 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates makes our advocacy group, AMAC Action, a force to be reckoned with on Capitol Hill.** And unlike the AARP, we're fighting against George Soros not alongside him. You see, according to public tax filings, over three years, the AARP accepted more than 10 MILLION DOLLARS from the George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. The Tides Foundation says they are on the forefront of "climate justice, racial equity, reproductive freedom" and their mission is "justice and equity." You know that's just globalist speak for 'destroy America and redistribute its power and wealth to radicals.' And listen to this... the AARP once honored George Soros on the cover of their magazine calling him one of "America's Greatest Innovators" who's**** "changing the world, $100 million at a time." It makes my stomach turn to see so many seniors supporting the AARP not knowing it's under the influence of the radical George Soros-funded Tides Foundation. But today, I'm not writing to those seniors. **[I'm writing to YOU because YOU understand the George Soros threat. And I have faith that you will seize this time-sensitive opportunity to do something about it.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5panqlprl9om3ontit66sa2cu21quifmncvlgq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs) ** If the AARP wants to betray America's seniors by supporting dangerous leftists like George Soros, they are free to do so. **But AMAC Action is leading the charge to bombard Congress with STOP SOROS petitions demanding they introduce, advance, and support legislation to shut-down this dangerous America hater once and for all.**** ** **And we would be honored to have you by our side.** **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition right away, and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and send the millions of petitions we'll need in the next 20 months.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc1mp6cqcap61vkhhenojmod7g1krtk7pjip9l60_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs) ** AMAC Action doesn't take a dime of taxpayer funding. And we're certainly not bought and paid for by George Soros or any of his dark money groups like the Tides Foundation. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. We answer to you -- not to George and Alex Soros. With that said, if you're able to make a larger emergency gift of $50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or even $1,000 -- please do it. **[We have a lot of work to do to STOP SOROS and time is not on our side.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpbb14khun358dlfk2ev8fop799q5umhdnuiksa8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs) ** Thank you for joining us in this fight for America.
---
| | For Freedom,
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_** **AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zakcq01j1uitfr2pa0026snhl0lktncvf6al7s80_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)
---
| | P.S. The country of Hungary passed a "Stop Soros Law" and so can we! To do it, **[**AMAC Action needs your signed STOP SOROS petition and your one-time contribution of $35 or more to expand this petition drive**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zad1fv0p254bccrbd655qiam9tqc3grqrl6t55no_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)**. Thank you for taking action when action is needed!
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi2261ujb5l714nqmeg14ihqigc1le897lnipmu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2za1mp5ve5qthvp347kmba806pt59pem4tbt7c2m0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)
---
_**_**[Support AMAC Action](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm7s2dgu1goc80a5f7i83n829ad59gb14aatasq8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)**_**_
---
AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values.
---
| | [ **Support AMAC Action** ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z44sef01v6lpkgo1aqnt5tr97g0ksfmmfn5jnvqg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthm4p34cth2bs)
---

---

name: Thomas Massie
subject: I only reach out like this when I must
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
body:
I wish I were reaching out today with better news.

| | | [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zit1bs2olmshn8pg6ogltmmtanbltbstlm216p48_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthmco34cdh2bs)
---
Friend – I wish I were reaching out today with better news. _I know you don’t hear from me often, so please know that when I make a plea like this, it really is necessary._ The super PAC that pledged to spend their entire war chest to defeat me just spent _**$1 MILLION**_ on a MEGA ad buy to crush my re-election campaign. The neocon establishment has put a bounty on my head because I won’t support foreign wars and won’t vote to continue letting our national debt SPIRAL out of control. _I wish I could be more optimistic, but this is just the beginning of what is a declaration of_** _ALL-OUT WAR_** _on me and those who support me... _ _**_[And if I don’t pick up my fundraising efforts immediately, I'll be severely outmanned and outgunned. Because of this, what was just another end-of-quarter deadline has now become the biggest, most crucial deadline I’ve ever faced.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zhcil629temiu3gvit83jh7j683p1t3691b9rqeg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthmco34cdh2bs)_**_ Look, my least favorite part of my job is asking generous folks like you to sacrifice your hard-earned cash. That’s why I do it so rarely.** ** _**[I wouldn’t be asking for your help right now if it weren’t absolutely vital.](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zl0q14bm4oe3h82rpp7agt71ife2ls1hrouuc9m0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthmco34cdh2bs)**_ **But this isn’t an enemy I can take lightly. This is the most powerful political apparatus in America, sitting on a massive $500 MILLION war chest.** Their smear campaign says I sided with a foreign country. Friend, the truth is, I sided with you. I didn't pledge my allegiance to my party or any of the Swamp creatures in D.C. I pledged to protect the Constitution at all costs and to keep my promises to the American people. **_They can’t stomach my presence in Washington because I'm a constant reminder of the promises they are BREAKING!_** They’re prepared to flood my race with immense sums of out-of-state cash to drag my name through the mud until they’ve BANISHED me from Washington for good. [_**So can I count on your support to help me stand strong against the full force of the neocon establishment?**_](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zgbt14d8i8vq5edk4lnkqjn2kice9v30sdqp7a4g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7cthmco34cdh2bs) **Friend, I keep my promises. You have my word that I will NEVER back down. ** Sincerely, Thomas Massie
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Thomas Massie for CongressPO BOX 72821 NEWPORT, KY 41072
---
|

You have my word that I will NEVER back down. name: Congressman Emanuel Cleaver, II
subject: What’s at stake

body:
Ripping away people’s voices
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
---
| _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T492d2d9b-e7d7-43c3-b626-d9757e40f3be/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
| Peter — Extreme MAGA politicians rolled out a new gerrymandered congressional map that redraws my district. This administration and its allies will do anything to distract from their failures to lower costs – even if it means gerrymandering to cling to power. With my new district likely to be very competitive, I need your help to win a tough campaign so Democrats can take back the House. [Can you please split a donation of $10 to my campaign and Blue Amp Action today? Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. name: The Flyover
subject: Charlie Kirk Suspect Arrested, National Guard to Memphis, and a Wedding Crasher
body:
Police [arrested 22-year-old Tyler Robinson](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOhCAQxvGnwQ6DgLgWFNfY7bVXGoRhnVtWDYyaffuLl3uDqyeZf37f1328O0y4PD7dCyzFdVzgLAmIII9-djkhPDE_y1428ORyhkIwSiFbLnreqDE4TO9RV8FGAAmqAtt0bde1Xa9NNVuvIbQuhHCTk5q8Fv7mQjSmb42SMaoK7fVN9I1qhGi1qUH7IIXyk4gQlPFMCwhIa66_V1xohpje6wG59uurSnYm2gpTH0wOTA7nedZ-KpfiujM5JDyA71twBIXJ4Q_FLxUv80p8Jzdz2vOCy4NvV4LvxTE5VNmG7cSUsJiOafF4OUy_VfrXVIeVPwEAAP__ra2Amg) Thursday night for the assassination of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk, charging Robinson with aggravated murder and obstruction of justice.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcGOpCAQhp8Gb91BQNQDh02Mt9nrHg0DRVvbIAbK7szbb9w4TzDX7__z56vUn4_lw2LE7fHbJjAU8rLBu0YggrK41ZaI8MTyrEfdwZEtBSrBIrjobny8tXLxFuPXohpvAoAA2YBp-67vu35UulnN4Hmne661GoIYguPSfw5cuU5yPYoQGjTnGh9b2XLeKX0H5bzg0n3yAF5qxxQHj5TL_W_GjVYI8Su_oNxdTk00K9FemfzFxMzEfPrllH09UybmkMut2ghMzPUNsFeyT6hMzCfJxUNhYm6ZnA9KS81HccDkBMliZEKfMIHHIzE5Yb6Is2m3-NiYnEq6ZPjY6u84bwQbMTkli9sFCcq5cbW_mwUs4QuualOM398YI1bdM8Ufp8X_K-lHr3kZ8S8AAP__J36ljg) | |
# Saturday, September 13, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1862, Union soldiers discovered [a copy of Confederate General Robert E. Lee’s orders](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2OpDAQBOCnMZmRsfkZAgeXkM2lFyLjboa-MTayewbx9qtZ7Rts_ElVpfp3n--OAsXHX7ej5TXNEc8SkBnz7DeXA-GT8rO8yoGeXc5YGGetdCfVKBszg6NwzW0FdkXUaCq0zdANQzeMbV9tFkeEZYQb9A14s5pVGViVvnX9snQeTEX2k6bGxjRKdW1fY-tBK-MXtSKY3otWIRCnXP9PFHnDNVzpjbn2aa-C3ZiPIswfoSehp_M8640Kp3x9XOiJNyoS3CUpyh8Reip4MO4LZtkYoadXpBQl55SOIoGK_xTIjAuGIl1kQna7XBxzQHkEF6ts4TgpBCr9IFr12B2F70X8qxvfVn8FAAD__4yoi1g) outlining the Confederates’ strategy for the Antietam campaign near Frederick, Maryland. The Battle of Antietam, won by the Union at great cost, halted Lee's advance into Maryland.

Is your name Josh? If so, you may be destined for success, at least according to [a report in our _Et Cetera_ section today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPozAUhH8NdKDnZ4PjwsU16XLtlcixH-ElBiPbF5R_v2Kr7beb0SfNaObfbbo5jrw9_rqVbJ3TtNFRItVKefKLy5HpxflV_pedfHU5U6k0IeDQgemEnILj-JlUG-xMhCRbskIPWg_aqLFd7MURmgDqrkBIgcJ7reXFeDnOaGgcWrZnGhghBcCgxp6UDwjS32GmIEffKKDANeX-mXirC83xk96Ue5_WNtql1r008k-D1wavx3H0292fK07e4HVPkSv78kN2Jz49pT1St7mVQvdMZemy3xwigoE227AfHCOXUTcKHqvj-F1Zf_XT2-JXAAAA__91LH1B) that claims it’s a golden age for Joshes across many fields. Give it a look and see if you agree.

Imagine cruising in a Restomodded Supercharged ’67 Camaro with $50,000 cash in your pocket—this sweepstakes could make that dream a reality with today's sponsor RestoMods. [Click here to learn how to enter](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcGOpCAQhp8Gb91BQNQDh02Mt9nrHg0DRVvbIAbK7szbb9w4TzDX7__z56vUn4_lw2LE7fHbJjAU8rLBu0YggrK41ZaI8MTyrEfdwZEtBSrBIrjobny8tXLxFuPXohpvAoAA2YBp-67vu35UulnN4Hmne661GoIYguPSfw5cuU5yPYoQGjTnGh9b2XLeKX0H5bzg0n3yAF5qxxQHj5TL_W_GjVYI8Su_oNxdTk00K9FemfzFxMzEfPrllH09UybmkMut2ghMzPUNsFeyT6hMzCfJxUNhYm6ZnA9KS81HccDkBMliZEKfMIHHIzE5Yb6Is2m3-NiYnEq6ZPjY6u84bwQbMTkli9sFCcq5cbW_mwUs4QuualOM398YI1bdM8Ufp8X_K-lHr3kZ8S8AAP__J36ljg)!

|
---
## Charlie Kirk Murder Suspect Arrested
Police [arrested 22-year-old Tyler Robinson](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOhCAQxvGnwQ6DgLgWFNfY7bVXGoRhnVtWDYyaffuLl3uDqyeZf37f1328O0y4PD7dCyzFdVzgLAmIII9-djkhPDE_y1428ORyhkIwSiFbLnreqDE4TO9RV8FGAAmqAtt0bde1Xa9NNVuvIbQuhHCTk5q8Fv7mQjSmb42SMaoK7fVN9I1qhGi1qUH7IIXyk4gQlPFMCwhIa66_V1xohpje6wG59uurSnYm2gpTH0wOTA7nedZ-KpfiujM5JDyA71twBIXJ4Q_FLxUv80p8Jzdz2vOCy4NvV4LvxTE5VNmG7cSUsJiOafF4OUy_VfrXVIeVPwEAAP__ra2Amg) Thursday night for the assassination of Turning Point USA founder Charlie Kirk, charging Robinson with aggravated murder and obstruction of justice. Robinson had eluded police since the shooting on Wednesday, but, [confronted by his father,](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuozAQRb_GdI7MYEwoXGzj7m27JXLs4TEbg5HHJOLvV6zyB6--0tE958_X9OUp0fb9269o65ynDd-csFYsU1h8SYRPKk8-eMdQfSnIFSdQ0Es1yraboqd0TrqJdkYE7Bq07dAPQz-M2jSLbT1qc9et0ncz3kdjOoNxNuMD5of3QTVkL5oa265VqtfmhjpEUF14qBljZ4LQCiPVXG5_M211wTmd-YXlFvLaJLvUurPofglwAtx27pnrNQlwF1iAU6MA14IAd7C8_AS4N8rFv1AutMpajnWX7E-WH09JmwwH1xxPOeciPyXklUJ6Zs9Mm6-UNwGuKTbub0qJ2AxCq-_VU_p_rv6o6MvCvwAAAP__dLeLoQ) who had seen video images of the suspect leaving the scene, he admitted he was the killer. A family friend alerted authorities. Officials said the bolt-action rifle they recovered after the shooting had casings [engraved with messages](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGurCAQxvGnwU6DA8i1oLiN3d72lgZhXDiLYmB2zb79iSf7Bqee5D_5ff9v883GFPf7P7uhoTXPO541IRGW2QVbUsRHLI_6rAc6sqVgJZyBg2r52PZi9jam9ywbb1ZEQNGg6bXSWulRDk0wMAgllgXtoCUCKM6XP0oLv0qptVrHJpqrxsde9JwrOXQonQcu3MJX9GJwTHL0kXLpvnLcKeCa3vmFpXN5a5IJREdl4i-DicF0nmfn9sVdRwbTlWYw8ZHB1AODicpzO9qPrL1obQ05E5b2Y-wCbakpxh9nTCnWQTPJ75uN6ech_Wqll4HvAAAA__9yUHsx), some of which appear to reference online memes and video games. One casing was inscribed, “hey fascist! CATCH!” Meanwhile, funeral arrangements for Kirk were still pending as of Friday. The services will [take place in Arizona](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DGO6yAUheHVQIeFLxjHBcVr3OW1U1rkcomZYBMBiZXdjxLNDqY-0i995-u8nF1Mcb_-dxvZFvKy01ETtUZlwdWVFOkWy60-6p2wuVKoNlpAwiDkJHq1eBfTa9Hc20AEpDjZfhzGcRgnbfhqlcGAfkIjcUIFbvQ-wMlcUCrVAyKP9l2TU696KQdtOtLoQSq8yEBeGWRako8tl-47x72tFNIrP6l0mDee7NravTL1j8HMYD6Oo3M5vTcGsystYqLKYP7FiI9GhMdOxSVx2_MhgiuiN8NJSzlAt7Yt8WL9_YgpxWpGpuV1c_HT5O1PJz0t_AQAAP__sXV8gA), where Kirk lived with his wife and two children before his death.
## Trump to Send National Guard to Memphis
President Trump said Friday that he was sending [the National Guard to Memphis, Tennessee](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2OqzAUxfHVmA7kLwwULl5Dl9dOiRz7OtyJDci-CcruR8wWpj7S70j_r9tyc5hwe_x3GSzFfdngrAmIoCx-dSUhPLE866se4MmVApVgkVz2LZ9aoZbgMH0W3QQbASSoBqwY-mHoh0mbZrWjGPugRjC-n8QUYfAR1KiFcVH6-2gatJfGJ6EE5702HWgfJFf-ziMEZTzTHALSXrrvHTdaIabP_obS-T03ya5ER2XqH5Mzk_N5np3f7v4amZwvmsmZT0zOQjI5U3nlo82QjxVruznCfXOpfbxcCa0vmKFbKaem2HCcmBJWMzDNH9lh-j2kP1V6W_kTAAD__wW_e60), calling the city “deeply troubled.” Trump said both the state’s Republican Gov. Bill Lee and the Democratic mayor of Memphis, Paul Young, were “happy” with his plan. Memphis, which has long struggled with crime, had one of [the highest per capita rates of murder](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL_SnSAQxZ8GO-_A4tVYWKSh-9KmdBAW3XwIDqzX8e0z5hXSneLM7_z5_TV_WYqU1l92x4lDnhNeNSIzltlttkTCbyrf9awHOralYGWcQcK7lWOr9OwtxXvuGj8FREDd4KSG9zC8h7Hrm21yqJZF6mXAoEEGG0ar-9HCIgPoMfQNTQ9NjkorKd9d_8LOeZDaLTKg170TnURPnMvrT6bEG4Z45w-Wl8t7E6eN-ahC_xRgBJjrul5ntZy9vR-DAFM5l1uAeZYJMEeOxOQe-QQLMHIUYBQIMFzO_WhtSvlMDmubLFNONrbraYtvPR4x35TWlnO7435s9GB-9EpJ1Y9SDgJMUyZ_XBQj1X4QnVx3S_FfV_6vgz8T_A0AAP__OQKPdw) and other violent crime of any large city in the country in 2024, according to the FBI. For weeks, Trump discussed plans to send National Guard troops to Chicago, but facing resistance there, he said he began looking at states governed by Republicans.
## FAA Fast Tracks Rollout of Air Taxis
The Federal Aviation Administration announced Friday it is launching a fast-tracked pilot program [to speed up the rollout](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOrCAUxvGnwU4DBxQtKG5jN7fd0iAcRmZQJnB2zLz9xn2Frb_k9yX_r9tyszHF4_7f7mgo5OXAsyYkwrK4zZYU8RnLs37XFzqypWAlXIBD3_KpFXLxNqbPohpvAiKgbNAI3Wvd60kNzWbGcV31KEBzISwIF5wCJWXgkwe-jqGJ5tL4JKTgvFdDh8p54NKtPKCXg2OKo4-US_fI8aANQ_rkN5bO5b1JZiN6VSb_MZgZzOd5du5Y3TUymC-awcwnBrMABvMjr5_WFrdhafFNObWEleJxb4O13UZ7aorxrzOmFOugmeL33cb0-0V_CvQ28BMAAP__8Ix4-Q) of air taxis. Archer Aviation and Joby Aviation, both major players in the electric vertical takeoff and landing, or eVTOL, space, said they are participating in the program. Shares of each were higher on Friday. Officials said the commitment is [expected to create high-paying](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu4yAURL8Gd0QYYxMXFNu4y7ZbWtd4HEhIsOAmUf5-5fcLr5tiNKNz_l3mC8UUn9e_9IDjLc9PfGoCM8rsA5UUcY_lXl91h2cqBZUxa6V7qUbZdvNKMX1n06xuAzS6Bq61vbW9Hc3QBLe03g59S8oMPSzOGM9DSwbeWLvAdE10x5oa265VqjfDCcavWnV-URvWbvDCKKyRczndcnxywJa--Y1y8vnRJBeY9yq6P0JPQk-EkutOHteUF0oHzdETejqi0NMnRIYM-VUhN6osuZC_S7w5J3nLy1dS8QFF6Kkpbt0_MaVYByuMuj4opp9X_pWqt9P_AwAA___anX_d) manufacturing jobs, expand economic opportunities, and deliver futuristic air taxis to transform travel and product transport. The action follows a [Trump administration executive order](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD_ypCAQRk-jGRaCf2YCgk3MZtMNrRaakR0Eq2m1vP3W7BV-B_i-eu_9ec0vCDGk92_Y0LDPc8KrRGRGmu0KFAN-An3KUXa0DERYGGclVS_kU7R6dhDiPXe1Mx5Roa7RtGM_jv347IZ6NY_eejugs-CUHhbU6HHpF9sv4OwDbR3M900-W91K2XdDg511Smq7SI9OD7bqJLrAmZq_OSRe0cc7n0iNzVsdzcq8l0r_qtRUqem6rsYDNO98Vmr6ylDOW6UmpmPbi2CCVPZMDBxyEgUtIQPdoiAksQt3eH-LI50YYhEJL7FHSMJD4e_WfgS4E5JFJyBQTcbtV4gxlGGsOvneIMT_XPyjmKdR_wIAAP__p3KPhQ) calling for “American drone dominance,” beginning with this Electric Vertical Takeoff and Landing Integration Pilot Program.
|

name: Rural Americans United
subject: ICYMI: From Blue Sky Ranch to Big Ag: A Family Farmer’s Perspective
body:
Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat
| | | | |
---
| What Is In This Newsletter?

* From Blue Sky Ranch to Big Ag: A Family Farmer's Perspective
* Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat
* Will 47 get Bolasarioed?

---
| |
---
| My grandfather was a second generation American farmer. He and my grandmother started Blue Sky Ranch on Yakima's Scenic Drive in the 1930s. With about twenty acres of usable land he raised a family of five children. They were poor at the beginning, but over time fruit prices grew and in the 1970s they were finally able to build their forever home and enjoy a good income. Downtown Yakima thrived then with both a Bon Marche and a Nordstrom store. That was a real Nordstrom, not just a Nordstrom Rack.
But things began to change. Downward pressure on small farms and the livelihoods they supported came under attack. Shockingly, at this same time, many farmers began to align with the very forces working against them, voting against their own best interests. With the beginning of the Reagan Administration and its radical change to economic policy, compounded by the wider 1980s farm crisis, the negative impact on small farms was second only to that of the Great Depression. While this did trigger some reforms to assist farmers, the policies were most likely to benefit large farms, much as they still do today.
---
---
| |
---
|
It is easy to oversimplify the reasons the consolidation of small farms accelerated, but the 1980s marked a time of transformational corporate greed that brought a far more aggressive focus on profit at any cost. This was the moment when the devil convinced farmers that he didn't exist and shifted the blame for the world's problems onto "other people." Republicans somehow convinced rural America that they were fiscally responsible and had farmers' best interests at heart, despite all evidence to the contrary.
From here it began to snowball as policies continued to support large farms while small farms were continuously marginalized and expected to assume greater risk without receiving the benefits. This was reinforced as policies led to industry shifts in how farming was done. For example, price supports were largely limited to a few crops, mainly dairy and grains. The impact was most apparent in the H-2A visa process. In the 1980s, as borders began to close to migrant farmworkers, the H-2A visa program was created in 1986. In my view, this did great and lasting harm to small farmers. Unable to secure local labor, they were forced to use the H-2A program, which required time, money, and expertise that corporate farms had and small farmers did not. Since then the H-2A program has become a massive industry for lawyers, recruiters, logistics companies, financial institutions, and other players, making it nearly impossible for small farms to participate. How can a small farmer who needs only a few pickers for a few weeks during the year compete with corporate farms that have full time staff dedicated to managing the thousands of H-2A workers they employ?
---
| |
---
| Today, the challenges for small farmers remain immense. According to the [USDA's 2022 Census of Agriculture](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-1kY72kbOsaHm4cUxqSKL1n5Sep6sdEQDIp4889N8eMeeCKfpqbEQx7M7yBSciDcgbzQiyeB2XiC-NPfkbN5gsJj3zqnkSE_ApwsnAEyVvycFKlQHOQM5eI_UdYGcipRJQPs_5JiSC3YPY1n8TCuZt832m4jgwG5IKHOcfYgnEUwMhKzQf9_qHUgG-u9gE0-pvt9nMHy70SzM9vfCBEgEwRk6Gjqj0-&c=YEubFgN63L4eb2l0b-oph-AQDk3lHuLx4kqXxN_YFP1qY60VkPY-Lw==&ch=xvCOcPwYfgEaBLO0a3GyUHeT67r9o4lbjMRhfLiUF8zjaFmlcOfXIA==), the average age of a farmer is close to 60 and the average age of a new farmer is nearly 50. The average size of a farm is now about 500 acres, a significant increase from my grandparents' twenty. What does this say about farm startups when new farmers are nearly fifty years old before they begin? In my circle of small farmers I see a clear trend toward niche farming. Competing in mainstream agriculture with large corporate farms is nearly impossible. But with niche farming comes greater risks and slimmer chances of success. I raise premium poultry, and I must price it about 250 percent higher than store-bought chicken. That means relying on a small and often unstable market of customers who both have the means and the willingness to see the added cost as worthwhile. The financial risks are high, and the rewards are mostly intangible. Still, to me, it feels worth more than money in the bank.
---
| | [Your Donation Is Important](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-1kY72kbOsaHm4cUxqSKL1n5Sep6sdEQDIp4889N8eMeeCKfpqbEfTBtwf_4FqfR_db1wtnC1Kd-iiuRDC4o2vl-MGeQqMauhw40ZxZv1DQsSq5rKQwRKJ6HdR8NGYHZkFNR_tNMlFSeTXZHKYq6sRkIa5Qz1QLTM_D3YJwItGrw9VniLffjNgLaOvsvHODNE-pgEt68PhnzvXBsyVPkkcBfvkwE4TXqgDy9eLLrxM=&c=YEubFgN63L4eb2l0b-oph-AQDk3lHuLx4kqXxN_YFP1qY60VkPY-Lw==&ch=xvCOcPwYfgEaBLO0a3GyUHeT67r9o4lbjMRhfLiUF8zjaFmlcOfXIA==)
---
| |
---
| Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat
While Congressional District 4's Representative, Dan "Do Nothing" Newhouse is shouting that the sky is falling because China-based companies own a few thousand acres of American land, the real threat is much closer to home: our food supply. Two companies, wholly owned by Chinese interests, control the majority of our [seed](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-1kY72kbOsaHm4cUxqSKL1n5Sep6sdEQDIp4889N8eMeeCKfpqbEQx7M7yBSciDuHprCSHzCYoQjcyeLqOdAamJumvheP6yEmJVEu9YPy8pG1EdWLKl1QL32XqBX3SVQvAfT4wnMjxQWfk_C1U6NPA_lu71YQ0tNLGPBp8MX8I=&c=YEubFgN63L4eb2l0b-oph-AQDk3lHuLx4kqXxN_YFP1qY60VkPY-Lw==&ch=xvCOcPwYfgEaBLO0a3GyUHeT67r9o4lbjMRhfLiUF8zjaFmlcOfXIA==) and [pork production](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-1kY72kbOsaHm4cUxqSKL1n5Sep6sdEQDIp4889N8eMeeCKfpqbEQx7M7yBSciD3fVUy8vMJ1qKOGUmOVlbc71b6QqeW--yux5TcDKTNZP-UQjz582jn1630-qK3PUVl68Eyw-fjmKjxhuc5tpPPpr1FPVDlO9y4jgOKKjhfq-5peQIvxaUFQ==&c=YEubFgN63L4eb2l0b-oph-AQDk3lHuLx4kqXxN_YFP1qY60VkPY-Lw==&ch=xvCOcPwYfgEaBLO0a3GyUHeT67r9o4lbjMRhfLiUF8zjaFmlcOfXIA==).

---
| |
---
| Will 47 get Bolasarioed?
Read this article from Reuters on the rise and fall, fall, fall of Brazil's ex-president Bolasario and find hope. [https://www.reuters.com/world/americas/bolsonaro-trial-brazils-supreme-court-nears-verdicts-2025-09-01/](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-1kY72kbOsaHm4cUxqSKL1n5Sep6sdEQDIp4889N8eMeeCKfpqbEQx7M7yBSciDq8KnbURKisfudUCPx9wZn1B52Psk1S3lA0Eheq6ak53sROwcupSassP66zUj0egULCTyrblA7hireCMLU5sNGjG-MThGNWmWqiZ0gUM3Z16410iesy8hALGohQYwInJibMxsQGCDADOXEox9Xom2_trkauxpOAtGcnQDCMKImy5HALKRGbKXnQUGI7YyZh2cpyyFk_XHlhw=&c=YEubFgN63L4eb2l0b-oph-AQDk3lHuLx4kqXxN_YFP1qY60VkPY-Lw==&ch=xvCOcPwYfgEaBLO0a3GyUHeT67r9o4lbjMRhfLiUF8zjaFmlcOfXIA==)

---
| [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-1kY72kbOsaHm4cUxqSKL1n5Sep6sdEQDIp4889N8eMeeCKfpqbEfTBtwf_4FqfewpzDRvIhueNSv6X1is6zyfyS1ELr2TFfPE2-0drUaTu8-BesI3-uOl7Ukb1iojYgjx336axmu8h2vbHxQOmqrbD_nvuls4UpKc_I-j4wdonDht-QWXKxw==&c=YEubFgN63L4eb2l0b-oph-AQDk3lHuLx4kqXxN_YFP1qY60VkPY-Lw==&ch=xvCOcPwYfgEaBLO0a3GyUHeT67r9o4lbjMRhfLiUF8zjaFmlcOfXIA==) [](https://zmhksxhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001C-1kY72kbOsaHm4cUxqSKL1n5Sep6sdEQDIp4889N8eMeeCKfpqbEfTBtwf_4FqfgAl_P90SV3jSt2mUnkR8jnRI1VyqKnBQrtvRcBsCeS331crtPoPDBLykQUCxG4-tmFp_Pj5-ebfHERGPn9OqHCinJLWYATfehwNkVWJE9xL9ljIQH3n8eA==&c=YEubFgN63L4eb2l0b-oph-AQDk3lHuLx4kqXxN_YFP1qY60VkPY-Lw==&ch=xvCOcPwYfgEaBLO0a3GyUHeT67r9o4lbjMRhfLiUF8zjaFmlcOfXIA==) [](mailto:doug@ruralamericansunited.org)

Shockingly, at this same time, many farmers began to align with the very forces working against them, voting against their own best interests. With the beginning of the Reagan Administration and its radical change to economic policy, compounded by the wider 1980s farm crisis, the negative impact on small farms was second only to that of the Great Depression. While this did trigger some reforms to assist farmers, the policies were most likely to benefit large farms, much as they still do today. | | | It is easy to oversimplify the reasons the consolidation of small farms accelerated, but the 1980s marked a time of transformational corporate greed that brought a far more aggressive focus on profit at any cost. This was the moment when the devil convinced farmers that he didn't exist and shifted the blame for the world's problems onto "other people." Republicans somehow convinced rural America that they were fiscally responsible and had farmers' best interests at heart, despite all evidence to the contrary. From here it began to snowball as policies continued to support large farms while small farms were continuously marginalized and expected to assume greater risk without receiving the benefits. This was reinforced as policies led to industry shifts in how farming was done. For example, price supports were largely limited to a few crops, mainly dairy and grains. The impact was most apparent in the H-2A visa process. In the 1980s, as borders began to close to migrant farmworkers, the H-2A visa program was created in 1986. In my view, this did great and lasting harm to small farmers. Unable to secure local labor, they were forced to use the H-2A program, which required time, money, and expertise that corporate farms had and small farmers did not. Since then the H-2A program has become a massive industry for lawyers, recruiters, logistics companies, financial institutions, and other players, making it nearly impossible for small farms to participate. How can a small farmer who needs only a few pickers for a few weeks during the year compete with corporate farms that have full time staff dedicated to managing the thousands of H-2A workers they employ? | | | Today, the challenges for small farmers remain immense. According to the ==, the average age of a farmer is close to 60 and the average age of a new farmer is nearly 50. The average size of a farm is now about 500 acres, a significant increase from my grandparents' twenty. What does this say about farm startups when new farmers are nearly fifty years old before they begin? In my circle of small farmers I see a clear trend toward niche farming. Competing in mainstream agriculture with large corporate farms is nearly impossible. But with niche farming comes greater risks and slimmer chances of success. I raise premium poultry, and I must price it about 250 percent higher than store-bought chicken. That means relying on a small and often unstable market of customers who both have the means and the willingness to see the added cost as worthwhile. The financial risks are high, and the rewards are mostly intangible. Still, to me, it feels worth more than money in the bank. | | == | | | Newhouse's Red Herring: China's Real Threat While Congressional District 4's Representative, Dan "Do Nothing" Newhouse is shouting that the sky is falling because China-based companies own a few thousand acres of American land, the real threat is much closer to home: our food supply. Two companies, wholly owned by Chinese interests, control the majority of our == and ==. | | | Will 47 get Bolasarioed? Read this article from Reuters on the rise and fall, fall, fall of Brazil's ex-president Bolasario and find hope. == | == == mailto:doug@ruralamericansunited.org Rural Americans United | | | | Rural Americans United | 420 South 72nd Avenue Suite 180 PMB 110 | Yakima, WA 98908 US | |

## Houston Postpones Annual Event Amid Strike
Houston Mayor John Whitmire [indefinitely postponed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2O5CAUhE-DMyz-DCYg2MTZbLqh9QzPBjXdWECPZ26_8u4RJi5Vqb7vz8f6ASmn1_Ebnuj6117WF14tY-9Y19ZremCE3Fs7EX2E40jYdlgFExNllnK5Bkj5e1VDcBsLlg_ouJmM0VzMeoiO29kLtQVptZE6SGMR1LyjVGiURz0kd48xyyXnjAs-woZaGOP5rFEbGYhiGFIvdewRO35B2_N3-cQ6-vIcsou9n43IX0QsRCzXdY2PWN53SMQCtSefkYjl5iJiycVDJmKJ5d16edFYOmZ6lfrASv8D0_cZoN8dMU_UhHmTYBX1BiaqdjtRmCWjwjBp_LQjl36oLpxXyjk1bYhixxNS_nev_0zqpxN_AwAA__9xo4mn) the annual State of the City address, originally slated for Sep. 25, "out of respect” for the ongoing Hilton Americas-Houston hotel strike. The strike, which began on Labor Day, has now been [extended 10 additional days](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdCDvGmwoXFxDl2uvRA5esBUHR_ZeSN7-lNwj_PWMZvR9fy7LxcUUj_23u5Pl15aXg86aiJnKUrnEGwWXuNYH0Rrcvkeqm1tQ4tDKqQW1eBfTe-kbb6_ST9CQBTMYowFH3QSLeNUbrF6CVjD0ZCa1KRg2tQ6kxnVtov2MyQkUgASEzl1JozErjJq0UV70knzkXDoOxPRydUvv_KTSrfneJBuYH1WoXwJngfN5nl3ITMnHJ30aAucPksA55L-V89F-4_bM5UaltvRiOnz7n1XgbIZp1IPAuSnWP86YUqzaiF7udxfT95N_Zupp8V8AAAD__4czfbE) by union workers in an effort to secure a $23 minimum wage, vowing that “business as usual will not continue.” Given the rarity of labor strikes in the state—this one has been described as the first hospitality workers’ strike of its kind in modern Texas history—Texas historians are calling it a “[harbinger](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGO4zwMhJ9G7hRIctZKChcBFi5-IH97pUHLtCWsLBkiN1q__SG7ueLq64b8gCE5_HUf7xBiSOv_sGHPX0seE1aKyIxlJC7hAz1EJtoRnYd1DUgLjEaZN6muUrfjDCEe47mZ-0nNV91gr-2btZ02l67xfaesUgqMsXqx12lGaJ3VGi-wLBdcrk3on2bqqlutlTb6BBN2xlqnLx12tp3FWeEcOJcTe2T8AlrikR9YTi5vTew9806ivQkzCDPUWk8bpScTZsAkP0mY4XmUMMO39lCmkFYssvpD-kCcS4BEEgpKFzNhPGQFdj6kVbJH6TNjlDWXDywkf1KRwNKHyDlJ2LAEByR9_iTOSZgBirzd9L3d_5tFO8AeHlgo5CTa94cRpkuZsDywOHAeRfuuhenmvJEP26sqmGYsFSeXtz0nTEwvUh1hfunpueaPFWPEDbkcL_RnxF_9pvTzXkOMgTorzmrdIMTvHPnfvv_oze8AAAD__9ijyWE),” whose outcome could set a precedent for future union actions.
## Mission Readies for El Milagro Project
The city of Mission is gearing up for a growth spurt as a [“massive” new development](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHSpCAQBOCnwQwLBoWfgOASs__SCy3UUad-EEvm1t23v9p9hcu7vuruP9_jd6REx_Y7Zgz8XMt44F0TMuM1Vr7oB_eYuNYTcd7jthHWNY6goJfKS23GJVJ6jV2zhEktXjcYtOudsxq-bLMHj-i09r231nemMzCZCTwY06m175RtKLwx5bXRWmnQbZzQgnOz_rJonVlEp3AhLlfLOzI-Y13TqzzwaueSmxR25rMK80vAIGC477vNrxqPeHA5qLxDAob3KgFDLX95lx9EwBAvpjmhgAGTzJTidhX5QynFLBd8YCpnxoNlplqpHBK0Aq8MtOd-NldYzptSomqd6NSWI6VPI_6_Hx8B_gUAAP__BSmH2w) is set to kick off construction, with debt to be paid by future El Milagro residents over 40 years. The new subdivision, called El Milagro, is described as a live-work-play development, offering 347 single-family homes, 99 townhouse lots, and at least one apartment complex, alongside commercial, retail, and civic spaces. The project has come under scrutiny after a [lone voter](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdI68C9hQuPgbuvztlcjgBawzOLI3JHn7E_cKV3-aTzPzdR_vLsRwrP_dTpbfSxoPepVIzJTHwjl80-Yil_Igmje3roHK4kZU2ErVS6hH70L8jE3l7aR8DxVZMK0xGrDT1WantqeldqBUP3vtJg2mRz21mpau6VVXBXvJVA81gAKEm5tIozEzdJq0qb1oFPnAKd94I6a3K0v8pJPybU57Fe3G_Cii_idwEDjsn7yeFxE4xDS7KK9BAgdU2AgcAAQOqhM4lHCskeSZmLL0NAdPRaZDgjZyDzGGdMhwSE8TyyVluTz5mUnuoZQLbWmn9DooX_IqW_94XaGijWjUursQf_vx3149Lf4EAAD__xTUi9c) last fall approved $167.5 million in Mission taxes be paid out for the development over a 40-year period.

Surprised legislators, shocked that the single person who voted was able to authorize the project, then considered a [bill to dissolve](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3SpCAQRZ8GMyxABQ0INjH7Nt3QQmmxa9ufgp5x5u23Zl5hkxvec-r8-Zl-AhIe6XfYwfNrPacD7kLADHkqnPEvbIG4lAtg2UJKCGUNk1Gmk2qQupliQHpPbRX9rOKgK_Dadc5ZbXpbbd7ZPoaohj4udulWBb0F57poVdsq5-YK_edMDbrRWmmj6zCDNc4turdgXRNFqyAin7nmDRheoaz0Pp-Q6-XcK_Ib81VE80uYUZjxvu_6ymfKUArjDqU-gIUZPxBhRvUdJ8wIJHekkPIpZySSCbjI6zETLnKDkPFIEg8ZHoXxEGasso_XjURYrBOtSntA-irw_4V7evMvAAD__0epgeI) the administrative district for the project in the state legislature this year.
## A&M Faces Notre Dame in Marquee Game
Number 16 Texas A&M faces No. 8 Notre Dame in South Bend tonight in one of college football’s marquee games of the week. [Here's viewing information.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L2uozAQBeCnMd1EtkkMKSjSUKyUbbdEAx6D9_oH2ZNw8_Yr7itsN5ojfdI5f57TE33waf2NkQb-dnlKdNRAzFSmysV_0YaBa92Jlg3X1VN1OGmpbyDvoNrJog-f6drYYZb2rhoaVHfrOqN0b5ptaF17783NWdnb2SzdgrPrZ7prqanttWv8cGLyrlqlpNLqgjMZ3XWL6g2ZrrXiKsl6zuXCGzF9Y3Xhk99ULkuOTRg25r2K9iH0KPR4HMcl1nRmQo-U4FWFHuueC59H5o2K0OOWD-AMB_KyQcqgDPzQgBDhXc9XDylzIbAYCdhHgsqFMPq0gk8uQ-VcPsEnquBygbQgOjiIvqCFeMKvXegRCzwe6pn__no1ZbD74UPw1XTiKteIPvy04P_b_j3ofwEAAP__4sebPA) The Aggies (2-0) face their [first major challenge](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u3CAQRp8Gd6xg8Bq7oEhDd9OmtLAZDAprLBhd7759ZCdvkG40fzrf-fU1f7mU0779dC809A5l3vFsGYmwzo1q-o3RZWrtQFyj27aELbgZBDy5mLhUs3cpf-a-82YRfpIdGqmfWg8SxqGLxkHw6KZl7Z3XY6_C-lyVek6jwFGEgF0y1zMxSSWlkCAfbsEBtF7lOOCglWe9QJ-o1AdFJHy7FvKnfGN9rOXVZROJjsbUDwaWgT3P84Ht2K8hA3uVDOyCRGnfGNhGpX4Y2JmBTZ6B7QcQo4KJgV1LzrghD6XQ4nLm_874HTeW82rwvVBF7t0LeUhbvBdSTS3yG47_ldRV448z5ZzaoFkvtpdL-Sam__P8beBPAAAA__9wIpM-) of the season with Notre Dame, after rolling over UTSA and Utah State in the first weeks of the season. Notre Dame enters the game as a 6.5-point favorite, but could be in a [must-win situation](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSozAQRL9GZOOSBEgmILiEbC-9kBJoBCoLRGnG1vrvr7y_sHlXd7_372v-cjHFc_vrDhz5O-T5xEoJmbHMxCU-cHeJiS7EdXfbFpGCm7XUPcgBVDt7F9N77ho_LtIPqsFR2d5ao_TdNPvo1663ZpVyWaxW3uDdDtL00rS-b4fQNXH8lMlBtUpJpdXNLWi0tau6GzS29aKT6CPncuMdGb8dhfTOLyy3NR9NGnfmi0T7R-hJ6KnWelsXoisXpk9C6GnNKeGGEHLmxaUk9PShFHqKTJDP9IaK-IAWlifDjgUJ6v6GM3NB8O5AeBH8TIODAwJiIkjxgXA8iaHGE0IuEEuknWANF4QnPwsKPTVl9FeNKUUyVnRyO1xMP8_5d75fo_4fAAD__73Ul8o) after losing their first game to Miami two weeks ago and then having a bye week. In other Texas football action, Baylor plays Samford at 11 a.m., Texas Tech (21) takes on Oregon St. in Lubbock at 2:30 p.m., and UTEP travels to Austin to face Texas (7) at 3:15 p.m. [See the full schedule here.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOozAQgOGnMV2QZ0xsKFxcQ5drr0SDPYB1kxhhb0jefpV9ha1_6Sv-f7fpRknSY_1Ld_b1teTpwWcRrpWPqdQj_eeNpJayM4eN1jVxWWhCjdeLHi5gpkhJ3lPXRD_rOEDDHtzVOQvY22bzPVFvTMc4mFmHCIRh6Gy_WLBgEfom-Q-mBzAAGhBamtmicwF6y9aZqDrNMdV8tHXjyi8qi7zzk4825Hsjfqt1L8r8UTgqHM_zbLnsj09UOIYswitflpzrTCIKxxI2jl_CzeHjfiaRVKxTnV7vlOTHrL878fT4HQAA__9YEnKo)
| [](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz7uO6yAQxvGnMV0iBmywC4rTpMtpt0QTGGwUfBGMcnn7VVb7Blt_n37S_-vqr5hL3ub_uJLjV9r9Rs9WiJmqb1zznRYs3NpBFBac50wtoVdSDSc5nUD7iLm8fS-iu8k4gSAHdrDWgBqNWFxIQxhGY0NMpkcdVAoaJNwgjDhpiiK7DyYn0AASFJzxRkZZG2A0ZKyOXS8pZt7rmRdiemFL5b0_qJ7DvoriFuajdfpfpy6dusSat3tZN_6snbr8fhsjk6guHs9cSm7Gdr2cV8zlR-G_tT-c-g4AAP__UrZvMw) **Smart Americans are discovering what real hydration looks like.** Unlike the mainstream sports drinks with artificial ingredients and excessive sugar, [LMNT](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykz7uO6yAQxvGnMV0iBmywC4rTpMtpt0QTGGwUfBGMcnn7VVb7Blt_n37S_-vqr5hL3ub_uJLjV9r9Rs9WiJmqb1zznRYs3NpBFBac50wtoVdSDSc5nUD7iLm8fS-iu8k4gSAHdrDWgBqNWFxIQxhGY0NMpkcdVAoaJNwgjDhpiiK7DyYn0AASFJzxRkZZG2A0ZKyOXS8pZt7rmRdiemFL5b0_qJ7DvoriFuajdfpfpy6dusSat3tZN_6snbr8fhsjk6guHs9cSm7Gdr2cV8zlR-G_tT-c-g4AAP__UrZvMw) gets back to basics with a science-backed approach. Mission Readies for El Milagro Project The city of Mission is gearing up for a growth spurt as a is set to kick off construction, with debt to be paid by future El Milagro residents over 40 years. The new subdivision, called El Milagro, is described as a live-work-play development, offering 347 single-family homes, 99 townhouse lots, and at least one apartment complex, alongside commercial, retail, and civic spaces. The project has come under scrutiny after a last fall approved $167.5 million in Mission taxes be paid out for the development over a 40-year period. subject: Civil Charge Of Animal Cruelty Leveled In Hot-Car Death of Maine ‘Comfort Dog’
body:
Here's the latest breaking news at The Maine Wire

** Civil Charge Of Animal Cruelty Leveled In Hot-Car Death of Maine ‘Comfort Dog’ (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=3b97e15113&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Ted Cohen on Sep 12, 2025 03:38 pm
The handler of a Maine state “comfort dog” who died in a hot car earlier this year is facing charges connected to the lab’s death. Brodie Hinckley has now been charged with a civil violation of animal cruelty, according to the Penobscot County District Attorney’s Office. Hinckley has been placed on paid administrative leave, a [...]

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/050b2992-7e76-4810-af16-86f5bbd45d98?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Pledge your support](https://substack..yrL7xmVCrCyg56ZlLChJSJ5OJOyqDjL_mGQ489q7EU0?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=173482768)
On September 11th, there was only one thing to talk about - September 11, 2001 and remembering the worst American tragedy in our country's history 24 Years Ago.
After reflecting on this experience, the sad reality is that Never Forget 9-11 has become a distant memory. Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it. 24 years later and the same Al-Qaeda terrorist forces of evil that caused this horrific attack have only grown and morphed through violent attacks and radical non-violent brainwashing on college campuses.
The execution of Charlie Kirk is a terror attack on intellectual freedom that claimed his life. He was silenced for his voice. 24 years ago, 9-11-01 was the largest terror attack on this nation and the now we live in an era of disrespect for first responders and the need for national guard forces to restore law and order as liberal cities with bail reform and a focus on social workers over police has resulted in rampant crime and murders.
September 11th claimed more lives in one day and those first responders that ran into buildings to save lives and many perished were true heroes.
While most focus on New York, we cannot forget the attack on the Pentagon and the failed attempt to attack Washington DC because of the extreme heroism of those brave passengers that took over and diverted United Flight 93. This plane was likely targeting the Capitol or the White House.
Our very way of life was threatened on 9-11-01.
**The DC Experience**
I spent the whole day in Washington DC on September 11th. It started off with being at the Capitol and observing a moment of silence at 8:46 AM which was part of Congress' declaration of September 11 as Patriots Day. **Almost nobody stopped for that moment of silence. Joggers jogged and it was business as usual.** A tour guide making his living talking about our nation continued to give a tour.
Here is the Video
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b02a9138-0095-4ca6-a22c-57c6a3e3c148?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
_**As Americans we can do better. We can stop what we are doing for one minute of our lives as we are just not that important compared to all those that have been sacrificed in the name of freedom.**_
We are the Land of the Free Because of the Brave. As a New Yorker, I never thought I would be in DC on September 11th as I spend each September 11th at Ground Zero.
**The New York Experience**
I arrived at Ground Zero around 11PM to experience the lights and commemorate the memory of the towers that no longer stood there and to walk around the memorials of the footprints of the twin towers.
Our entire system of government is based on Providence. George Washington speaks of it.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/90e19f37-56b1-47a8-bb31-62445e13c7fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
**The Rescue and Aftermath**
Out of the rubble, following September 11th, I've never seen this country more united. This was not about race, religion, political, sexual orientation. It was about all Americans being united. September 12th was one of the most unifying days in our country's history. All Americans united for one common cause to build ourselves up and launch a war on terror. _**For years I have said on September 11th we were divided; on September 12 we were united. It is unity that has been missing in our country for many years as Americans.**_
This September 11th was filled with vitriol against Charlie Kirk with many celebrating his death, reflecting a deep division in this country. Charlie Kirk never wielded a weapon - he simply used his voice and being deep in faith even if you disagree with it should never be ostracized (unless it is a misinterpretation of religion for evil).
It is time to put our differences aside. We need to unite and fight our enemies domestic and abroad. I pray that we never have another September 11th in this country but there are many of those terrorist forces are active worldwide.
Such terror attacks usually do not take place as a Plane hijacking and most often include a Holocaust or genocide component in the distorted name of G-d. Let's all strive to be united once again and carry on the mission started on September 12, 2001. We can do that by eradicating terror and terrorist regimes wherever they lay their head.

clean_body: A full day of Remembrance and Reflection | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more Goldstein For Congress - Please Subscribe and also visit us at www.goldsteinforcongress.com A full day of Remembrance and Reflection | | | Sep 13| | | ∙| | Guest post ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- On September 11th, there was only one thing to talk about - September 11, 2001 and remembering the worst American tragedy in our country's history 24 Years Ago. After reflecting on this experience, the sad reality is that Never Forget 9-11 has become a distant memory. Those who cannot remember the past are condemned to repeat it. 24 years later and the same Al-Qaeda terrorist forces of evil that caused this horrific attack have only grown and morphed through violent attacks and radical non-violent brainwashing on college campuses. The execution of Charlie Kirk is a terror attack on intellectual freedom that claimed his life. He was silenced for his voice. 24 years ago, 9-11-01 was the largest terror attack on this nation and the now we live in an era of disrespect for first responders and the need for national guard forces to restore law and order as liberal cities with bail reform and a focus on social workers over police has resulted in rampant crime and murders. September 11th claimed more lives in one day and those first responders that ran into buildings to save lives and many perished were true heroes. While most focus on New York, we cannot forget the attack on the Pentagon and the failed attempt to attack Washington DC because of the extreme heroism of those brave passengers that took over and diverted United Flight 93. This plane was likely targeting the Capitol or the White House. Our very way of life was threatened on 9-11-01. The DC Experience I spent the whole day in Washington DC on September 11th. It started off with being at the Capitol and observing a moment of silence at 8:46 AM which was part of Congress' declaration of September 11 as Patriots Day. Almost nobody stopped for that moment of silence. Joggers jogged and it was business as usual. A tour guide making his living talking about our nation continued to give a tour. Here is the Video As Americans we can do better. We can stop what we are doing for one minute of our lives as we are just not that important compared to all those that have been sacrificed in the name of freedom. We are the Land of the Free Because of the Brave. As a New Yorker, I never thought I would be in DC on September 11th as I spend each September 11th at Ground Zero. The New York Experience I arrived at Ground Zero around 11PM to experience the lights and commemorate the memory of the towers that no longer stood there and to walk around the memorials of the footprints of the twin towers. Our entire system of government is based on Providence. George Washington speaks of it. The Rescue and Aftermath Out of the rubble, following September 11th, I've never seen this country more united. This was not about race, religion, political, sexual orientation. It was about all Americans being united. September 12th was one of the most unifying days in our country's history. All Americans united for one common cause to build ourselves up and launch a war on terror. For years I have said on September 11th we were divided; on September 12 we were united. It is unity that has been missing in our country for many years as Americans.** This September 11th was filled with vitriol against Charlie Kirk with many celebrating his death, reflecting a deep division in this country. Charlie Kirk never wielded a weapon - he simply used his voice and being deep in faith even if you disagree with it should never be ostracized (unless it is a misinterpretation of religion for evil). It is time to put our differences aside. We need to unite and fight our enemies domestic and abroad. I pray that we never have another September 11th in this country but there are many of those terrorist forces are active worldwide. Such terror attacks usually do not take place as a Plane hijacking and most often include a Holocaust or genocide component in the distorted name of G-d. Let's all strive to be united once again and carry on the mission started on September 12, 2001. We can do that by eradicating terror and terrorist regimes wherever they lay their head. | A guest post by| Consultant, Political Consultant, Campaign Manager, Construction Consultant and Corporate Attorney. Jonathan served as the Campaign Manager for Dr. Michael Goldstein - CT-04 The Goldstein Substack is free today. But if you enjoyed this post, you can tell The Goldstein Substack that their writing is valuable by pledging a future subscription. You won't be charged unless they enable payments. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Michael Goldstein ? ?

name: Gary Miller for House of Delegates
subject: Why this VEA Endorsement Matters for us All
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct
body:
I am honored to share that our campaign has been endorsed by the Virginia Education Association.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/1a78d16d704e/why-this-vea-endorsement-matters-for-us-all?e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | |
---
[|
---](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=acebbb41e5&e=606d7e9aa2)
| | Friends,
I am honored to share that our campaign has been endorsed by the **Virginia Education Association**. This endorsement is deeply personal to me, because education is the reason I am here today.
I grew up in a community where most boys **ended up in the coal mines**. My life should have followed that same path. But my mother was a teacher who showed me the power of learning. My sister also became a teacher. And when I set my sights on becoming a doctor, **it was my wife, a teacher herself, who helped put me through medical school on her teacher’s salary.**
Education did more than change my life. It gave me the chance to serve my community for 36 years as a physician, **caring for thousands of Virginians**. That is why I will always fight to make sure every child has the same opportunity to succeed.
**This is not just about the 49th District.** When we have a champion for education in any seat it helps the entire Commonwealth. We must push back against this **attempt to politicize and defund schools** , calling it “choice”. I will fight for public education for all of our children; it is the great equalizer.
The Virginia Education Association’s endorsement proves that o**ur campaign is building momentum.** But to carry this message to voters across the state, we need your help.
Can I count on you to make a contribution today to help us reach more Virginians with our vision for **better schools, stronger families, and brighter futures**?

---
| | | | | | | | | | | [DONATE](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=dea43bceef&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| |

Teachers invested in me. Now I will invest in them, in our schools, and in every child’s future. **Together, we can make Virginia a leader in education and opportunity.**
I appreciate your support,

Dr. Gary Miller
Candidate for House of Delegates49th District

---
| | | | | [](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=e06fad2439&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
[](https://drmillerforyou.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=db0c834d5d03c9893fbbb1d8a&id=672e98b4cc&e=606d7e9aa2)
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | **PAID FOR BY GARY MILLER FOR DELEGATE** 121 Bell Ct.Danville, VA 24541
---
|
---

name: Douglas Carswell
subject: Reflecting on a grim week….
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/grimweek?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**This week has been deeply unsettling. The assassination of Charlie Kirk, gunned down while addressing young Americans on a Utah college campus, was horrifying.**

Details remain scarce, but it appears Charlie was targeted for his beliefs, which he expressed with remarkable clarity and conviction.

Over the past decade, Charlie Kirk emerged as one of a number of new conservative communicators who mastered digital media to connect with younger audiences who found traditional conservatism uninspiring.
---
|
---
| Bold yet civil, Kirk fearlessly shared his views and welcomed open debate with those who disagreed. **Tragically, it was during one such exchange that he was murdered.**

The bleakness of the past few days has been amplified by a rush to vilify those on the “other” side. Where does this appetite for indignation that makes us want to always assume the worst about others come from? It risks driving us towards disaster.

**Most liberals and progressives I know are as horrified about the events of the past week as my conservative friends.** Yet, I fear that too many Americans have elevated politics to be a sort of substitute religion. It has become a belief system through which they try to make sense of the world. It won’t work.

**When politics becomes your religion, you view those who share your beliefs as inherently good and those who don’t as inherently bad.** This Manichean mindset erodes respect for differing opinions and abandons civility. Once you start to use your social media feed as the moral yardstick by which you judge the actions of others, you enter a world without redemption. **It will be hell.**

As a conservative think tank, the Mississippi Center for Public Policy relentlessly pursues practical solutions like eliminating income tax, cutting red tape, and expanding school choice to improve our state.

But what value do these victories hold if the next generation of Americans is indoctrinated with extreme ideologies? **What good is tax reform today if young people are taught to see their country as irreparably beyond redemption; that only the darker parts of our history are to define us, and not the ideals of freedom that the Founders clung to?**

**Charlie Kirk understood the importance of teaching young Americans the principles that made the nation great.** Through Turning Point USA, he educated students on freedom, free markets, and limited government.

**We need to stand firm in our advocacy for these principles. Respectful but absolutely resolute. **

Four years ago, we began the Mississippi Leadership Academy precisely because we recognized that shaping young hearts and minds is just as vital as pursuing legislative reform.

Our Mississippi Leadership Academy, which starts next week, is a two-part program designed to equip students with the skills and knowledge to become effective change agents in our state, ready to defend American principles and free markets.

**If you know young people eager to participate, please encourage them to[sign up here.](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=78c725477a&e=5703353baa) ****After this week’s events, the need for the Leadership Academy seems more urgent than ever.** We’re deeply grateful to our 80,000+ email subscribers, many of whose support makes this initiative possible.

It’s also why we run our Speaker Series, bringing leading advocates for liberty, such as Douglas Murray and Corey De Angelis to our state.

In the wake of this week’s tragedy, it’s understandable that some friends have felt despair. Two hundred forty-nine years after America’s founding, some may wonder, is this where our nation stands?

So let me say this as an immigrant that came late to your country; the United States is an extraordinary nation—the greatest republic in human history. **America will remain great, able to overcome every challenge, as long as you hold fast to the founding principles and freedoms that built this nation.**

Now more than ever, our mission must be to pass those principles on to the next generation.
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=33b81f9cc7&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=22992e1763) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=22992e1763).

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60bde7e6-abac-4572-b606-5ff42cb90c3f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Thank you for reading this newsletter. It means a lot. Many of you have followed me since 2018 or 2019 when I ran for President.
Back in 2020, I said to Zach on the presidential trail, "If after all of this I become a talking head, come smack me in the face." My point was that I set out to make big changes happen, and while being a media commentator sometimes can lead to those changes, a lot of the time it doesn't.
Not to say that I don't engage in talking headness some of the time. I do media interviews, maintain social media accounts, and write this weekly newsletter/Substack. I like to think that I've been 'out there' doing things quite publicly pretty much since my presidential run.
But I also see myself as more of a builder than a talker/communicator. As I said at a conference last month, "I like to do shit." I was an anonymous private company CEO during my formative years coming up, and the path to success was to do a good job for customers while not really seeking press.
You know, essentially the opposite of being a political figure.
I enjoy writing. I'm grateful that people actually read what I write - thank you! I have seen books change the world - "The Anxious Generation" comes to mind.
But at heart, I'm a builder and problem-solver. And it's time to build again.
A few weeks ago I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/de8a7e00-4126-449f-aebc-419dc7ee16d1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about how Humanity Forward lobbied to make the child tax credit higher, permanent and adjusted for inflation. The total benefit is now about $80 billion annually to over 60 million American children. That took five years, most of which couldn't be celebrated in real time, because it involved dozens of meetings that were best left off the record.
While that was happening, I thought to myself, "Is there another way I can improve the lives of American families, outside of legislation or policy?" I consider myself resourceful, after all. I'm supposed to be a slick multi-hyphenate entrepreneur who can make things happen. I wrote a book over a decade ago called "Smart People Should Build Things."
In my career, I've been the CEO of a private company that grew to become #1 in the country. I was the founder and head of an entrepreneurship non-profit that operated in a dozen cities around the country. I've been a presidential candidate and movement founder. Also, more than twenty years ago I was a party promoter, which I've recently been [doing](https://substack.com/redirect/79363315-81f7-4cba-9198-dd86702044d7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) again.
I've been working on something for over a year. I think it has the potential to be very big and impactful.
It will be announced here next week. I hope you like it.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e9d90c70-75d1-40df-bbf8-6fa60ae6d569?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

subject: we must catch up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC
body:
Ten top targeted Republican House incumbents raised more than $1 million last quarter.
| You may be receiving this email because of your previous support for organizations like The Long Run PAC. We need your support, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from us, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=5603%2E196590%2EO387HC). [](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4742?t=2&akid=5603%2E196590%2EO387HC)
---
| It’s Mandela Barnes. I wanted to reach out quickly with a pretty **concerning update** on Democratic campaign fronts across the country.

_**Take a look at this:**_
---
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4742?t=3&akid=5603%2E196590%2EO387HC)
| | | [FIGHT BACK ](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4743?t=4&akid=5603%2E196590%2EO387HC)
---
**Ten, that’s right, ten, targeted Republican House incumbents raised more than $1 million last quarter.** For context, just one targeted Democratic House incumbent raised that amount.

If we want any hope of reclaiming the House majority and restoring a government that works for the people, _**we have to turn that trend around.**_

Now, it’s no secret that top Republicans will accept funding from anyone with deep pockets, values be damned. But money is money, and the funding these campaigns have received _**will**_ be put to powerful use.

At the Long Run PAC, we believe in backing changemaking candidates stepping up in ways we’ve never seen before. Young Candidates. Candidates of Color. LGBTQ+ Candidates. Working Class Candidates. Candidates who are breaking the mold and are positioned to win crucial races all over America.

But to win, it takes resources, a community of backers, and support from grassroots donors like you. [_**So, in that spirit, I hope you’ll consider a contribution to our work today so we can continue backing candidates who prioritize change.**_](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/4742?t=6&akid=5603%2E196590%2EO387HC)

body:
They’re calling it a “knockout punch” to President Trump — here’s the plan. |
Fellow American?

A report hit our desk, and the headline stopped me cold:

[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=46c7682972b14ba6b790b0a86260b44c&_e=sDzauQKL_zkNh8pKBH_cqFPkVOtbp-8VWhWUuMZvCnmntMj0vDj7i5kPoLTpCx5J3su9bnA87IPNMSs7aToo1gZIySQkmIZOV1uoEQNjJkQgyXgKWI1zxhL9IO4Qy5HjBHLummkjcko0soZ--X0--EumEP_oXt_V7_m2JFGxESvDTzwMBHPurSm3kphYo1d1TpYBQJf3krIcn5yVGZPWeBDO7dF1oNdSJcV9ZAc8hqMsdCiM0x_UF71lOkiHP-MmUSTzJ-3r9IwQuxm4ncrsKD43PINYE56gKO-jlwHTVRACPXWluKcDtt01jIhIcAN7ZPYE1BzN7vzlYySdVRf2XmH6TIjWTwrFQGq4kH8lg0WSTesQgVSBfe8iCIMIwhOczndHRbAbnrljC9B4AdH3hXBpRGYi1AEj8T5MsV-NjjPaMCEpK2KWfCmQCo8XK5OccD_h1dNfxhajXIBVz6nJCJK31CfSKglfTE6nP2bOvSCsWOiy8y5wxPi7ZGkfdiGumSlBcSwrW-7w1elEP8Sn-0Gbe5OAOE4ml40i6uEPj5B0eS02V54L3VC5yZolImDEKXkpjnDPPlyFpHy1rl5K-J-ILRUcl68v1iPyI_7QsT1cmYu_qAURBhLBBIk5i0Egr4lz-ptpQskWENw1CvBfcsHCqzclMCtQItmjCSsU0SAaUnY5rMeBqc3PSLqN7BZ0q5ywqs6hC6gSWMypXIKwUREtzNThsBkqdzFE8kZSnSKU5MO2bJjBdn3p_I41RwXdZBPXJ8s9zlagLvim5z_lnOlmh0z89-OGVnyOvKj5d4P-oVr5efGqtALOpPUOYSR4btHzBYZB8H4bkRpavgUJ_RRweNE6IkblY7spa6i7WmU%3D)

name: John James
subject: The mission begins tonight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John James for MI, 35744 Van Dyke Avenue, Sterling Heights, MI 48312
body:
I need you in the cockpit before midnight.
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1250552/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvdzNYcFU4bUpxZg/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTA5MTM/LbmNsYmdCU2E2Vw/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkxTNzhuQ1lXOGFscw/gaMVwAw/s8pcf95f276)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Patriot, When I flew Apache helicopters in combat, every mission had a launch window. You either made the window, or you failed the mission. **That’s exactly how I see tonight.**
---
[ **JOIN THE MISSION** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Our campaign’s mid-month deadline is here. This is our launch window. How we begin matters. The momentum we show today will determine the strength of everything that follows. **I’m bringing everything I have into this fight for Michigan’s future. But I cannot launch this mission without co-pilots like you.** If you stand with me tonight, we’ll take off strong. If we miss the window, we fall behind. [**Will you join me before midnight?**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
[ **JOIN THE MISSION** ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Always grateful,
John James

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Biden’s “autopen pardons” are a constitutional disgrace
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ted Cruz for Senate
body:
I’m pushing back against unconstitutional acts—will you stand with me?

| | | [](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-rSOrhcd-Yrt5jy4XDe3QA)
---
| | Fellow Conservative, President Biden crossed the line--using an **autopen** to sign massive pardons during the final hours of his term. Many of those pardons weren't individually approved by him--and according to constitutional standards, they're **null and void**. I'm calling on the Department of Justice to take action. We must hold those who improperly benefited from these so-called "autopen pardons" **legally accountable**. _As I told Sean Hannity on Monday: "I don't know if I would let Joe Biden handle the remote control on the television much less make a decision. It was elder abuse by everyone around him. If he did not make the determination person by person, then legally it is null and void." _ _**I 'm committed to defending our Constitution--but I need your support!**_

This is about preserving **the rule of law** and ensuring **real accountability**. If pardons can be executed without the president's personal oversight, what's to stop abuse of that power next? Will you stand with me and help lead the fight?
---
[ **Contribute Now >>** ](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)
---
Thank you for standing firm. Together, we won't let elected officials sideline our legal norms or undermine justice. Thank you-
**Ted Cruz**** ** P.S. Every donation, big or small, makes a difference. Let's show them that abuses of power won't go unchecked.
---

Fellow Conservative,

If the Secret Service isn’t yet investigating Governor Tim Walz, they ought to be.

He and his wife are known for saying some crazy things since they came onto the national stage last summer, but **this takes the cake.**

We’ve been warning everyone for years that the crazy would set in and something terrible would happen, and last summer, _**we came very close to losing the Commander-in-Chief, but by the grace of God, the bullet missed. **_

It was only a matter of time until a sitting U.S. governor uttered the words, but _**now it’s happened, and there is no turning back.**_

We’ve been warning everyone for years that the crazy would set in and something terrible would happen, and last summer, we came very close to losing the Commander-in-Chief, but by the grace of God, the bullet missed. It was only a matter of time until a sitting U.S. governor uttered the words, but now it’s happened, and there is no turning back. For a better tomorrow, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Anthony Brown
subject: Taking bold action
body:
When I stepped into the role of Attorney General, I knew that I had to not just enforce the law, but create an office that ensures equity and justice for every Marylander.

| _Attorney General Anthony Brown is hard at work defending the rights of every Marylander, and he needs your help to continue his fight. You are receiving this email because of your previous support for Attorney General Brown or Democrats in Maryland. We need your help in this fight, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/AEuI851VXESdpd_RsD8u5A2?unsubscribedata=PXGZqD1FI7NP9lKGOJr7%2Bek%2FQKkARdgTFx8Ti8kZTbxsnpTOm8iwKptb1EMSUQpYc8kUi2eyWbVt3m7AqUFYapVmISjR6HqVNG%2B0rIZkIjLDSZkc3Uvooyjei0ynekHPKjK541z4TcELMHlgE0Jy0%2Bq8i54XSAdrP1WZ2elotd8NVJQe%2B4mZD2jYSNramWI%2Bsy6hY1ZIAQulA2nkZxMhP0FwAvGiP92oZmQtu6Sd6mAjMOxPXSi1K6hh6syL7yBYE6WFJPJ%2FGzeBj57%2BDObXzIGku9xJ3ddwKI6NWzvSAeiFCcZmoQCii7hXvS0PCiK1GlB1H54iNRmWEEJbBFG1wPMczhU41gjLhtx98sLOgdHM%2FXYOVFCB9rlFBvJ90WDJ2EC9KfAQUUda7jT%2B73vVKPTbkWhQaDp1nVnOToRtkTD2KeJzKNiKYc8Zq2MAznjC)._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115140651/569330039/1259050720?refcode=BLU_EM_ABAG_2025-08-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTg2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAwMzc2Zi1hNjkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgV1pXoO5Wsv6vzgn2AnLy_hgBPx5jc7cYbgygmCYD8=)
---
| Peter,

When I stepped into the role of Attorney General, I knew that I had to not just enforce the law, but create an office that ensures equity and justice for every Marylander.

That’s why I created the Office of Equity, Policy, and Engagement and introduced legislation in my first year that gave the Office of the Attorney General prosecutorial authority to enforce Maryland and federal civil rights laws.

I expanded our Independent Investigations Division so we can independently prosecute police-involved fatalities – a critical step toward accountability in law enforcement.

And I partnered with the Maryland Public Defender to bring together legal experts, advocates, educators, and public officials to launch the Maryland Equitable Justice Collaborative with the goal of identifying and advancing reforms to address Maryland’s mass incarceration crisis, with the highest racial disparity in our prison systems in the country.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115140652/569330040/1259050720?refcode=BLU_EM_ABAG_2025-08-01_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTg2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTAwMzc2Zi1hNjkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bgV1pXoO5Wsv6vzgn2AnLy_hgBPx5jc7cYbgygmCYD8=)
Real leadership means taking bold action, not waiting for permission. That’s how we build a justice system rooted in fairness, dignity, and accountability.

With you on my team, we will continue to overcome challenges and uphold the shared values that matter most to us. name: Sitting ducks
subject: MAGA unveils Manhattan Project to kill Dem party
body:
If ever there was a moment we needed a rallying moment from every Democrat everywhere, this is it
| | | | | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v38f8epF13G4DKvWD0U2CIo6QK7I_Z0rmgxqpR2T9HRwxab0kHiBFfBQFkHB3ct7682yX2WaPwrPjV3J0WwwQ901IGBfXL_mYcGVDM7Nl4cSa785ch5T54PfCHBkOoigBebaDK541hXfy4tj5aZMMD6FNWG7HD7Np_1IX-NYgTUeKaC7VfvfJGO6pQKnPPiRoTzC9khOdyC_NVpG1iFp9FD5MItXD0rw&c=tOvhdcJn2LmK6EESJonDoATdhMPsa_KGhTeswg9crtwgC4vyQiLisQ==&ch=ZVMTG8ZAAxu96JKFXW5lePPjG_Ub_xMGhp8UQk4rP669UAHFGzswiQ==)
---
| Peter,
This is an all hands on deck emergency.
Today MAGA-aligned groups unveiled, "Project Doorstrike", a Manhattan project-esque secret weapon that will give them an unprecedented edge in their blitzkrieg push to win the obscure but critically important 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection.
This little known race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing this majority means that MAGA will ensure that Democrats never win Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes again, and the GOP is laser focused on winning this:
---
| | [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v38f8epF13G4DKvWD0U2CIo6QK7I_Z0rmgxqpR2T9HRwxab0kHiBFfBQFkHB3ct7682yX2WaPwrPjV3J0WwwQ901IGBfXL_mYcGVDM7Nl4cSa785ch5T54PfCHBkOoigBebaDK541hXfy4tj5aZMMD6FNWG7HD7Np_1IX-NYgTUeKaC7VfvfJGO6pQKnPPiRoTzC9khOdyC_NVpG1iFp9MjjKgfYWhVu&c=tOvhdcJn2LmK6EESJonDoATdhMPsa_KGhTeswg9crtwgC4vyQiLisQ==&ch=ZVMTG8ZAAxu96JKFXW5lePPjG_Ub_xMGhp8UQk4rP669UAHFGzswiQ==)
---
| Screengrab of "Project Doorstrike" memo from the Republican State Leadership Committee's website, revealing their plan to unseat 3 Democratic justices in PA's Supreme Court election this November.
---
| | | | Project Doorstrike will blanket PA with canvassers, GOP voter registration drives, and a GOTV turnout machine that can swamp Dems and flip three Democratic-held state supreme court seats in one fell swoop.
Republicans know they are weak during Midterm and off-year elections and they know that the next opportunity that voters have to hit back is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election this November, now only 60 days away and they are leaving nothing to chance.
We won big in Wisconsin this year - but only because of massive media attention, huge spending from the national Dem party, and the support of millions of grassroots donors from across the country.
There is no similar effort now. We are forced to take on "Project Doorstrike" alone--and with three Dem justices up for retention, the stakes are 3x as high as Wisconsin's race.
The truth is that Democrats are sitting ducks here, and unless we can counter Project Doorstrike this is going to kill the Democratic party by ensuring that we never win a Presidential election again.
[Defend Our Courts is on the verge of something big, but we can't save these judges without everyone pitching in and doing what they can to help. We have only 60 days left to mount a counteroffensive to beat MAGA's Project Doorstrike. Can you rush a contribution right now to stop Project Doorstrike before it's too late?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001v38f8epF13G4DKvWD0U2CIo6QK7I_Z0rmgxqpR2T9HRwxab0kHiBFfBQFkHB3ct7682yX2WaPwrPjV3J0WwwQ901IGBfXL_mYcGVDM7Nl4cSa785ch5T54PfCHBkOoigBebaDK541hXfy4tj5aZMMD6FNWG7HD7Np_1IX-NYgTUeKaC7VfvfJGO6pQKnPPiRoTzC9khOdyC_NVpG1iFp9HoAJDbjD9zx&c=tOvhdcJn2LmK6EESJonDoATdhMPsa_KGhTeswg9crtwgC4vyQiLisQ==&ch=ZVMTG8ZAAxu96JKFXW5lePPjG_Ub_xMGhp8UQk4rP669UAHFGzswiQ==)
