clean_body: If ever there was a moment we needed a rallying moment from every Democrat everywhere, this is it | | | | | == | Peter, This is an all hands on deck emergency. Today MAGA-aligned groups unveiled, "Project Doorstrike", a Manhattan project-esque secret weapon that will give them an unprecedented edge in their blitzkrieg push to win the obscure but critically important 2025 Pennsylvania Supreme Court reelection. This little known race will determine whether or not Democrats retain their 3-vote majority on the Supreme Court Race. Losing this majority means that MAGA will ensure that Democrats never win Pennsylvania's 19 electoral college votes again, and the GOP is laser focused on winning this: | | == | Screengrab of "Project Doorstrike" memo from the Republican State Leadership Committee's website, revealing their plan to unseat 3 Democratic justices in PA's Supreme Court election this November. | | | | Project Doorstrike will blanket PA with canvassers, GOP voter registration drives, and a GOTV turnout machine that can swamp Dems and flip three Democratic-held state supreme court seats in one fell swoop. Republicans know they are weak during Midterm and off-year elections and they know that the next opportunity that voters have to hit back is the Pennsylvania Supreme Court election this November, now only 60 days away and they are leaving nothing to chance. We won big in Wisconsin this year - but only because of massive media attention, huge spending from the national Dem party, and the support of millions of grassroots donors from across the country. There is no similar effort now. We are forced to take on "Project Doorstrike" alone--and with three Dem justices up for retention, the stakes are 3x as high as Wisconsin's race. The truth is that Democrats are sitting ducks here, and unless we can counter Project Doorstrike this is going to kill the Democratic party by ensuring that we never win a Presidential election again. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | | | | == With your help we can mount a comeback and wage a real battle to win, but we are running out of time. name: LaMonica McIver
subject: Instead of doing their jobs, Republicans held a vote to punish me for doing mine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115141421/569332837/-1253276870?refcode=EM_F_250910Split_N_LM_90DO_8_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmU0ZDRkNC1hNzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ila53BfSjsog3_ZpoW98HURjC6PwdjFX_MmWyjZ3fhM=) Peter,

Republican Rep. Clay Higgins tried to censure me—to shame me on the House floor and strip me of my committee—all for doing my job.

And, Peter, you know what, he _FAILED_.

I stood my ground. And we showed Republicans that when we stand together, we stand strong.

This is a victory, but the fight isn’t over. Not by a long shot.

[STAND WITH US](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115141422/569332838/-1253276870?refcode=EM_F_250910Split_N_LM_90DO_8_G_N_B1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmU0ZDRkNC1hNzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ila53BfSjsog3_ZpoW98HURjC6PwdjFX_MmWyjZ3fhM=)
They will keep trying to silence me and attack me—**they have literally charged me with crimes for doing my job.** And I will keep standing up and fighting back. Because I know what’s right.

It’s not lost on me that Republicans tried to throw me off of the committee charged with doing oversight of DHS— _all_ for doing oversight of DHS. But this is about more than me. It is about how far the Republican Party will put themselves out on a limb to serve Donald Trump and his cruel agenda.

They tried to shame me. They failed, and they will keep failing because I won’t fold. Not now, not ever.

But I need you with me RIGHT NOW. This is just the beginning of the work we have ahead.

**_We were able to fight back this time, but we know that the Trump administration won’t stop trying to punish me for doing my job to hold them accountable._** That’s why they’re continuing on with their baseless legal battle and charges against me.

[**They are taking me to court, and we need to amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this administration. Can I count on you to pitch in to Shontel Brown and me to help us keep fighting back? We need to raise $13,194 to reach our goal, so we can counter Republicans' latest attacks. Every gift is a huge help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115141423/569332839/-1253276870?refcode=EM_F_250910Split_N_LM_90DO_8_G_N_L1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmU0ZDRkNC1hNzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ila53BfSjsog3_ZpoW98HURjC6PwdjFX_MmWyjZ3fhM=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and automatically split between Shontel Brown and LaMonica McIver:_ | | [$1 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115141424/569332840/-1253276870?refcode=EM_F_250910Split_N_LM_90DO_8_G_N_EB1&express_lane=true&amount=1&refcode2=EL1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmU0ZDRkNC1hNzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ila53BfSjsog3_ZpoW98HURjC6PwdjFX_MmWyjZ3fhM=)

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’ve run out of time, resources, and options
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.
| [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9b1f8b52471a4ff3b45f47996855a27d&_e=PExuiKfxrO8eZU60xf5wFBnZqu4sgRJFcAxGFb5u9zCa3osduaWMuTVSGcxzQR_40yeP0_dKpMPaQKYSJNSsZwkR5UFCkBvWnqAD9jdkEmJUpUAkKBG_ycnrQgVTNIXYo4MD9Y7_XJpdPOQlzHYtMIWnVH-2lrwHwvGhZgHgXfI0d7VmdBX5k3zPbdRA0RBjQDloAghCt_LCCHuny7nWK-JROFV3-Cg0HTJKJVbSbc7FG55u_BmyH2vKcM0WDuEDUrtJDO8dAZ1O2uDP7vra2MLQ0GQ1rHNnaTKEB-UKBNic7ZrlETH2di4vsM7gEq9XzMIO_AqVWTB0TYJDNXrkwOol4ZetHYHXwLI0CM9v7FyRa8Ri5804ofFeJ9ArTeSpX5yMDEfuDuYKmxFxwl-kobPKY8oWdfzkbv61o3Eqrs1a80AmZvQDhIdgv2Gn4NCOCjcbpvc1SsakE8U-k7StcQ1Ou0NzdW03Ozeefl_tvMmmtOqkiZfcBb78i9B9dszW4CwZAhEcKr8WamBBQRWFeSWm5_Bi1zHud-W5lNTQWWSxqqs6eMHMQ2zwBla1pQwpv4oMYo6aDNZZk36EtT-mbURehNoQeWlea8okQJ2Q9pkjVJhIhmkDpwUFsYvNgeVVxtUb1ToODgtcL6QLtLjxDQ%3D%3D)
---
Peter,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.
No cavalry coming over the hill.
_
---
But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful _force_ absolutely can: _THE AMERICAN PEOPLE_.
---
So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:**_the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like _YOU_._**
---
My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — [**“THE PEOPLE’S PARDON OF RUDY GIULIANI”**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=9b1f8b52471a4ff3b45f47996855a27d&_e=PExuiKfxrO8eZU60xf5wFBnZqu4sgRJFcAxGFb5u9zCa3osduaWMuTVSGcxzQR_40yeP0_dKpMPaQKYSJNSsZwkR5UFCkBvWnqAD9jdkEmJUpUAkKBG_ycnrQgVTNIXYo4MD9Y7_XJpdPOQlzHYtMIWnVH-2lrwHwvGhZgHgXfI0d7VmdBX5k3zPbdRA0RBjQDloAghCt_LCCHuny7nWK0MbbEW2vZm6lIXjvRE8dIzd_s-fy_9N97ZuNpJVt9IFOV66rtWNNyF8oz1J1QCTsiFnaLA6ky2nUH3W4MCq7ICXE6L4K9qg2NkqQKq_FaD_3tt40yt_ahgjuL8DCaPRp8riJrLU7hXf0SjrDhQGNkvdcBi8xh-GVNF7PadWIFsiswu-xm5V0J_ggHrU6JsT25pZEYmQTsKFftbU-XxyqqvmrJ-KsBUdLtVdG-S_Xc5LKQ9QPGQHrZe9JY9MOAT8gzqUjSszHW4_pj8OyIazQES0oibzQ83l6mtPrX48wdCKco7x2VYDJQt5zrXz_lo4JFwEDCKMq2rlUs-B4-9CqIRniQ7DzNqNJSrvOLO3lHSOJP-OUjg97QaoIx0iaaM2jwW1HE5gcajpJd50C1Qz6lguZfi6ihPsG5lqH-mG99j_slhzBZtQAz8xcqGjv5e34A%3D%3D)— calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES.
---

clean_body: My last chance. My Hail Mary. | Peter, Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice... As a matter of fact, it’s my last resort. You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE. A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a federal pardon in state court. And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – and KNOW – was RIGHT. The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses! No viable pardon from the President. No protection. No cavalry coming over the hill. But even though the most powerful man in the country legally cannot step in to save me, the most powerful force absolutely can: THE AMERICAN PEOPLE. So, with my back against the wall, I’m turning to the one thing that can save me:the collective voices of MILLIONS of patriots like YOU. My mugshot was entered under booking #2313757, so my goal is for 2,313,757 patriots to sign my official petition — — calling for my freedom and to DROP ALL CHARGES. ...And we’re nearly there! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust --

name: House GOP
subject: Your answer determines our strategy
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2075z2uyff0j6nm3gcywjul3ouldi52fmb2vm9tn981ts5q2ip2jsdimxjvxgliznleixcmwau0gb20qu5u&__stmp=t2j5ma&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2j5ma&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3o9hodgjg6bi3ce7ksj69bifnoaspoa3sxmeh03vev19c3i518iu3t39r877ennzwq8dbw3el35jsun4o67zjplr6ihkew3wsqdk6x2gtgtnydiqt68hks1to2cv1yolj3nvlr6gxs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2j5ma&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2j5ma&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2j5ma&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2j5ma&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=rc6qmltxol3o9hodgjg6bi3ce7ksj69bifnoaspoa3sxmeh03vev19c3i518iu3t39r877ennzwq8dbw3el35jsun4o67zjplr6ihkew3wsqdk6x2gtgtnydiqt68hks1to2cv1yolj3nvlr6gxs&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2j5ma&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2j5ma&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: GavinNewsom.com
subject: $30 million.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Learn more

Folks,
One man - Charles Munger Jr. - has given $30 million to defeat the Election Rigging Response Act.
But why?
Munger is a MAGA millionaire with a history of giving to extremist causes and campaigns so it makes total sense he wants to ensure Donald Trump and Mike Johnson maintain control of the House.
**[Watch our short ad about who is funding the opposition.](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4775?t=1&akid=2532%2E4767699%2EjHAhuA)**
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/4775?t=2&akid=2532%2E4767699%2EjHAhuA)
For our side, no group or individual has contributed more than the 500,000 individual donations given by regular folks who just want to ensure Democrats have a fair chance in the next election.
Without you, we wouldn't stand a chance. Please keep it up.
Team Newsom
* * *
i️ To my fellow Democrats — don't scroll past this. 🇺🇸
I have heard the calls do "Do something!" and I agree. If Texas wants to redraw their maps, California will fight fire with fire.
God help us if we're not successful. We may have enjoyed our last free and fair election. They're redrawing districts to hold the House; going after ActBlue and Democrats' ability to fundraise; going after colleges and the free press... We have to act.
[**Please make a contribution to help us get it done. The amount isn't as important as the donation itself. I need to know you're with me as we press forward.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250913-1&refcode2=2532_4767699_jHAhuA&akid=2532%2E4767699%2EjHAhuA)

| | Hi Peter, it's LG Austin Davis. Pennsylvania is a battleground state, and on the road to 2026, we have to take that incredibly seriously. I know I do. So, I'm not thinking of 2025 as an "off-year." We have to keep up our effort to do better by our community, and that means organizing all year round, every year. And I'm not just telling you to do it, I'm doing it too. We need leaders who will stand up for working families and fight for our Democracy, because extremists are trying to tear down every possible guardrail in place. **But here's the thing: we have the opportunity to fight back and make a real difference.** I know that if we lay the groundwork now, we will be able to elect leaders who put the people first. My final mid-month fundraising deadline of the quarter is tomorrow at midnight, and your donation now will help my team meet our goal, publish a strong report at the end of the month, and keep our grassroots campaign running. My final mid-month fundraising deadline of the quarter is tomorrow at midnight, and your donation now will help my team meet our goal, publish a strong report at the end of the month, and keep our grassroots campaign running. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support! —Austin * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. Can you chip in today to help? | = = Paid for by Friends of Austin Davis Friends of Austin Davis PO Box 304 McKeesport, PA 15134 United States If you need to unsubscribe,

I don’t mess around with something as important as representing the people of North Carolina, Peter.
Every race I’ve ever run, I’ve been in it to win — even when the odds seemed long. You’ve been there with me every time, and together, we’ve succeeded. Now, this election for the U.S. Senate may be our toughest challenge yet. **[So when I ask you to split a donation between our campaign and Heartland Patriots, it’s because your contribution could make the difference between victory and defeat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94713?refcode=em20250913-9410&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9410%2E614464%2ESbdx6q)**

Dear Fellow American,

As we approach the landmark 250th birthday of our great nation in 2026, my colleagues and I at The Heritage Foundation are proud to offer a new eBook:

American Founders: Leaders at the Creation of the Republic

[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/2IOLAyI-gHRl8QLTBZZNFe0govfzqrGnVqYWcp1ylq_4-lR011To0C-MUGd6gYp5MtwFEP1sh4yxibILeNkZi98GgR0uEBoS77QfKuoSIpC6dF-guLdirP9NzvteWgWR91_uUaG8k4zBZkfpRuRSXhBxlzCTaH0rHXGMXZ-zQKoBhiEMUzhb0xBV09v2CXW8f1h8JtnbfzWc_lAuRPtKFrjGbjcI5owbNwCAaz-TdIPX1uaQlC3199oeG7PSgwyzj-dKYhjv2BO8b9_uYGnnUF-MxyidfMHLntCyFEnyXRb7YbH_g4evJm9z1TXXsQXpHbzriGq6croBRoWl2EJh0Ni6-_91k-3aGOIE8nc_JhkQUDmRrDmU2FNedipIy3908FowaCKh-yPIvm6hyEVsyJWY15awtFT71wsC8PfepnRFK3k_kN-gIZpQPkfKHydVXEezW8xYIzqTtOXSwnJ_bMLk49LuL_wbSNuB1jVLitVR2mQNg01F9-GyGFsE68Oe3D8FiyP_c3boWcwdo13iOhvmISnG5xs6Xrn4O4mCDTCnMEwxe8hLI5gpbMwL46aq8biXVGNVET0IL5TNkWjv05nXGFLyW7l0bAol9OdOgTIUFDYSHqg2mkBdrWIzq_rV9V_nyFPN96MY1lrqfNZ0FM_esUpIOXDTTxxz/z8kPWVZ01tn8mTmNrBuefESsnOzKdDiQ/12)

| | This comprehensive 300+ page guide brings to life 16 of the nation's most influential Founders--not as mythical figures, but as real statesmen confronting the immense political challenges of their time. From George Washington to Thomas Jefferson, you'll explore their pivotal decisions that laid the foundation for American liberty and self-government.

I invite you to claim your FREE copy of this insightful eBook by following the secure link below:

[**https://secured.heritage.org/american-founders-ebook/**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/HdawB4HukcmUihDBAZm3oJDIYfaLkT2rs72vuT4DWukN5ZAMgQFvF5bPjS7hBxKwYYlc_U0fmRI5BZ-nRyqvh-djXOx1DRvjSnxPW96tiGVgK0qHwtad0Mbj-uM1uykDlurrzBPs-EGQk7rFm-CBh_E6fuxcxk_UPY97ELSqQP7mJSBMIPKz1vTrUX1wRHr_Vbfu9bTj5tcJgc8DeliU5ZMGAhZg5wNQhDfmHpITpGjV_kRVPCyQAja4NmsFyOpWvA_60J7rng3FwOs0V1uNcOy_ApJNShWWEs4PyzoEt9nINOqDRXaHuhhkZXUu3aABMmR9aBcOWn3wTyeUbPTuWnTf9AVZi-f85T25Ps1NRIxtaa-NhqJgZ-zJpbJOi8xGKDNljbYBVNAvfFqsLaH96qegNNt3CkprLGJ_9ug8xuwgX-VDPQiYojVqHDJo6WXqtmcUTSRec5eM9QFp2qxiFy48vju5rKE9VQ2dqYInR1siR1ORWvANridvWiW-0nHGgdvLP6Cp0v-XnLwVc7vUuNNJNnLgEeE6eWh3wrILXyQpq1Z-DZLkehwWyt3_A2tuCJX7qJKIreIupCIav9OHlf9lj6ahMNdbmS4qHx4-nWkowQctQA5MjeYWpirhLycS05bQROCl2jIPKV-xxCM4bg_1Hh69JEsBYqL4/2fMff0ePs_OmlfriTL-y1sMXxR4STycb/12)

May this guide deepen your appreciation for the patriots whose vision and sacrifice gave us the inheritance of freedom we enjoy today.

Sincerely,

Kevin D. Roberts, Ph.D.
President, The Heritage Foundation

name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: STOP. THE. BOMBS.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
No child should fall asleep wondering if their home will still be standing in the morning. Yet US weapons are fueling that nightmare in Gaza
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)

Team —
No child should fall asleep wondering if their home will still be standing in the morning. Yet US weapons are fueling that nightmare in Gaza.
That’s why we’re proud that Ilhan is co-sponsoring the _Block the Bombs Act_ to finally end blank checks for destruction.
**[Will you add your name as an official citizen co-sponsor of the _Block the Bombs Act_? The genocide in Gaza must come to an end, and that starts with ending the flow of US weapons to the Israeli military.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-blockthebombs/?source=em250913-1-180&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-blockthebombs/?source=em250913-1-180&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)**
Friend, it’s been almost two years of constant violence, death, and destruction in Gaza. Israeli forces have proven in case after case to be guilty of war crimes, including of the greatest crime of them all: genocide and ethnic cleansing.
Some estimates show that well over 100,000 people have been killed, and according to the IDF’s own data at least 83% of those killed are confirmed to be civilians.
How many of those deaths were the result of US manufactured bombs, given to Israel with no strings attached? How many of those deaths lined the pockets of US defense contractors while making a mockery of international law?
The _Block the Bombs Act_ would prohibit the US government from selling, transferring, or exporting these bombs to Israel and finally end America’s complicity in genocide.
And ending US military aid to Israel isn’t just a way to put a limit on Israel’s bombardment — **it would be a major diplomatic coup that would put unprecedented pressure on Israel to reach a ceasefire and end the suffering.**
**[So please: Help us show a groundswell of support for the _Block the Bombs Act_ by becoming one of our citizen co-sponsors today. Your signature will be joined with thousands of others to send a message that the movement to reach a ceasefire and end the genocide and occupation of Palestine is more powerful than ever.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-blockthebombs/?source=em250913-1-180&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-sept25-blockthebombs/?source=em250913-1-180&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)**
In solidarity,
The team at Ilhan Omar for Congress

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1817_791427_ZPyd2v&akid=1817%2E791427%2EZPyd2v)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: James Talarico
subject: If we fail
body:
[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250913-ak&t=1001&akid=36%2E1347274%2E5gz89Y ]Hey, it's James. I'm barnstorming the state, so I wrote this on my
phone’s notes app. I can’t overstate how important this is. The strength
of our launch sets the tone for this race. If we demonstrate our strength,
our momentum builds on itself. More folks step up to join us. Then nobody
can write us off. The path to the Senate majority is nearly non-existent
without Texas. And I hesitate to imagine our future if we fail to give
people hope. We could lose our democracy if we can’t give folks a movement
to believe in. Right-wing politicians want us hopeless. They redraw our
maps. They attack our freedoms. They want us paralyzed with fear. But I’m
a former middle school teacher and eighth generation Texan. I don’t scare
easily. We have to give this fight everything we have. Will you make a
donation to our campaign for the U.S. Senate? We’ll put it to work
immediately to build a movement that can flip Texas.

[ https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em250913-ak&t=1002&akid=36%2E1347274%2E5gz89Y ]CONTRIBUTE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.jamestalarico.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=36%2E1347274%2E5gz89Y

clean_body: If you tried all 11 of these obvious tips already then... | | | | | | September 13th, 2025 at 06:28 PM UTC | | | | | Hey Reader, Please read this list of things that help burn fat: 1\. Cutting carbs 2\. Cutting Sugar 3\. Doing cardio 4\. Drinking more water 5\. Getting better sleep 6\. Counting calories 7\. Intermittent fasting 8\. Eat more protein 9\. Eat more fiber 10\. Count your steps 11\. Limit alcohol If you tried all 11 of these obvious tips already, then Dr. Kien Vuu explains how to get your resting metabolism up... So your body burns 52 - 89lbs of fat per year, even while you sleep. | | | MATERIAL CONNECTION DISCLOSURE: You should assume that the sender of this email has an affiliate relationship and/or another material connection to the person or businesses mentioned in this message and may receive commissions from purchases you make on subsequent web sites. body:
With a marquee gubernatorial race and a razor-thin margin in the Virginia House, the DLCC is working to secure a Democratic House of Delegates. If you want to support the DLCC’s vital work protecting and expanding Democratic majorities nationwide, chip in today. | | |
---
| |
---|---
Lowering the cost of health care. Funding our public schools. Passing gun safety measures. Investing in working families instead of handing tax breaks to the ultra-wealthy. These are just some of the common-sense, common good policies that state Democrats advance when they win elections and hold Democratic trifectas. _This November, we have an opportunity to secure a trifecta in Virginia._ With a marquee gubernatorial race and a razor-thin margin in the Virginia House, the DLCC is working to secure a Democratic House of Delegates. name: No Kings Organizing Team via Our Revolution
subject: “We don’t need an occupation”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1011&refcode=email-20250913_v&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

As Trump doubles down, insisting he can send troops to occupy *any*
American city he wants, a federal judge ruled that he broke the law by
deploying the National Guard in Los Angeles this summer. But that hasn’t
stopped him.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?source=email-20250913&t=1061&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]Headline: Trump ordering National Guard to fight crime in Baltimore,
calls city 'a hellhole'

First LA, then DC and Chicago. Now, Baltimore Mayor Brandon Scott is
standing firm and urging his community to resist this federal
intimidation. But House Speaker Mike Johnson just sent a chilling message
to Democratic mayors: “Yield, man.” In other words – fall in line, or
else.

This is authoritarianism out in the open. But we are NOT going to let
Trump and his MAGA backers take over our cities and scare us into
submission. And so Our Revolution is activating our Citizen Action Team in
cities across America to mobilize for a historic *No Kings Day* day of
protest on October 18.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250913nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]Together we’re going to flood the streets and send a clear message to
Trump: the people reject kings and the militarization of our communities.
But a massive action like this takes major resources so we can hire more
organizers, print posters, and activate new citizens across the country.
Will you chip in now to power our people-led movement to defend our
democracy?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250913nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250913nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]CHIP IN $22
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1045&express_lane=true&amount=27&refcode=email-20250913nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]CHIP IN $27 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1046&express_lane=true&amount=46&refcode=email-20250913nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]CHIP IN $46
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250913nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250913nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Right now, the stakes are higher than ever as Trump crosses new lines
every day. He’s occupying our cities. Seizing full control of every last
government agency. And his allies in Congress are running interference,
pressing local leaders to “yield.”

If we don’t meet this moment, it’s hard to even imagine what could be
next. Simply put: our democracy won’t survive unless we fight for it.

In June, 5 MILLION of us took to the streets in No Kings Day actions from
Oakland to Boston – making news, drowning out Trump’s birthday military
parade, and showing the world that democracy in America still runs
bottom-up, not top-down.

This time, we’re going to make it even bigger.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?source=email-20250913&t=1060&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]Graphic photo of the first No Kings Protest

Trump’s militarization of our streets makes it crystal clear that he wants
us afraid and silent. Instead, we’ll be *everywhere* – marching, chanting,
occupying public squares. We have organizers on the ground in Chicago,
Baltimore, and dozens of other cities, but getting people out costs money.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/29366?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250913nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=9376%2E5885482%2EK63cHH ]Will you chip in to fuel our grassroots resistance? It’s time to say NO to
kings. NO to military crackdowns. YES to communities and democracy. Please
donate now to help us make the October 18 No Kings Day a turning point in
this historic fight.

Thank you for refusing to yield.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

clean_body: [ ]Our Revolution logo Peter Willis, As Trump doubles down, insisting he can send troops to occupy any American city he wants, a federal judge ruled that he broke the law by deploying the National Guard in Los Angeles this summer. But that hasn’t stopped him. [ ]Headline: Trump ordering National Guard to fight crime in Baltimore, calls city 'a hellhole' First LA, then DC and Chicago. Now, Baltimore Mayor Brandon Scott is standing firm and urging his community to resist this federal intimidation. But House Speaker Mike Johnson just sent a chilling message to Democratic mayors: “Yield, man.” In other words – fall in line, or else. This is authoritarianism out in the open. But we are NOT going to let Trump and his MAGA backers take over our cities and scare us into submission. And so Our Revolution is activating our Citizen Action Team in cities across America to mobilize for a historic No Kings Day day of protest on October 18. [ ]Together we’re going to flood the streets and send a clear message to Trump: the people reject kings and the militarization of our communities. But a massive action like this takes major resources so we can hire more organizers, print posters, and activate new citizens across the country. Will you chip in now to power our people-led movement to defend our democracy? If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Our Revolution will process immediately. [ ]CHIP IN $9 [ ]CHIP IN $22 [ ]CHIP IN $27 [ ]CHIP IN $46 [ ]CHIP IN $66 [ ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT Right now, the stakes are higher than ever as Trump crosses new lines every day. He’s occupying our cities. Seizing full control of every last government agency. And his allies in Congress are running interference, pressing local leaders to “yield.” If we don’t meet this moment, it’s hard to even imagine what could be next. Simply put: our democracy won’t survive unless we fight for it. In June, 5 MILLION of us took to the streets in No Kings Day actions from Oakland to Boston – making news, drowning out Trump’s birthday military parade, and showing the world that democracy in America still runs bottom-up, not top-down. This time, we’re going to make it even bigger. [ ]Graphic photo of the first No Kings Protest Trump’s militarization of our streets makes it crystal clear that he wants us afraid and silent. Instead, we’ll be everywhere – marching, chanting, occupying public squares. We have organizers on the ground in Chicago, Baltimore, and dozens of other cities, but getting people out costs money. [ ]Will you chip in to fuel our grassroots resistance? It’s time to say NO to kings. NO to military crackdowns. YES to communities and democracy. Please donate now to help us make the October 18 No Kings Day a turning point in this historic fight. Thank you for refusing to yield. When we organize, we win. Trump and his MAGA allies campaigned on defending Social Security. Now they’re pushing to:

❌ Slash benefits for seniors
❌ Raise the retirement age
❌ Trade away your hard-earned savings for tax breaks for billionaires

**It’s a betrayal of their promises and a cruel attack on hardworking Americans who’ve paid into Social Security their entire lives.**

That’s why New Dems are fighting in Congress, but to stop this plan before it gains momentum, we need grassroots Democrats like you to stand with us.

**[Can you add your name before midnight to show massive opposition to MAGA’s Social Security cuts? »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115148282/569349554/840040074?refcode=NDCAF_20250913_EMPET_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjc1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYTNkMGM2MS1hZjkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-daa83N3KVpO_kgF4Zs8ayJfmjdwVxEyUssFXjTUr7k=&emci=14d01f96-918f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=aa3d0c61-af90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=48524772)**

name: Wes Moore
subject: We just launched our reelection campaign, and I’m still feeling the energy.
body:
Through all the hustle, there’s one thing that made me stop and smile.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)
Hi Peter,
We just launched our reelection campaign, and I’m still feeling the energy.
It was a whirlwind — weeks of hard work, late nights, and early mornings all built toward this moment. Through all the hustle, there’s one thing that made me stop and smile:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250913-1?refcode=em-20250913-1&refcode2=621_1086043_iCI86w&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)
Yesterday, I had the absolute joy of Facetiming a few of our Founding Donors to thank them personally. **That was the highlight of my day.**
Hearing your stories, your hopes for Maryland, and why you believe in this movement reminded me exactly why we do this work.
Peter, this campaign is a mission we’re carrying out together — Americans stepping up to serve, to lead, and to make Maryland stronger.
**But now that we’ve officially launched our reelection campaign, our mission just got a lot larger.** I already am facing Republican opponents. Those who don’t share our values will be ready to pour in resources to try and stop our progress.
**[That’s why I’m asking you to become a Founding Donor of our reelection campaign. If you contribute today, your name could end up on a list of folks I’m planning to personally FaceTime to say thank you.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250913-1?refcode=em-20250913-1&refcode2=621_1086043_iCI86w&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250913-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250913-1&refcode2=621_1086043_iCI86w&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)**
Thanks so much. It means a lot to earn your support as we kickstart this new, exciting chapter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250913-1?refcode=em-20250913-1&refcode2=621_1086043_iCI86w&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250913-1&t=2&refcode2=621_1086043_iCI86w&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=621%2E1086043%2EiCI86w)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

name: Rashida Tlaib via Justice Democrats
subject: I’m being targeted for my speech at the People’s Conference for Palestine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

I’m again facing censure in Congress because I’m Palestinian American and
I’m speaking up for the humanity of my people.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250913-rt?refcode=em20250913-37021&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37021_1203867_ykWxJF&akid=37021%2E1203867%2EykWxJF ]Photo of Rep. Rashida Tlaib at the People's Conference for Palestine

Republicans are targeting me for speaking at the People’s Conference for
Palestine, which was held recently in my home city of Detroit, Michigan.

I called out how members of Congress from both parties can make millions
of dollars investing in Palestinians’ slaughter and starvation, while
ignoring the overwhelming majority of Americans who are demanding an arms
embargo.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250913-rt?refcode=em20250913-37021&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37021_1203867_ykWxJF&akid=37021%2E1203867%2EykWxJF ]Please chip in to my campaign and Justice Democrats today to push back
against the GOP’s attempt to censure me. Let’s show them that we won’t let
them silence us or our movement to save lives, and we aren’t going
anywhere!

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250913-rt?refcode=em20250913-37021&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=37021_1203867_ykWxJF&akid=37021%2E1203867%2EykWxJF ]Split $5

At the People’s Conference for Palestine, I was honored to welcome folks,
including fellow speaker Mahmoud Khalil, to the incredible majority-Black
city that raised me and taught me how to fight for our rights.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250913-rt?refcode=em20250913-37021&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=37021_1203867_ykWxJF&akid=37021%2E1203867%2EykWxJF ]Photo of Mahmoud Khalil speaking at the People's Conference for
Palestine

I spoke about how Detroit taught me that the political structures that I
have to work in were built on slavery, genocide, rape, and oppression... and
that the people, not these institutions, will free us from ongoing
oppression.

This city sent me—the descendant of Palestinians, including my grandfather
Abdallah who wouldn’t leave his land even after being shot multiple
times—to the United States Congress to fight for freedom and justice for
all.

Palestinians’ oppressors thought they could kill us, imprison us,
violently uproot us from our homeland and our olive tree farms, starve our
children to death, and we would disappear. But guess what? Now we’re in
Congress, and we’re in every corner of the United States. Palestinians
aren’t going anywhere, and neither is our shared movement for collective
liberation.

But together, we have a lot of work to do. While continuing to enable war
crimes in Gaza, our government is turning its troops on its own people. At
this conference, I said that what our government is willing to do to
Palestinians, they are willing to do to you.

The fascist-in-chief keeps threatening to bring U.S. troops into Black-led
cities like Chicago and New Orleans (which is also a majority-Black city).
And this week, the House of Representatives just voted to pass a
nearly-trillion-dollar military budget, some of which will go toward
militarizing our cities. The Senate is set to vote next week.

No matter how much they try to repress us, we’ll keep standing up for our
shared humanity and our right to dissent.

Although Republicans keep introducing resolutions to censure me, I won’t
stay quiet and I won’t back down in the fight for freedom for all. I will
continue pushing back against state violence and pushing for a government
that actually represents the American people—who are overwhelmingly
demanding an end to genocide.

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, I’m again facing censure in Congress because I’m Palestinian American and I’m speaking up for the humanity of my people. [ ]Photo of Rep. Rashida Tlaib at the People's Conference for Palestine Republicans are targeting me for speaking at the People’s Conference for Palestine, which was held recently in my home city of Detroit, Michigan. I called out how members of Congress from both parties can make millions of dollars investing in Palestinians’ slaughter and starvation, while ignoring the overwhelming majority of Americans who are demanding an arms embargo. [ ]Please chip in to my campaign and Justice Democrats today to push back against the GOP’s attempt to censure me. Let’s show them that we won’t let them silence us or our movement to save lives, and we aren’t going anywhere! [ ]Split $5 At the People’s Conference for Palestine, I was honored to welcome folks, including fellow speaker Mahmoud Khalil, to the incredible majority-Black city that raised me and taught me how to fight for our rights. [ ]Photo of Mahmoud Khalil speaking at the People's Conference for Palestine I spoke about how Detroit taught me that the political structures that I have to work in were built on slavery, genocide, rape, and oppression... and that the people, not these institutions, will free us from ongoing oppression. This city sent me—the descendant of Palestinians, including my grandfather Abdallah who wouldn’t leave his land even after being shot multiple times—to the United States Congress to fight for freedom and justice for all. Palestinians’ oppressors thought they could kill us, imprison us, violently uproot us from our homeland and our olive tree farms, starve our children to death, and we would disappear. But guess what? Now we’re in Congress, and we’re in every corner of the United States. Palestinians aren’t going anywhere, and neither is our shared movement for collective liberation. But together, we have a lot of work to do. While continuing to enable war crimes in Gaza, our government is turning its troops on its own people. At this conference, I said that what our government is willing to do to Palestinians, they are willing to do to you. The fascist-in-chief keeps threatening to bring U.S. troops into Black-led cities like Chicago and New Orleans (which is also a majority-Black city). And this week, the House of Representatives just voted to pass a nearly-trillion-dollar military budget, some of which will go toward militarizing our cities. The Senate is set to vote next week. No matter how much they try to repress us, we’ll keep standing up for our shared humanity and our right to dissent. Although Republicans keep introducing resolutions to censure me, I won’t stay quiet and I won’t back down in the fight for freedom for all. I will continue pushing back against state violence and pushing for a government that actually represents the American people—who are overwhelmingly demanding an end to genocide. [ ]Please chip in now to stand with me against war-mongers’ attacks and the threat of censure. Together we’ll keep demanding liberation for all people. [ ]Split $5 now In solidarity, Rashida [ ]Photo of Rashida on stage Contribute to Justice Democrats:

subject: This is how we take back the House

body:
Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District.
https://ericswalwell.com [https://ericswalwell.com]
Friend -

If we want any chance of flipping the House, we need to win NY-01.

That’s where my friend Chris Gallant comes in.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-GallantSplit?&refcode=E15139-20250910-GallantSplit-SL-SplitSend&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-GallantSplit?&refcode=E15139-20250910-GallantSplit-SL-SplitSend&amount=25]

I joined Chris in Suffolk County this week for a town hall, and I saw firsthand the energy behind his campaign. Long Islanders are ready for a leader who puts service before politics.

Chris is a veteran, firefighter, air traffic controller, and union leader. Service isn’t just something he talks about — it’s what he’s lived his entire life. He’s exactly the kind of leader Long Island deserves.

Meanwhile, Nick LaLota has put Trump’s MAGA agenda over Long Islanders again and again — even voting for cuts that threaten working families.

This race is one of the most competitive in the country. If we flip NY-01, we’re one step closer to flipping the House.

Will you split a donation between my campaign and Chris Gallant’s today to help us take back the House and deliver results for working families? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ESCA-14-Email-Sept2025-FR-GallantSplit?&refcode=E15139-20250910-GallantSplit-SL-SplitSend&amount=25]

Eric Swalwell

body:

---
Hi, null! Team Haley here with a simple request: **[Will you endorse Haley Stevens before midnight tonight?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5897?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=770%2E49239%2Eaa8TUq)**
[](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5897?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=770%2E49239%2Eaa8TUq)
Adding your name will only take a few seconds, but it helps a ton – grassroots endorsements are a critical part of our strategy.

Here's why: Right now, we're statistically tied with our Republican opponent among independent voters. But we can pull ahead if everyone can see the power of this movement and the thousands of people who stand with Haley.
[**We need 5,000 endorsements by midnight. Will you be one of them, null?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5897?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=770%2E49239%2Eaa8TUq)
| | [Endorse Haley Stevens >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5897?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=770%2E49239%2Eaa8TUq)
---
Grateful for your support,

Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5897?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=770%2E49239%2Eaa8TUq) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5896?t=8&akid=770%2E49239%2Eaa8TUq)

You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: James Carville
subject: This is so damn important
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for Governor
body:
Believe me when I tell you
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115153984/569365541/-487628408?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk907-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTMzYmIxYS1iNTkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIeTzK8s9LDrx_mSxFYfcAx8BxkQQzcJhVc3FPnnBwo=)
Friend, it’s James Carville.
I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you:
**Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now.**
**[Please chip in every dollar you can spare to Sherrod and Michael Bennet's campaign. He just got back in the fight, and they need folks like you by his side ASAP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115153988/569365544/-487628408?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk907-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTMzYmIxYS1iNTkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIeTzK8s9LDrx_mSxFYfcAx8BxkQQzcJhVc3FPnnBwo=)**
We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on.
We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd!
_We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio._
Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people.
**But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win.**
**[Folks, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. But he can’t do it alone – nobody can: Will you chip in $5 or even $25 right now, split between Sherrod Brown and Michael Bennet, to power his campaign forward and send him to the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115153992/569365549/-487628408?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk907-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTMzYmIxYS1iNTkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BIeTzK8s9LDrx_mSxFYfcAx8BxkQQzcJhVc3FPnnBwo=)**

clean_body: Believe me when I tell you | | | = Friend, it’s James Carville. I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you: Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now. = We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on. We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd! We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio. Sherrod has spent his life fighting for workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people. But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Michael Bennet and Sherrod Brown: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks, James Carville | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. clean_body: | | | ** **** Recently, Trump’s BIG government launched an unprecedented attack on trans youth and gender-affirming care providers. Through subpoenas, Pam Bondi’s Department of Justice is demanding “every writing or record” from 20 gender-affirming medical providers, an invasion of privacy that could have devastating consequences for young individuals seeking necessary care. At least one of the requests seeks names and social security numbers. At Able Dems, we believe in a future where everyone, regardless of ability or identity, is included and uplifted. **If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** This unjust action is not just an attack on trans rights; it is designed to intimidate healthcare providers and institutions into abandoning their patients. It is a direct threat to our shared commitment to inclusivity and dignity for all. And it’s illegal and fascist. Thank you for standing with us. Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: VPP & Eric Swalwell
subject: RFK Jr. must go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
MAHA is a threat to public health
| Friend, where are the actions that are Making America Healthy Again?

We’re seriously asking — because what we’ve seen so far is nothing short of dangerous:
* Rollbacks on cancer and disease research.
* The removal of actual medical professionals from federal health agencies.
* Limits on testing for food-borne illnesses that put families at risk.

This isn’t a plan for health. This is sabotage.

**“MAHA” is a threat to the health and safety of every American. And at the center of it is Robert F. Kennedy Jr., whose reckless leadership is undermining science, eroding trust, and leaving our communities more vulnerable to disease and preventable illness.**

We cannot let this happen. Public health should be guided by science and expertise — not politics, conspiracy theories, or dangerous neglect.

**That’s why we’re calling for Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to be removed now.**

But to get there, we need a movement of people willing to push back against this reckless agenda and fight for leaders who will protect our families, not put them at risk. | [SAY NO TO MAHA »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93914?t=6&akid=21214%2E878179%2EWc3nzX)
---
The stakes could not be higher. Lives are on the line — and silence is not an option.
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Eric Swalwell and VPP will go through immediately:

\- The Voter Protection Project and Eric Swalwell

(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21214%2E878179%2EWc3nzX). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21214%2E878179%2EWc3nzX).**

Let’s do this,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

name: Dan Goldman
subject: When does a democracy become a dictatorship?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Did you see this, Peter? After sending the National Guard to Los Angeles and Washington, DC, **President Trump is threatening to expand his government takeover by sending military troops to other major cities, including New York City.** Let me be clear: absent an emergency and a request from a state governor, there is simply no legitimate basis to send the National Guard into any city. It is illegal, unconstitutional, and un-American. Trump’s authoritarian actions continue to escalate, especially as he tries to distract from the Epstein Files. Consider: 1) He is neutering the free press, and promoting friendly media outlets. 2) He is defunding arts and culture and usurping control of cultural institutions like the Kennedy Center and the Smithsonian. 3) He is attacking universities and academic freedom. 4) He is threatening those that can hold him accountable, including law firms and non-profit groups. 5) He is ordering the Department of Justice to investigate his enemies and exonerate his allies. 6) He is rounding up anyone who doesn’t look like him to try to remove them from the country. And now, he is sending the military into our cities. And despite these escalating attacks on our democracy, congressional Republicans do nothing to stop it. **Make no mistake: the Republicans in Congress — including New York’s seven members of the House — are fully responsible for the demise of our democracy.** So we need to hold them accountable for their complicity. **[House Republicans are too spineless to stand up to this extremism and have enabled him to disregard our Constitution. clean_body: | Did you see this, Peter? After sending the National Guard to Los Angeles and Washington, DC, President Trump is threatening to expand his government takeover by sending military troops to other major cities, including New York City. Let me be clear: absent an emergency and a request from a state governor, there is simply no legitimate basis to send the National Guard into any city. It is illegal, unconstitutional, and un-American. Trump’s authoritarian actions continue to escalate, especially as he tries to distract from the Epstein Files. Consider: 1) He is neutering the free press, and promoting friendly media outlets. 2) He is defunding arts and culture and usurping control of cultural institutions like the Kennedy Center and the Smithsonian. 3) He is attacking universities and academic freedom. 4) He is threatening those that can hold him accountable, including law firms and non-profit groups. 5) He is ordering the Department of Justice to investigate his enemies and exonerate his allies. 6) He is rounding up anyone who doesn’t look like him to try to remove them from the country. And now, he is sending the military into our cities. And despite these escalating attacks on our democracy, congressional Republicans do nothing to stop it. Make no mistake: the Republicans in Congress — including New York’s seven members of the House — are fully responsible for the demise of our democracy. So we need to hold them accountable for their complicity. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you for standing with me, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

Thanks to the Affordable Care Act, millions of families have finally been able to afford health insurance.
But here's the reality: **If Congress doesn't renew the enhanced premium tax credits, families could soon face an extra $1,300 a year just to keep their coverage.**
Senator Kirsten Gillibrand has been speaking out, because this isn't theoretical — it's a real issue for real families.
Too many people can't cover a $400 emergency. Now, imagine adding a five-figure health care bill on top of that. For working people across New York and across the country, it would be a financial disaster.
Democrats have always been the party of expanding access to affordable health care. But Republicans seem determined to undo that progress — no matter the cost to ordinary Americans.
So we need to know: [**_Do you agree that we should fight to protect affordable health care for every family?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115155333/569368941/-412716250?refcode=LOC_EM_POLL_2025.09.13_HealthCare-Poll_B1_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjUxZDkzMS1iODkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IFYvdY8xj-zz-5wZlGJEIFM14B89Bj5mCAoQkZb2Nlw=&emci=aa388072-b690-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b651d931-b890-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7659029)

body:
---
| | | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115155339/569368949/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250913_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2ZDFiNi1iMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fbSb89x7AB8tlYi1cyrFWMBUctwe8wFVQvexzIA01E=)

I needed you to hear this from me:
1\. The richest man alive, Elon Musk, [BOUGHT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115155340/569368950/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250913_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2ZDFiNi1iMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fbSb89x7AB8tlYi1cyrFWMBUctwe8wFVQvexzIA01E=) Donald Trump another term in the White House.
2\. Then, Musk helped Trump [GUT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115155341/569368951/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250913_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2ZDFiNi1iMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fbSb89x7AB8tlYi1cyrFWMBUctwe8wFVQvexzIA01E=) critical services for seniors and vulnerable Americans, while pushing for huge tax cuts for the ultra-rich like himself.
3\. Now, Musk just locked arms with Trump again by giving the wannabe dictator’s super PAC a whopping [$5 MILLION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115155342/569368952/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250913_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2ZDFiNi1iMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fbSb89x7AB8tlYi1cyrFWMBUctwe8wFVQvexzIA01E=) to hold onto power in the midterms!
_[Let me be clear: Democrats cannot let right-wing billionaires like Musk BUY Republicans another House Majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115155343/569368953/1694059021?amount=15&refcode=20250913_em_fr_b1_np4c_main_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDIvMS84ODQ2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTE2ZDFiNi1iMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9fbSb89x7AB8tlYi1cyrFWMBUctwe8wFVQvexzIA01E=)_

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Why I went to jail:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
The answer is simple.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115155800/569369838/1328794144?refcode=ea.b2677494-b990-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.b2677494-b990-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNjc3NDk0LWI5OTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kSx2d7uW8fwXZL040jvUgWnUmsMQEZQORHrZqgCtD7I=&emci=462ac21f-e18f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=b2677494-b990-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
I’ll never forget stepping out of the D.C. jail that chilly morning in 2019. I’d just been released after protesting on the steps of the Capitol for climate action. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115155801/569369839/2105508926?refcode=ea.b2677494-b990-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.b2677494-b990-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImIyNjc3NDk0LWI5OTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=kSx2d7uW8fwXZL040jvUgWnUmsMQEZQORHrZqgCtD7I=)_Photo by Victoria Pickering_ As I started to leave, a Fox TV reporter rushed over and stuck a mic in my face while his camera rolled. "Why have you done this, gone to jail?" he asked with an edge in his voice. "To get you to cover climate," I replied. **That exchange captures exactly why I've put my body on the line over and over again — to force people to pay attention to the crisis that's staring us all in the face.** But I knew that raising awareness wouldn’t be enough. The more I learned about the climate crisis, the more I realized that building a community was essential to growing the movement needed to change the way this country does business. Protesting got people’s attention. It forced conversations. But nothing is going to change at the scale we need if we don't change the people in power. That’s why I started JanePAC. My goal was to move people from concern to action, and that’s why I’m grateful to you. This community is proof that we’re not in this fight alone. Together, we’re electing candidates who aren’t afraid to take on corporate polluters. Leaders who understand that science demands urgency. Morality demands courage. And the moment demands boldness. As Trump and his MAGA allies auction off our planet to the highest bidder, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. We need to keep pushing for leaders in office who understand that the window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast. **[I may be 87 years old, but I’m not slowing down. And I hope you won’t either. We've set a goal to raise $15,000 by Monday night to power our critical work ahead, and we're counting on supporters like you to help us get there. Will you join me in this fight by chipping in whatever you can? clean_body: The answer is simple. | I’ll never forget stepping out of the D.C. jail that chilly morning in 2019. I’d just been released after protesting on the steps of the Capitol for climate action. by Victoria Pickering As I started to leave, a Fox TV reporter rushed over and stuck a mic in my face while his camera rolled. "Why have you done this, gone to jail?" he asked with an edge in his voice. "To get you to cover climate," I replied. That exchange captures exactly why I've put my body on the line over and over again — to force people to pay attention to the crisis that's staring us all in the face. But I knew that raising awareness wouldn’t be enough. The more I learned about the climate crisis, the more I realized that building a community was essential to growing the movement needed to change the way this country does business. Protesting got people’s attention. It forced conversations. But nothing is going to change at the scale we need if we don't change the people in power. That’s why I started JanePAC. My goal was to move people from concern to action, and that’s why I’m grateful to you. This community is proof that we’re not in this fight alone. Together, we’re electing candidates who aren’t afraid to take on corporate polluters. Leaders who understand that science demands urgency. Morality demands courage. And the moment demands boldness. As Trump and his MAGA allies auction off our planet to the highest bidder, we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines anymore. We need to keep pushing for leaders in office who understand that the window to prevent climate catastrophe is closing fast. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States
