body:
| | |
**Hint: it’s in your local community.****
**[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKFy15A8mFPSkUiPsO1hergSvCw2bgHmgDnfsUuOTvzxzkiNiOPcn8bZ5DTlxFyt0jFmuCbeWM4PuZjX7ec3Xw6tTv0d8C7gEpFrceroJ6lnOt6qstsob1tCnVWl5wIpAt47VEYOSXKFOlR0B08nwdwBcYdzFZhXq_Z6x9lqWK1SV1f3vDE2mLVNfD87xsgNxG9l_BOOKy0I8_xjkJDmJoskID8hifrJmJXnSDOilPL_v_2vn31j1LsF0Pj_5-j9aDuPr6pZtgxNVfYAU3tET6eM7xpkt3rGLVSxx7VUhZpXfO6zndc00R4pJy7q-yXgZVcR2pCgWk4MIiuRsTuflXlWyft4g85DCLHVVVaFCumSNtMPoAa_IVlbn_ml6eY-s/4jv/lVObpe8nTyiAJ6_PCQrarw/h0/h001.GWXoZopZ46CphqbHKn6LsYpZByd_VjeG96fKkD3YSqI) [**Chip in to help Local Democracy Project and School Board Integrity Project defend the frontlines!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKFy15A8mFPSkUiPsO1hergSvCw2bgHmgDnfsUuOTvzxzkiNiOPcn8bZ5DTlxFyt1Aw9AfazvQHwtigjMHi6c3RdGkXirqfa0CiBp-8geDVRnaa5sRk19fDhcg21tyj4nzuinGeP0gt8TU5-aj72xnM7y_6lvZSsn2-ve86QAV_nsCV11plfh6rba1QTfqH0AUmy3ISNfejL-EOfIcUaBMlqotz8nhwewWvpKCuhxGwnDq5D9xpWDsiSDe--fcKoCIkGTgENEEnIs9Ul0oh9B6GhKaNoBYXLabkFfTKYiPB3GkQkzJVgzUsaxZXT5bf9Q_PqFq1vWpP66J4t_Tqc0Qe2KiydJ1anAdBj9J2lBZNhaz0Lth75oEjDkzy4jdGh8/4jv/lVObpe8nTyiAJ6_PCQrarw/h1/h001.AoHq9HaT_r2HWyxkddfK8whNOKHOHBZf6orzfeWqHeQ)
* * *
School board elections aren’t sleepy local affairs anymore, they’re the frontline of our democracy. Our partner in defending democracy, Kyrstin Schuette, founder of the School Board Integrity Project, lays it out clearly in her urgent piece: [“The Overlooked Frontline of Democracy.” ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3sQOyMl4UlXepRfF2TJOzqI_AMdU_LG7enr1sJAfUCpJmOEO7RQBvmcBzCByR7Ts03m4yW0byc-0PK54aTKBDJYMdFaqsuf2jtT321KU_knHYpGvYFi6h8SLp0FUxxuuh3yRzRUE_rj10w3E9joZvk1JrqNhCmROZZKXVq7aqnCXdGBtZWodW7F3ykwHAJ_1qw35SSqQ_VGNZpBGMEoeQJiXYCMhSxk8zsjSIcEvl7vZ_Blrh31woTxGfu7958wd38wS0j8HE1ns5Y4VqXRV-3vG_OJjN0FL2MmZbw_1RpblEhLO2Ps2Ur94eweYaWLgwseuOS54YEoo64Cm-hpBQjT8HLv6voqP7Y0XHTcsUh0jtYcbQlt2pMhn-QWIji1OHPA/4jv/lVObpe8nTyiAJ6_PCQrarw/h2/h001.d-6ZQUiWluzYn3M8gpkQLw1Ax6JI6_6jRXiyZU91cv4) Here’s the truth: Extremist groups are targeting school boards to control what our kids learn, muzzle teachers, and intimidate community voices. _If they win locally, they shape the future nationally._ That’s why we are monthly sustainers of the School Board Integrity Project, and it’s __ why Local Democracy Project is all-in on rebuilding and restoring democracy from the ground up: training candidates, mobilizing neighbors, and defending fair, transparent local governance. **But we can’t do it alone. We need to meet the moment with urgency and resources.** [**Will you split a donation to help us recruit and train local champions, counter disinformation, and protect open, accountable school boards AND help Kyrstin’s team defend integrity where it matters most - in our classrooms and communities.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKFy15A8mFPSkUiPsO1hergSvCw2bgHmgDnfsUuOTvzxzkiNiOPcn8bZ5DTlxFyt13eaateRYOCrPG0K74nS3Io8a5ygh3uIf5YQaSL_nqewas3Xh9d2QmSW8Jnf2DJ5bEfpNB1vikKQBZO_U-RdsbueotAR8nWwZ8hgDl4YFNqEz82SlHzxsPOZZ2YVDAd0Bx05kAb__ia-HlCmylOaxWOlxuBqE-vcBelrSv0asqz1Oc3XHVppQwF4RMreU-3On-OmyKzlNCfrSOFWf8MIA2sH0I4TH87Xa0K-Y6HpkdzdRujCwrDjj81JkVt8So2VDoqUeji3gNDRH0gnKgcNBmSvIGytCLuPkGIxBeGlWTdNFW84sJ_dgiRptKRHO_76E/4jv/lVObpe8nTyiAJ6_PCQrarw/h3/h001.vGscCqemLDJGsCnmf2-x6cSA6YZlB73WXw_MtjpZw1w) **** [Split a Donation
](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKFy15A8mFPSkUiPsO1hergSvCw2bgHmgDnfsUuOTvzxzkiNiOPcn8bZ5DTlxFyt0mrE-p1t_3cmGhasjEN1Gl9ueUzLD6A0mF-pCMdqI9ZOuHzTzD6UUi8VxOojbtGDKIfGO6Tfvu7Jb_v7EjK0yvlPSW00sbVplX3Vo0igCepGXcEPMTvGmAKmIoA-8b9Sip6ndv2SEH0x4bQQrj1f-3mnuZDwkuOxyI5rJraUgzkeSyKdQ7C4oN-qu1edNPBjKwVIu_tIxiQid4RBuFFo0G1_ZNQzcEUTfdHbtcGxY83Pdqpui_kuCLcAEXgFfGF6CpPMduSH-lhnv45pyMI1PPm4a7NQpJBgzZn5mLWSMQ0yWwmKFwIgIUsPIVvoOH7mA/4jv/lVObpe8nTyiAJ6_PCQrarw/h4/h001.bDrfBo-jgtPOLJCEgrmpVyvmpuoHONoLqgfwwB51XF8) **** This is the kind of work that stops anti-democratic power grabs before they spread. If you want a stronger, fairer future for our kids and our country, it starts at the school board meeting down the street. **Restoring and rebuilding our democracy is not a spectator sport and we need democracy defenders like you, Peter supporting the team.** [**Split a donation today between Local Democracy Project and the School Board Integrity Project. Every dollar you give equips real people to stand up, run, win, and govern with integrity.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquKFy15A8mFPSkUiPsO1hergSvCw2bgHmgDnfsUuOTvzxzkiNiOPcn8bZ5DTlxFyt0qrlLEzikT-ORqFoE81ZrPYdX_uK3b09aG7ZkPVSNBFSwrKFNagC671PB6erG0ezofMuovD6BdUJYShjTgnVUQvC58peHJfuUT52hcm53KZ7vbP2xBNFBkW_o_BDJoJ8AioMGWtTnmCIYM-f26L1COpZ4rvybukDaP5EW_AW3G7WvD6lLvLJtmK_W8o2dgTIyM6oDuTYTgLt-nrixTbAX7Ou8El4OY3DMrsQ222ugrkLrbltp4YW5-_24OgkqEPnd8MKLQ80TZkLmNx04cn2Q_iTRMoN9kDIoyZxPDVISpLVXNcgmqNFaU9VNCwrwQhhw/4jv/lVObpe8nTyiAJ6_PCQrarw/h5/h001.6xpBF_4fmQQ9_v-gGWVC2VZXsgSdayX3jF5Ohf_RjOA) Democracy is local. Let’s defend it together. -Local Democracy Project

clean_body: | | | Hint: it’s in your local community. School board elections aren’t sleepy local affairs anymore, they’re the frontline of our democracy. Our partner in defending democracy, Kyrstin Schuette, founder of the School Board Integrity Project, lays it out clearly in her urgent piece: Here’s the truth: Extremist groups are targeting school boards to control what our kids learn, muzzle teachers, and intimidate community voices. If they win locally, they shape the future nationally. That’s why we are monthly sustainers of the School Board Integrity Project, and it’s why Local Democracy Project is all-in on rebuilding and restoring democracy from the ground up: training candidates, mobilizing neighbors, and defending fair, transparent local governance. But we can’t do it alone. We need to meet the moment with urgency and resources. This is the kind of work that stops anti-democratic power grabs before they spread. If you want a stronger, fairer future for our kids and our country, it starts at the school board meeting down the street. Restoring and rebuilding our democracy is not a spectator sport and we need democracy defenders like you, Peter supporting the team.** Democracy is local. Let’s defend it together. -Local Democracy Project supports down-ballot races and empowering communities across the country. We’re rebuilding democracy from the ground up. To donate by check, please mail to: Local Democracy Project PO Box 720800 Pinion Hills, CA 92372 Paid for by Local Democracy Project. name: Tim Walz
subject: Science over extremism: protect vaccines now
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
Here’s what it means to look out for your neighbors.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115161968/569388947/-613920475?source=em250913ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxNTE5Zi1jMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_vDTKfW8hC1bCFM7uOOBIQ1W89-r3Gg3bxpLSAYEkc=&emci=e3c1519f-c390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e6c1519f-c390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11244133)

Peter,

Vaccines are one of the greatest achievements in modern medicine. They save lives, keep our communities safe, and are a cornerstone of science-driven public health.
But the Trump administration — under the guidance of extremists like Robert F. Kennedy Jr. — is working to roll back access to vaccines and undermine science-based health policy. These changes risk creating confusion, barriers, and fear at a time when we need clarity and trust in public health.
That’s why I signed an executive order to ensure Minnesotans can continue to access vaccines — guided by science, not politics. Minnesota will not let extremism dictate whether families can protect themselves and their loved ones.
But I need you with me. If we’re going to push back against dangerous misinformation and protect public health, we must show broad public support to protect everyone in our communities.
[**I need to know you’re with me in this fight – add your name to stand with me in defending science and rejecting extremism.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115161971/569388950/-613920475?source=em250913ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxNTE5Zi1jMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_vDTKfW8hC1bCFM7uOOBIQ1W89-r3Gg3bxpLSAYEkc=&emci=e3c1519f-c390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e6c1519f-c390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11244133)
| | **[ADD YOUR NAME>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115161974/569388957/-613920475?source=em250913ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNmMxNTE5Zi1jMzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e_vDTKfW8hC1bCFM7uOOBIQ1W89-r3Gg3bxpLSAYEkc=&emci=e3c1519f-c390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=e6c1519f-c390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=11244133)**

Together, we can show the rest of the country what it means to put people’s health and safety first.
Thank you for taking action,

Governor Tim Walz

name: Art Mitchell, AOTL
subject: We’re fighting like hell in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
We’re fighting on all fronts to stop the attacks on fair representation
|
---

Peter —
In Texas, our movement is fighting like hell to block the state’s new, outrageously and racially gerrymandered congressional map.
Before the map was even signed by the governor, our affiliate filed a lawsuit showing that it is racially discriminatory — a flagrant example of race-based redistricting designed to dilute the power of Black and Latino voters.
How flagrant? **To equal the voting power of one white voter in Texas, it would take _three_ Latino voters or _five_ Black voters. **Based on their share of the population, Texas Latinos would be the most underrepresented minority in all 50 states.
We’re not going to let this mid-decade racial gerrymander stand without a fight. And their scheme to dilute our voting power won’t stop with Texas, but is rapidly expanding throughout the country. Missouri just passed its own extreme gerrymander, and Ohio will propose its own redraw in a matter of weeks.
[**Alongside our affiliates, we are doing everything we can to stop this assault on fair representation wherever it arises: in the courtroom, in state houses, or arm-in-arm with communities standing up for fair maps. Your contribution right now will go right to work fighting for fair representation and to preserve our fragile democracy.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115162035/569389451/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FightingTX_email_20250913-AOTL-Tier1-FightingTX-AM_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250913-AOTL-Tier1-FightingTX-AM_&utm_campaign=FightingTX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyNTU4MjE3LWMzOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V1dD8X_m5VppWMXUz-KPzoChiUFp5gFVuFjnSlZE-KA=)
Here’s why it’s particularly ugly for the Texas legislature to try to roll back the political power of minority voters:
Nearly 60% of Texans are people of color, and 95% of the state’s population growth in the past decade has come from those communities. It seems that some extreme politicians in the state have decided that if they can’t win their support at the polls, they need to slash their voting power instead.
Make no mistake: we won’t stop fighting back against extreme racial gerrymandering like this — we’re on a mission to ensure voters everywhere have the ability to elect candidates of their choice.
**Together, we are empowering voters across the country to make their voices heard.[Donate now to ensure we can keep fighting — and winning — wherever there are threats to fairness in our democracy.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115162036/569389452/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_FightingTX_email_20250913-AOTL-Tier1-FightingTX-AM_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250913-AOTL-Tier1-FightingTX-AM_&utm_campaign=FightingTX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyNTU4MjE3LWMzOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V1dD8X_m5VppWMXUz-KPzoChiUFp5gFVuFjnSlZE-KA=)**
We’ll keep you posted on the latest in Texas and beyond,
Art
Deputy Director of Litigation & Policy
All On The Line

[All On The Line](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115162037/569389453/-1578943632?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEyNTU4MjE3LWMzOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=V1dD8X_m5VppWMXUz-KPzoChiUFp5gFVuFjnSlZE-KA=&emci=71a44018-1590-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=a2558217-c390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045) is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. body:
Making sure you saw Gabe’s message.

Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. Did you catch Gabe’s message? Republicans aren’t waiting — they’ve already poured more than $500,000 in outside spending into this race, funding attack ads and other efforts, all before even announcing their nominee. **That’s not great news for us**. They’re trying to define this race early, drown out our message, and box us in before we’ve even had a fair shot. We cannot let them build momentum while we fall behind. **_That’s why our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal is so important_**. National Republicans will be watching closely to see if we have the resources to stand up to the nominee they pick. If we fall short, they’ll see it as a green light to spend even more. We can’t afford to show weakness — **especially not now**. **\---------- Forwarded message from Gabe ----------**
It’s Gabe.
Over the past few weeks, the attacks on our campaign have ramped up — and one thing is clear: Mike Johnson and his Republican allies are dead set on launching a full scale attack on our campaign and hand-picking a MAGA nominee to flip NM-02.
One word that keeps popping up in their attacks? _Vulnerable_.
And I’ve got to be honest with you: for once, they’re telling the truth. I am vulnerable if we don’t raise the money it takes to WIN.
They’ve got billionaire donors and unlimited dark money behind them, and I’m one of the few members of Congress that isn’t wealthy and doesn’t trade stocks.
If the last two elections taught me anything about running a race in New Mexico’s 2nd District, it’s that **we can win this together**.
Grassroots supporters like you have had my back every step of the way — and now, as we prepare to take on whoever the GOP throws at us, **I need you again**.
We’ve set a **$10,000 mid-month fundraising goal** to make a strong showing on our public Q3 FEC report. Republicans, journalists, and potential donors will use this report to gauge whether we have the strength to hold this seat — and if we come up short, it sends the wrong message.
So help us send the right message to Mike Johnson and his rich friends: We’re not backing down. **We’re not intimidated. And we’re not going anywhere**.

clean_body: Making sure you saw Gabe’s message. Gabe Vasquez won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022. He's running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Did you catch Gabe’s message? Republicans aren’t waiting — they’ve already poured more than $500,000 in outside spending into this race, funding attack ads and other efforts, all before even announcing their nominee. That’s not great news for us. They’re trying to define this race early, drown out our message, and box us in before we’ve even had a fair shot. We cannot let them build momentum while we fall behind. That’s why our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal is so important. National Republicans will be watching closely to see if we have the resources to stand up to the nominee they pick. If we fall short, they’ll see it as a green light to spend even more. We can’t afford to show weakness — especially not now. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = \---------- Forwarded message from Gabe ---------- It’s Gabe. Over the past few weeks, the attacks on our campaign have ramped up — and one thing is clear: Mike Johnson and his Republican allies are dead set on launching a full scale attack on our campaign and hand-picking a MAGA nominee to flip NM-02. One word that keeps popping up in their attacks? Vulnerable. And I’ve got to be honest with you: for once, they’re telling the truth. I am vulnerable if we don’t raise the money it takes to WIN. They’ve got billionaire donors and unlimited dark money behind them, and I’m one of the few members of Congress that isn’t wealthy and doesn’t trade stocks. If the last two elections taught me anything about running a race in New Mexico’s 2nd District, it’s that we can win this together. Grassroots supporters like you have had my back every step of the way — and now, as we prepare to take on whoever the GOP throws at us, I need you again. We’ve set a $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal to make a strong showing on our public Q3 FEC report. Republicans, journalists, and potential donors will use this report to gauge whether we have the strength to hold this seat — and if we come up short, it sends the wrong message. So help us send the right message to Mike Johnson and his rich friends: We’re not backing down. We’re not intimidated. And we’re not going anywhere. = If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Gabe | | | ---|---|--- = Together, we flipped NM-02 in 2022. Now, Gabe is busy in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, economic opportunity, affordable healthcare, and the best interests of the people. Gabe won the most competitive Democratic seat in Congress in 2022, and is running to be a champion for working families and build an economy that benefits everyone.** | = = Paid for by Gabe Vasquez for Congress Gabe Vasquez for Congress Drawer L Mesilla, NM 88046 United States If you would like to unsubscribe, click here: To receive less email from Gabe Vasquez for Congress, . You can also =.

name: Guy Short, Founder of The Flyover
subject: The #1 question
body:
**How do I get a return on my investment in The Flyover**?

| | |
---
| | |
# SATURDAY, SEPTEMBER 13, 2025
---|---
**Dear Reader,** The most common question I get is simple: "**How do I get a return on my investment in _The Flyover_?"** It's the right question to ask. And while all investments carry risk, here's why _The Flyover_ is different:
* We're already profitable after just two years (Most start-ups never become profitable).
* We operate with 80% gross margins and 24% net income (Great margins).
* That puts _The Flyover_ in the top 1% of media start-ups (Top 1%!).

The three most common ways [investors can realize returns](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0Ltu6zAMBuCnkbcEsijfBg0Hx_CWZinQUVAkOlahS2rTCfr2hdskU8fOH_mD_N8O-mB88On8YiIqGrN26Lw1hE4nvC0BiXDWNGH5seJCPictuKh2vNuVoP8P4xpC_1yRhVMjokAoUJVN1TQtQFsXkxIAErmwp7aueDNCZ-RoT21btRKcODWFV1su70ooG97Jai8BOqyEBSe4cVYyydF5yvP-PftEE47hM19x3tsci6AmosvC4B8TAxODT1dc6JfJjWFYKeolr7NFBv3zfCbqDSI6v0YG_fGW0O0O6Ly5kzXxYvw5MeiHn8wH5ESYiEH_qOkOhPMW9Toce92VIKpiVu5y8yH4pW6Y5OdofPj-gf6i_6sSXwEAAP__Jn2dbw) are:
1. **A Sale:** A larger media company or strategic partner could acquire _The Flyover_. (If that day comes, we'd only partner with those who share our standards. CNN or New York Times need not apply.)
2. **Public Listing:** The future could include listing shares on a stock exchange, giving investors freedom to buy and sell.
3. **Profit Distributions** (Dividends): Because we're profitable now, unlike most start-ups, dividends are a [real possibility](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0Ltu6zAMBuCnkbcEsijfBg0Hx_CWZinQUVAkOlahS2rTCfr2hdskU8fOH_mD_N8O-mB88On8YiIqGrN26Lw1hE4nvC0BiXDWNGH5seJCPictuKh2vNuVoP8P4xpC_1yRhVMjokAoUJVN1TQtQFsXkxIAErmwp7aueDNCZ-RoT21btRKcODWFV1su70ooG97Jai8BOqyEBSe4cVYyydF5yvP-PftEE47hM19x3tsci6AmosvC4B8TAxODT1dc6JfJjWFYKeolr7NFBv3zfCbqDSI6v0YG_fGW0O0O6Ly5kzXxYvw5MeiHn8wH5ESYiEH_qOkOhPMW9Toce92VIKpiVu5y8yH4pW6Y5OdofPj-gf6i_6sSXwEAAP__Jn2dbw).

To recap: **Sale. Listing. Distributions.** Here is what's important: While _the Flyover_ offering is technically open to anyone, it is our #1 goal to [fill this round](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0Ltu6zAMBuCnkbcEsijfBg0Hx_CWZinQUVAkOlahS2rTCfr2hdskU8fOH_mD_N8O-mB88On8YiIqGrN26Lw1hE4nvC0BiXDWNGH5seJCPictuKh2vNuVoP8P4xpC_1yRhVMjokAoUJVN1TQtQFsXkxIAErmwp7aueDNCZ-RoT21btRKcODWFV1su70ooG97Jai8BOqyEBSe4cVYyydF5yvP-PftEE47hM19x3tsci6AmosvC4B8TAxODT1dc6JfJjWFYKeolr7NFBv3zfCbqDSI6v0YG_fGW0O0O6Ly5kzXxYvw5MeiHn8wH5ESYiEH_qOkOhPMW9Toce92VIKpiVu5y8yH4pW6Y5OdofPj-gf6i_6sSXwEAAP__Jn2dbw) with as many _Flyover_ readers as possible. _The Flyover_ exists because of you--and we want to own it with you. Over the last few years I've gotten to know countless _Flyover_ readers - and y'all are salt of the earth. There is nobody I'd rather partner with. We've already welcomed more than 1,225 Flyover investors, and together we've raised **$1.87 million of the $5 million total**. That means we're just **$130,000 away from our $2 million goal.** Why is $2 million an important goal? Because after we reach $2 million, the 5% bonus shares will no longer be available. But readers who [invest right now](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0Ltu6zAMBuCnkbcEsijfBg0Hx_CWZinQUVAkOlahS2rTCfr2hdskU8fOH_mD_N8O-mB88On8YiIqGrN26Lw1hE4nvC0BiXDWNGH5seJCPictuKh2vNuVoP8P4xpC_1yRhVMjokAoUJVN1TQtQFsXkxIAErmwp7aueDNCZ-RoT21btRKcODWFV1su70ooG97Jai8BOqyEBSe4cVYyydF5yvP-PftEE47hM19x3tsci6AmosvC4B8TAxODT1dc6JfJjWFYKeolr7NFBv3zfCbqDSI6v0YG_fGW0O0O6Ly5kzXxYvw5MeiHn8wH5ESYiEH_qOkOhPMW9Toce92VIKpiVu5y8yH4pW6Y5OdofPj-gf6i_6sSXwEAAP__Jn2dbw) will still receive **up to 10% bonus shares** --and once we hit $2 million, 5% of that perk goes away. This will most likely be next week. Will you be one of the readers who helps us reach $2 million? [**Invest in _The_ _Flyover_ today**](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJys0Ltu6zAMBuCnkbcEsijfBg0Hx_CWZinQUVAkOlahS2rTCfr2hdskU8fOH_mD_N8O-mB88On8YiIqGrN26Lw1hE4nvC0BiXDWNGH5seJCPictuKh2vNuVoP8P4xpC_1yRhVMjokAoUJVN1TQtQFsXkxIAErmwp7aueDNCZ-RoT21btRKcODWFV1su70ooG97Jai8BOqyEBSe4cVYyydF5yvP-PftEE47hM19x3tsci6AmosvC4B8TAxODT1dc6JfJjWFYKeolr7NFBv3zfCbqDSI6v0YG_fGW0O0O6Ly5kzXxYvw5MeiHn8wH5ESYiEH_qOkOhPMW9Toce92VIKpiVu5y8yH4pW6Y5OdofPj-gf6i_6sSXwEAAP__Jn2dbw) Sincerely,
Guy Short
Founder, The Flyover
* * *
|

name: Team DLCC
subject: Would you chip in $7 if you knew?
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
What if we told you we can’t secure victories in upcoming elections without you on our grassroots team? | | |
---
| |
---|---
**With just three days until our next special election, is there anything we can say to convince you to**[make a $7 gift to support state Democrats across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDFSMauhu6y669kwgxpsLsO3sm7eq1zDZ8h8AbNz11BrFr40viBiBElnwSHsZN1gy0UBHm33IARpWDSboZy1cJgvPhFll2d8bhdYSbCyaj9dkSIy-FCDhwMJVB_kYLfIOI0Oov7PzPpojmrx3GCUx4ANKiZXlO28y48L1ztAUn9f2iWrU-7AIDLSlvBbxLGI8u3RSDZLtL4AiLSDMM_lZXmoDrHoeKnUj6puP8NCjaVrbGtfLYPCLldZ7QBY1qX0YGzJxAn3dwAYXA0QTkA2TtSRQZVKjonyY_3WtqvJl_GchlvaIzaP20DlBPZPPgQ5Grw5lKu_lFmUU9565HQWwYW1sfSGrX_wvlD2GsUhedcLWvIHhUFCptheAUXPf6fvheAuZs7kiuDAz9RScev4OXsRJ81Csj0G1dsq21LjKGfn0CYG6JdGqkKAVkYQpdb5dgQGOCjFDAmPSCZ2YTguBTUy-_O5YDgmPhll9ZYoePlRQA--b7bNgTsPnoftnDzQGd7DLWiBfAtrIvQS7aRnrFIcPVa5S5dMZC58knXloGO-h2aSMHjeZhXo9vxgceJbJt/4jv/kt82qOQTQ_ie-qdYeicgdw/h0/h001.yRvKkZI_28fG28rZnmHzho2AqjQnCyCeBevF88ED4Dw) What if we told you state Democrats are facing over 200 elections in the next few months? What if we told you state legislators will have a role in drawing more than 300 congressional districts and nearly 6,000 legislative districts – and that expanding Democratic majorities gives our party the power to protect our democracy? name: Katie Porter
subject: I will be a housing governor.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40141%2E3422442%2EMc9bEy)
Peter,
To bring down costs for families, we need to address the high cost of housing. For most Californians, it is their #1 monthly expense.
**Yet, too few of our politicians are making housing their #1 issue.**
California is on track to lose Congressional seats. We are aging as a state where young people can’t afford to stay—all because we aren't building housing.
California should be a place where graduates, seniors, families and workers can afford to live and thrive. That will take building much more housing, much quicker.
Every part of California needs to do their part on housing. For cities in California that want to grow, for cities that want to attract jobs and businesses, they need to have enough housing that workers can afford.
It’s one of my top priorities to make California the place of choice for our next generation of workers, while making sure it’s a place our long-time Californians can retire in and thrive. And to do that we need more housing.
I am going to be a housing governor. I’ll bring together workers, businesses, labor, and consumers to get it done—and lower costs.
**[But first I need your help to win next year so I can do this critical work. Can you chip in $5 today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250913_1_ak?refcode=em20250913-40141&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40141_3422442_Mc9bEy&akid=40141%2E3422442%2EMc9bEy)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250913_1_ak?refcode=em20250913-40141&refcode2=40141_3422442_Mc9bEy&akid=40141%2E3422442%2EMc9bEy)
More soon,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250913-40141&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40141_3422442_Mc9bEy&akid=40141%2E3422442%2EMc9bEy)**

* **TOP NEWS**

**" Texas AG is caught in shocking sex scandal as details of secret affair with married Christian influencer mom-of-seven are exposed," **Daily Mail's **MaryAnn Martinez** \-- "Texas's controversial Attorney General has been caught in a shocking sex scandal - less than two years after cheating on his wife with his mistress.

The Daily Mail can exclusively reveal **Ken Paxton** , 62, was secretly seeing a married Christian influencer behind the backs of both their partners.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/a932a42f-ae44-4062-8c76-5f9fd444a723?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/a932a42f-ae44-4062-8c76-5f9fd444a723?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Multiple sources confirm mother-of-seven **Tracy Duhon** , 57, who is also an author, is the reason the politician's relationship crumbled earlier this summer.

Texas State Senator **Angela Paxton** announced in July their 38-year marriage was over in a stinging tweet, citing 'biblical grounds'.

It is not the first time Ken Paxton has been rocked by scandal, having been caught cheating on Angela in 2023 with his former mistress**Laura Olsen**.

He was impeached by the state house, accused of misusing his office and taking bribes while trying to get a job for his lover, allegations he denied all along and was acquitted of in the state senate.

His wife stood by him through that first scandal.

But the latest incident with Duhon appears to have been the last straw, and could threaten Paxton's latest bid to become a US senator.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/219fee9a-780a-4230-abf7-9dcdb0a480f0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_With her then-husband Troy Duhon standing between them, Tracy Duhon (right) and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton (left) pose for a photo at the Kentucky Derby in May 2024_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d1ab5a18-e4a2-467c-9c2b-72ae4b643df7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_The Daily Mail can exclusively reveal Ken Paxton, 62, was secretly seeing a married Christian influencer Tracy Duhon (pictured) behind the backs of his wife and her husband_

The romance between Duhon and Paxton started after the pair met at the Kentucky Derby last year, multiple sources revealed.

Since May 2024, the lovers have had multiple rendezvous on trips across the country and even overseas, according to insiders.

The getaways were essential to keeping the entanglement secret as both were married at the time, the sources said.

On social media, Duhon bragged about her 27-year marriage to**Troy Duhon** , the wealthy owner of 39 car dealerships.

A New Orleans native, Duhon keeps a very active social media presence, discussing the power of prayer, and advising others on how to navigate death and other difficult times of their lives.

[On her website](https://substack.com/redirect/4b3de550-b3d8-4a36-979f-ea27400d73cb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Duhon shares she lost two babies who died the day they were born in separate pregnancies.

Her faith and grief counseling are the subject of her book When Hope is all you Have.

'[Paxton is] enamored with her face. He's enamored with her story of overcoming adversity - she's lost two children. He's enamored with her faith,' one source explained.

The source claims Paxton has a 'sincere' affection for her and believes she could be the second major relationship in his life.

Despite their best efforts to keep their relationship under wraps, Paxton's wife learned her husband was cheating again earlier this year, another source said.

Even though the Paxtons had not lived together since the summer of 2024, learning about Duhon made the arrangement between Angela and Paxton untenable, sources explained.

Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and his wife Angela married in 1986 after meeting at Baylor University, a Baptist university located in Waco, Texas

The Duhons finalized their divorce three weeks ago, a source confirmed to the Daily Mail, adding that Tracy met Paxton at the Kentucky Derby in May 2024.

They stayed under the same roof at the home of a mutual friend who hosted them for the event.

In July, two months after the Derby, Tracy filed for divorce, the informant stated.

[In an epic tweet](https://substack.com/redirect/edf15047-7879-460f-aded-94814e9d4c97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), Texas State Senator Angela announced the end of her 38-year marriage in July, dumping her husband, who has renewed political aspirations.

'Today, after 38 years of marriage, I filed for divorce on biblical grounds,' she [announced to the world on X](https://substack.com/redirect/bc7c3858-68d3-40fb-9776-0653e83e6b06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) July 10.

'...in light of recent discoveries, I do not believe that it honors God or is loving to myself, my children, or Ken to remain in the marriage.'

A public official in her own right, Angela, represents the Dallas suburb of McKinney in the Texas Senate.

She accused Ken of 'adultery' in court filings according to [KUT News](https://substack.com/redirect/20bd232e-9252-4f66-be00-586b8b6c6f42?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), however their divorce records have now been sealed.

On her website, Tracy Duhon shares a personal story about two of her children dying at birth

Ken Paxton, a staunch ally of **Donald Trump** , has hitched his wagon to the MAGA movement, becoming one of the fiercest defenders of the President.

Last year, he decided to try and unseat long-time Senator **John Cornyn** , considered a more establishment Republican.

Now both office holders are desperately trying to convince conservative voters they are the purest incarnation of the GOP.

Both Paxton and Cornyn are appealing to conservatives who rank Christianity and family values as top priorities.

Prior to news of the Paxton divorce, the MAGA Attorney General was ahead by as many as 16 points with conservative voters in the Lone Star State.

Polling in the weeks after Angela announced the affair shows [Cornyn and Paxton in a dead heat](https://substack.com/redirect/6ddbdeda-8464-4644-93d0-3b706c38e28f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).

Cornyn certainly believes the Duhon affair is a game changer, repeatedly attacking Paxton on the issue.

The sitting senator could not resist the opportunity to stick it to Paxton as news of a tech CEO who was caught [cheating on his wife at a Coldplay concert ](https://substack.com/redirect/4bb9ba14-847f-4a2a-a70e-9a81b00d9cbe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)went viral.

'Good news for @kenpaxtontx,' [Cornyn posted to X](https://substack.com/redirect/402bdb7a-daf1-4d5a-bea7-8ba2027a38f7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), sharing a parody tweet joking the band would no longer be showing candid camera shots of their audience.

Cornyn also launched a new attack ad in July, calling out Paxton for his [affair with Laura Olson](https://substack.com/redirect/c65affcb-981b-4b6d-ba70-e8ad9b80bd82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) \- whose identity was first revealed by Texas Bureau Chief **MaryAnn Martinez**.

Olson became the focus when the attorney general was impeached by both Republicans and Democrats in the Texas House on allegations of corruption.

Lone Star members of the House alleged that Paxton used his position as the top law enforcer in the state to get bribes and donations.

One top donor, **Nate Paul** , was singled out as paying for access to the attorney general's office.

Earlier this year, [Paul pleaded guilty](https://substack.com/redirect/793aed06-80c1-4391-b7c2-6676e58b54eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to a lesser charge of making false statements to a financial institution in exchange for other federal charges being dropped. He was fined $1million and sentenced to five years' supervised release.

When Paxton's affair with Olson became known, Paxton asked Paul to hire her at one of his Austin companies, lawmakers accused the attorney general.

The allegation of the quid pro quo is what resulted in Paxton's historic impeachment, with bi-partisan votes.

During the vote in the House, which was broadcasted live on TV, Paxton allegedly texted members of the House to threaten them if they voted to impeach him.

'I would like to point out that several members of this House, while on the floor of this House doing the state's business, received telephone calls from General Paxton personally, threatening them with political consequences in our next election,' Rep. **Charlie Geren** said during the proceedings.

Paxton was eventually acquitted after a trial in the state senate and returned to his office. If he had been found guilty, he would have lost his job as attorney general.

Angela sat through his trial at the senate every day, listening to details of his affair with Olson, even on the days her husband did not show up. She recused herself from voting.

Olson was called to the State Capitol to testify, but never actually took the stand.

When asked about Duhon being his mistress, Paxton did not address the claim but attacked the Daily Mail and vowed to take on the 'deranged radical Left' with Trump.

When the Daily Mail reached out to Duhon, she hung up after learning she was on the phone with a reporter.

She did not respond to text messages seeking further comment. Angela Paxton declined to comment through a spokesman." [Daily Mail](https://substack.com/redirect/86d985e2-c371-4e95-b6c5-6b8b38dd384b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS " Texas AG is caught in shocking sex scandal as details of secret affair with married Christian influencer mom-of-seven are exposed," Daily Mail's MaryAnn Martinez \-- "Texas's controversial Attorney General has been caught in a shocking sex scandal - less than two years after cheating on his wife with his mistress. The Daily Mail can exclusively reveal Ken Paxton , 62, was secretly seeing a married Christian influencer behind the backs of both their partners. Multiple sources confirm mother-of-seven Tracy Duhon , 57, who is also an author, is the reason the politician's relationship crumbled earlier this summer. Texas State Senator Angela Paxton announced in July their 38-year marriage was over in a stinging tweet, citing 'biblical grounds'. It is not the first time Ken Paxton has been rocked by scandal, having been caught cheating on Angela in 2023 with his former mistressLaura Olsen. He was impeached by the state house, accused of misusing his office and taking bribes while trying to get a job for his lover, allegations he denied all along and was acquitted of in the state senate. His wife stood by him through that first scandal. But the latest incident with Duhon appears to have been the last straw, and could threaten Paxton's latest bid to become a US senator. | | ---|---|--- With her then-husband Troy Duhon standing between them, Tracy Duhon (right) and Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton (left) pose for a photo at the Kentucky Derby in May 2024 | | ---|---|--- The Daily Mail can exclusively reveal Ken Paxton, 62, was secretly seeing a married Christian influencer Tracy Duhon (pictured) behind the backs of his wife and her husband The romance between Duhon and Paxton started after the pair met at the Kentucky Derby last year, multiple sources revealed. Since May 2024, the lovers have had multiple rendezvous on trips across the country and even overseas, according to insiders. The getaways were essential to keeping the entanglement secret as both were married at the time, the sources said. On social media, Duhon bragged about her 27-year marriage toTroy Duhon , the wealthy owner of 39 car dealerships. A New Orleans native, Duhon keeps a very active social media presence, discussing the power of prayer, and advising others on how to navigate death and other difficult times of their lives. , Duhon shares she lost two babies who died the day they were born in separate pregnancies. Her faith and grief counseling are the subject of her book When Hope is all you Have. '[Paxton is] enamored with her face. He's enamored with her story of overcoming adversity - she's lost two children. He's enamored with her faith,' one source explained. The source claims Paxton has a 'sincere' affection for her and believes she could be the second major relationship in his life. Despite their best efforts to keep their relationship under wraps, Paxton's wife learned her husband was cheating again earlier this year, another source said. Even though the Paxtons had not lived together since the summer of 2024, learning about Duhon made the arrangement between Angela and Paxton untenable, sources explained. Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton and his wife Angela married in 1986 after meeting at Baylor University, a Baptist university located in Waco, Texas The Duhons finalized their divorce three weeks ago, a source confirmed to the Daily Mail, adding that Tracy met Paxton at the Kentucky Derby in May 2024. They stayed under the same roof at the home of a mutual friend who hosted them for the event. In July, two months after the Derby, Tracy filed for divorce, the informant stated. , Texas State Senator Angela announced the end of her 38-year marriage in July, dumping her husband, who has renewed political aspirations. 'Today, after 38 years of marriage, I filed for divorce on biblical grounds,' she July 10. '...in light of recent discoveries, I do not believe that it honors God or is loving to myself, my children, or Ken to remain in the marriage.' A public official in her own right, Angela, represents the Dallas suburb of McKinney in the Texas Senate. She accused Ken of 'adultery' in court filings according to , however their divorce records have now been sealed. On her website, Tracy Duhon shares a personal story about two of her children dying at birth Ken Paxton, a staunch ally of Donald Trump , has hitched his wagon to the MAGA movement, becoming one of the fiercest defenders of the President. Last year, he decided to try and unseat long-time Senator John Cornyn , considered a more establishment Republican. Now both office holders are desperately trying to convince conservative voters they are the purest incarnation of the GOP. Both Paxton and Cornyn are appealing to conservatives who rank Christianity and family values as top priorities. Prior to news of the Paxton divorce, the MAGA Attorney General was ahead by as many as 16 points with conservative voters in the Lone Star State. Polling in the weeks after Angela announced the affair shows . Cornyn certainly believes the Duhon affair is a game changer, repeatedly attacking Paxton on the issue. The sitting senator could not resist the opportunity to stick it to Paxton as news of a tech CEO who was caught viral. 'Good news for @kenpaxtontx,' , sharing a parody tweet joking the band would no longer be showing candid camera shots of their audience. Cornyn also launched a new attack ad in July, calling out Paxton for his \- whose identity was first revealed by Texas Bureau Chief MaryAnn Martinez. Olson became the focus when the attorney general was impeached by both Republicans and Democrats in the Texas House on allegations of corruption. Lone Star members of the House alleged that Paxton used his position as the top law enforcer in the state to get bribes and donations. One top donor, Nate Paul , was singled out as paying for access to the attorney general's office. Earlier this year, to a lesser charge of making false statements to a financial institution in exchange for other federal charges being dropped. He was fined $1million and sentenced to five years' supervised release. When Paxton's affair with Olson became known, Paxton asked Paul to hire her at one of his Austin companies, lawmakers accused the attorney general. The allegation of the quid pro quo is what resulted in Paxton's historic impeachment, with bi-partisan votes. During the vote in the House, which was broadcasted live on TV, Paxton allegedly texted members of the House to threaten them if they voted to impeach him. 'I would like to point out that several members of this House, while on the floor of this House doing the state's business, received telephone calls from General Paxton personally, threatening them with political consequences in our next election,' Rep. Charlie Geren said during the proceedings. Paxton was eventually acquitted after a trial in the state senate and returned to his office. If he had been found guilty, he would have lost his job as attorney general. Angela sat through his trial at the senate every day, listening to details of his affair with Olson, even on the days her husband did not show up. She recused herself from voting. Olson was called to the State Capitol to testify, but never actually took the stand. When asked about Duhon being his mistress, Paxton did not address the claim but attacked the Daily Mail and vowed to take on the 'deranged radical Left' with Trump. When the Daily Mail reached out to Duhon, she hung up after learning she was on the phone with a reporter. She did not respond to text messages seeking further comment. Angela Paxton declined to comment through a spokesman." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: John Fetterman
subject: Trump’s attack on Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?t=1&akid=10307%2E434096%2EoLS-Oc)
| | |
---
Hey Derek,
John here. **We need to talk about how Trump and Republicans are actively trying to privatize Social Security.**
They're closing offices. Making staffing cuts. One Social Security office just went from**50 employees down to three.**

_No wonder folks' checks are being delayed._
And Trump’s Treasury Secretary just spilled the beans: Hidden in Trump’s Big, Ugly Bill – now _law_ – is a _backdoor plan_ to privatize Social Security.
**They're making moves left and right – and it's all a con. Here’s what they're trying to do:**
👉 Turn your hard-earned benefits over to Wall Street
👉 Make your retirement dependent on market swings
👉 Dismantle your security net so the super-rich can cash in
_Hell NO._ We’re NOT letting that happen.
I’m in this fight to protect the working folks who've paid into Social Security their whole lives. But I need backup, and there's not a minute to lose. **Trump's plan is already underway.**
🙏 **[If you're in this fight with me, will you chip in $5 right now to help me hit our $20,000 mid-month goal by Monday at midnight and save Social Security?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51652?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=2&akid=10307%2E434096%2EoLS-Oc)**

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Chris didn’t chase headlines. He chased results.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
I’ve seen firsthand what real public service looks like.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_1_gallego?refcode=em20250913-2331&amount=5&refcode2=2331_582294_mt2maw&akid=2331%2E582294%2Emt2maw)
Ruben Gallego here — Senator from Arizona, Marine veteran, and someone who’s seen firsthand what real public service looks like.
I was just in New Hampshire to support my friend Chris Pappas’s Senate race. There I got to hear from Granite Staters about the issues at hand – and I know there’s no one better to take on these problems in the Senate than Chris.
I served alongside Chris in the House. What struck me right away wasn’t just how hard he worked — it was how deeply he cared about the people back home in New Hampshire.
Chris didn’t chase headlines. He chased _results._
Whether it was working to protect veterans’ health care, standing up for small businesses, or making sure working families had a fair shot, Chris was there, sleeves rolled up, ready to do the work.
Now Chris is running for Senate in one of the most competitive races in the country. And if we lose this seat, we hand Trump’s MAGA GOP a free pass to push their extreme agenda.
That’s why I’m asking: [**Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Chris win this race?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_1_gallego?refcode=em20250913-2331&amount=5&refcode2=2331_582294_mt2maw&akid=2331%2E582294%2Emt2maw)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_1_gallego?amount=5&refcode=em20250913-2331&refcode2=2331_582294_mt2maw&akid=2331%2E582294%2Emt2maw)**
Chris is exactly the kind of partner I need in the Senate — someone who listens, who acts, and who always puts people before politics. Let’s send him there.
Thank you,
Ruben Gallego
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250913-1?t=1&refcode2=2331_582294_mt2maw&akid=2331%2E582294%2Emt2maw)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2331%2E582294%2Emt2maw)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2331%2E582294%2Emt2maw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2331%2E582294%2Emt2maw)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Team Taylor
subject: Three reasons why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
We can’t wait until the right-wing machine picks its candidate to start building strength.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250913-561&t=1&akid=570%2E294397%2EDfwRJJ)
This race will decide the future of Wisconsin’s Supreme Court — and we can’t wait until the right-wing machine picks its candidate to start building strength. Here are three reasons why your support matters right now:
**1\. The stakes couldn’t be higher.** The court could decide on the fairness of our state legislative maps, reproductive healthcare access, workers’ rights, and our democracy itself.
**2\. The other side has billionaires ready for revenge.** Elon Musk-linked groups spent tens of millions of dollars in our most recent Wisconsin Supreme Court election. Now, they could come back with a vengeance — and we have to be ready to respond.
**3\. We can go on offense.** We have the rare chance to grow our progressive majority and protect our freedoms for the next decade by electing Judge Chris Taylor.
As you can see, everything is on the line. Every dollar we raise now ensures we have the resources to reach voters, tell Chris’s story, and stop dark money from tipping the scales.
[**Will you chip in $10 today to help us elect Judge Chris Taylor and fend off any right-wing attacks?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250913_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250913-561&refcode2=570_294397_DfwRJJ&akid=570%2E294397%2EDfwRJJ)

Team Taylor

clean_body: MAGA influencers just interviewed John’s extreme opponent. Team, we just got another update on the MAGA Republicans lining up to challenge John: MAGA Radio Hosts Chuck and Julie: Hickenlooper’s extreme opponent is exactly who Trump needs in the Senate Two of Colorado’s most extreme far-right influencers just interviewed John’s extreme opponent, claiming there’s a lack of true MAGA Republicans in the Senate and that he was who Trump needs to champion the MAGA agenda in Washington. They even branded Senate Republicans as “wishy washy” in their support of Trump’s MAGA agenda — as if voting for the President’s budget bill that kicks 15 million Americans off their health care, guts food assistance for families in need, and decimates clean energy credits in favor of fossil fuels wasn’t bad enough for everyday Colorado families. It’s clear as day: the MAGA movement is pushing to elect a far-right lunatic who intends to rubber stamp every aspect of Donald Trump’s extreme agenda, no matter how wasteful, cruel, or dehumanizing his policies may be. We can’t let that kind of person EVER represent Colorado in the Senate.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = \- Hickenlooper HQ | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. name: Anabel, United We Dream
subject: We dedicated a poem to you, Peter
body:
Join us on IG Live for a poetry conversation on Thursday, September 25! | | | Hey Peter, **** **Check out our new poetry series honoring the voices of working-class people who power our communities!** 📜✨ We’re the ones to hold the future in our hands, even as policies threaten our communities and ICE agents invade our neighborhoods. This series of poems shines the spotlight on people like you and I, Peter, as well as the collective power we hold when we come together to fight for a future that puts us first. **👉 “We Hold the City,” the first in our series of poems dedicated to the people who power our country, is out now.** This poem by Massiel Alfonso is a reminder that our hands tell the story of the future we’re writing together. **Share this poem online with your friends and neighbors, and join us on Thursday, September 25, at 4 pm ET for a live discussion on Instagram about the future we’re fighting for:** **** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg450eYpdjysR_8mlJZuOGGPbxScuxvkeleDlfHjUDwdvmuWl-vY-X-JVeNjlPUFhtHyfvaLEHCfztji4Hb3L6rEl88T6hyj0vazw8M2BzfC6wuWZOcBRlt6L74ep4mLWEVEEfHtdWqwUdfHEefNNf9MMSpe8Q70xtHnsfU8VBKdtf98isd2BKOl2ED6FOWLRGe_fjpcLPK6Uw5lnVSjJ21MHVdislGwoQustRbsu5HTQUL23j7_49U8kW_n3B_RLZkX3Pa6b_-7P2pN7rMy3Zjo68EjiJv09_0zy5qZgi8_ONrJIGMbOaPGnDtyvNQenLCFO7JxdE8bk2pnthmRr3YD4/4jv/gmR3Q6jxRSa_PmlCDE494g/h0/h001.yUJsN9LSFVZi3g25IcqD5T5LDRAFgofmVsJ3Q3Y8fzA) | | | [Share on Instagram](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg450eYpdjysR_8mlJZuOGGPbxScuxvkeleDlfHjUDwdvmuedTLT-BERx1uIlSPagH1saUF53knS4Ucf0inlwWwihcufCajA725EnZgIU-LJXiYE-9s_bL2nwNqOcOgdiSl1qyT-eXu8J4aTWerf39rFLZiNvsp_SK15ayMpV7pTWIW9D3h7Ahiz5u_C_nascGPY2PZVqX3NCL-bvBF6tXn-vPYIl3qDlu6zhzmFQgISWHEK9JftqvrbLw9ivsdSSVRLW2Lkif1iWMehbpS75VI438qWyXvta6LnbovkiQGz-d22Gi44MaDl4enbsqPDqiAgQQydIU5s1sibbwKCSY44U/4jv/gmR3Q6jxRSa_PmlCDE494g/h1/h001.Rp-RuVKD4un0xWfK5frd1kz9BzqesJUhCGKLreEthlU)

For generations, our movement has been powered by working people uniting to protect one another.****
We look forward to seeing you at our live discussion on Thursday, September 25, on Instagram to celebrate the voices of people who bring life to our communities. Remember to keep an eye out across our social media for the next poem in our series. **In the meantime, text “RSVP NOW” to 787-57,**[**or click here if you’re on your phone,**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.EtNV8HBC60Tl7UuGmXS3seAPjtg6hvvK2zY-gvvQCKiUS-c4lWOSX7oxh1QsFVg1cAJQnjroxrFvFVz3FNg6em4EjhIfiPs4t31JzNmst37QAXWsICwU8O_p3lpKUR4b4Ize8uNpN622aX0jph6lKpgDiwv5X_YGscZNwVPnhiI1xN0QyaeyAVuoJlyS9bvkg4LTI8pJ_XiTqNMD_C-OEmZoNOpy5kkTPXLZHoZG_EyUF-xnMG-3G4kqGmx71dZdu6bKlv6dqZMJsIrntDzrP_aNvvMXC7o49UK-_BBYhVt_xV1Q3qUjStXCr0i0mEfhe0rBNUJOyoBcCeTr8vD6NlhRdPuKW2w81Titr8_tgr38zKK9BS4M7ZrrBpzRoPYVJnZIdIre-Qs77mbZsL1NO2OVI-f8A_G1LoX4hUVwirxrem9-OEyaRa2zia9yKqV9ty-sfta0M48_xAaWzp6YLXU4nAasJpoQOrVka-mF30CKH5rSwWwde89lk15omGOvByvsviZ1vE4PWDnaqb3Xi0MA8I-WI8tnoYIiFogCrJ4/4jv/gmR3Q6jxRSa_PmlCDE494g/h5/h001.KAlyWLRJdqsY9gP3qO-e4zHu88Xv78wUgR5cOiyvLCk)**to be notified when we go live on Instagram.**

clean_body: Join us on IG Live for a poetry conversation on Thursday, September 25! | | | Hey Peter, ** Check out our new poetry series honoring the voices of working-class people who power our communities! 📜✨ We’re the ones to hold the future in our hands, even as policies threaten our communities and ICE agents invade our neighborhoods. This series of poems shines the spotlight on people like you and I, Peter, as well as the collective power we hold when we come together to fight for a future that puts us first. 👉 “We Hold the City,” the first in our series of poems dedicated to the people who power our country, is out now. This poem by Massiel Alfonso is a reminder that our hands tell the story of the future we’re writing together. Share this poem online with your friends and neighbors, and join us on Thursday, September 25, at 4 pm ET for a live discussion on Instagram about the future we’re fighting for: | | | | | | | For generations, our movement has been powered by working people uniting to protect one another. We look forward to seeing you at our live discussion on Thursday, September 25, on Instagram to celebrate the voices of people who bring life to our communities. Remember to keep an eye out across our social media for the next poem in our series. In the meantime, text “RSVP NOW” to 787-57, be notified when we go live on Instagram.** In power, Anabel and the rest of the United We Dream team Follow us on: | | | | |

body:
An outright Marxist...
| **_A SECURE BRIEFING AUTHORIZED BY REP. JIM JORDAN_**
---
Friend,
---
I never thought I’d see something like this happen in the United States of America...
---
_**But fueled by millions of dollars from radical Left-wing donors, socialists and outright communists are _TAKING_ _OVER_ the Democrat Party to force their Marxist agenda on the American people! **_
---
_**...Mamdani and Progressives Rake In Cash as Democrats Remain Divided**_
**“Far left’s prolific fundraising shows appeal to party’s base”**
[Source: _Wall Street Journal_]
---
The unfortunate reality is that in politics, money often leads to political power.
---
The Democrats are only going to get _more extreme_ as they become more and more dependent on cash from radicals who hate America and the values that make our country great.
---
I don’t even want to begin to imagine all the horrible things these extremists would do if they took back the People’s House in the midterms...
---
_**But I know the first thing on the agenda would be _IMPEACHING_ President Trump! **_
---
It’s no exaggeration to say that the fate of Trump’s presidency and his America First agenda all depends on Republicans winning the midterms!
---
**Given just how dire the stakes are, I’ve teamed up with the House GOP Leadership Chair to help Republicans build our own war chest earlier than ever before – and we’ve set an ambitious target of 1,000,000 new grassroots contributions before the end of the month.**
---
It’s vital that we offset this influx of cash that’s flowing to the most extreme Democrats with our own influx of contributions from America First patriots like YOU, Friend.
---
Remember, it’s not the size of your contribution that matters. What’s important is the sheer number of patriots who step up to help fight for President Trump’s agenda when it matters most.
---
_As long as the America First movement remains united, we can always _OUTRAISE_ the Democrats – no matter how many millions they haul in from their radical donors! _

body:
We have something exciting to share today!
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=4402%2E400544%2EMpzxNt)
We have something exciting to share today!
We’ve been hard at work on getting our grassroots donor wall up in the campaign office, and while we still are adding more names, we wanted to give you a _sneak peek_ :
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250913_1_donorwall?refcode=em20250913-4402&refcode2=4402_400544_MpzxNt&akid=4402%2E400544%2EMpzxNt)
**This wall is front and center at our campaign office and is a permanent reminder that our campaign is powered by people,_not_ billionaires and political insiders.** Every volunteer, visitor, and staff member at our campaign HQ will see it and know that folks like _you_ helped make this movement possible.
**And the good news is it’s not too late to get your name added!**
[**If you want to help power Deb’s grassroots campaign for New Mexico, pitch in $5 or any amount today and we will add your name to the wall!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250913_1_donorwall?amount=5&refcode=em20250913-4402&refcode2=4402_400544_MpzxNt&akid=4402%2E400544%2EMpzxNt)

Thank you!
— Team Haaland HQ

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: small businesses build stronger communities
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115163860/569395326/-629675555?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM1YTc4ZTUtY2E5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xiMuebzhq7ixX1EB_6_4WIIb5EAQ3_vrjJkMz2hKvpU=) Before I represented Oregon in Congress, I was a small business owner. So I know firsthand the importance small businesses have in our communities – and I also know all about the challenges they face. That’s why I’m working in Congress to make it easier for small businesses to get ahead and help our communities thrive. Since taking office, I’ve worked to pass three bipartisan bills in the House which would support local businesses. This includes the ELEVATE Act which would cut through red tape that small businesses often face before they’ve even had a chance to get started. And a few weeks ago, I hosted a roundtable to hear about the obstacles small businesses are facing and how I can help. This conversation highlighted the challenges these businesses face in getting off the ground and staying open, as well as the incredible opportunities they’re creating. Now, I’m proud to be taking these insights back with me to Congress to continue pushing for the support our rural economies need and deserve. **Oregon wouldn’t be Oregon without our rural small businesses.** They don’t just create jobs — they help build stronger, more resilient communities. **[I’m committed to supporting these businesses and helping our communities thrive — and I’d appreciate your support to keep up this work. Please, pitch in to my campaign today to help me continue fighting for our small businesses and our local economies in Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115163861/569395327/-629675555?refcode=email_091325_smallbusinesses&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM1YTc4ZTUtY2E5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xiMuebzhq7ixX1EB_6_4WIIb5EAQ3_vrjJkMz2hKvpU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115163862/569395328/-629675555?refcode=email_091325_smallbusinesses&express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTM1YTc4ZTUtY2E5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xiMuebzhq7ixX1EB_6_4WIIb5EAQ3_vrjJkMz2hKvpU=)

clean_body: = Before I represented Oregon in Congress, I was a small business owner. So I know firsthand the importance small businesses have in our communities – and I also know all about the challenges they face. That’s why I’m working in Congress to make it easier for small businesses to get ahead and help our communities thrive. Since taking office, I’ve worked to pass three bipartisan bills in the House which would support local businesses. This includes the ELEVATE Act which would cut through red tape that small businesses often face before they’ve even had a chance to get started. And a few weeks ago, I hosted a roundtable to hear about the obstacles small businesses are facing and how I can help. This conversation highlighted the challenges these businesses face in getting off the ground and staying open, as well as the incredible opportunities they’re creating. Now, I’m proud to be taking these insights back with me to Congress to continue pushing for the support our rural economies need and deserve. Oregon wouldn’t be Oregon without our rural small businesses. They don’t just create jobs — they help build stronger, more resilient communities. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thanks for your support, Janelle | Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign. But if you would like to unsubscribe, . | Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress Janelle Bynum For Congress 10121 SE Sunnyside Road #300 Clackamas, OR 97015 United States

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: ​​Clear as day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter —
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
And this Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
_If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready for change –– please rush $10 to my reelection campaign today._
**Here’s the link to donate:**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ossoff-em-sep25?refcode=250913-1**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250913-1-f&t=1&akid=762%2E5691347%2EP8n3xE)
Or, here’s why your support is so important, especially today.
Right now, Trump’s MAGA machine is flooding Georgia with attack ads to distort my record and fuel the culture wars he relies on to cling to power.
Millions of dollars are being spent against me. And we’re still over a year from Election Day.
Not normal.
The GOP sees this race as the tipping point in the midterms. If a Trump loyalist wins in Georgia, they don’t just expand their majority in the Senate — they lock it in for the long-run.
With that power, Trump’s last constraints in the Senate vanish. What’s left is total submission. No oversight. No brakes on extremist nominees. No guardrails when he comes for the rule of law.
That’s what’s at stake in Georgia.
That’s why they’re pouring millions into this race.
With your help, I’m fighting back. And I will win. But I can’t do it alone.
So, I’m asking:
**[Can you rush a contribution of $10 or any amount that works for you to my reelection campaign in Georgia today?**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250913-1-f&t=2&akid=762%2E5691347%2EP8n3xE)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250913-1-f&t=3&akid=762%2E5691347%2EP8n3xE)**
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=4&akid=762%2E5691347%2EP8n3xE) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=762%2E5691347%2EP8n3xE) if you'd like to unsubscribe.

subject: Josh’s new bipartisan legislation
body:
Sign our petition to become a citizen co-sponsor. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115164611/569397877/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4YTA2YmEtY2I5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WiyvP8ZLmnPwWmOPOBgxzMddq39kG8Coxvo1AEwCCHU=) | Peter, As a dad of two little girls, Josh knows firsthand: welcoming a baby should be one of life’s greatest joys — not a financial burden. But right now, the average out-of-pocket cost of childbirth is nearly **$3,000,** and for 1 in 6 moms, it’s more than **$5,000.** That’s money new parents could be spending on diapers, cribs, or saving for their child’s future. **That’s why Josh is working to pass the _Supporting Healthy Moms and Babies Act._ This bill would make childbirth completely free by covering prenatal care, ultrasounds, delivery, and a full year of postpartum services with no extra costs.** Josh remembers how overwhelming those early days are for parents. The last thing families should worry about is how to pay for childbirth. [_**Will you add your name to show you agree that no family should go into debt to have a child? Become a citizen co-sponsor of this legislation today:**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115164612/569397878/648998387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4YTA2YmEtY2I5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WiyvP8ZLmnPwWmOPOBgxzMddq39kG8Coxvo1AEwCCHU=&emci=048a06ba-cb90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=058a06ba-cb90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6455652) [Make childbirth free »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115164613/569397879/648998387?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDU4YTA2YmEtY2I5MC1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WiyvP8ZLmnPwWmOPOBgxzMddq39kG8Coxvo1AEwCCHU=&emci=048a06ba-cb90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=058a06ba-cb90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=6455652) This is commonsense, bipartisan legislation. Together, we can send a clear message: _It’s time to make childbirth free for every family in America._ — Team Harder

body:

_Change of plans_ this Sunday at [Sheridan.Church](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12856.1.f7b6479d0e8145dca049d9afe65ee34f). **Darryl Strawberry** was scheduled to preach tomorrow but instead I will be addressing the tragedy regarding my friend, **Charlie Kirk** , and I will be preaching a message entitled, **'TURNING POINT.'** We have rescheduled **Darryl Strawberry** for a later Sunday. Please be in your spot this Sunday at 10am CT whether that is _in-person_ or _online_ as I believe I have an urgent Word from the Lord to share with you about where we are and where we are headed. **Location** : 7901 E 41st St Tulsa, OK **Online** : [https://www.youtube.com/@sheridanchurch ](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12857.1.01de201d6fc57c3e5676be3006ddd808) Thank you, Pastor Jackson Lahmeyer

Recently, I woke up today with a really cool notification... My **FIRST** book, ["_Chasing After The Wind_ "](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12859.1.ddb0e13aa28bb6c0705947fcf9bd07d7) is out and has reached **#12 in Religion/ Christian Living / Personal Growth**! **I have been blown away by the response!** THANK YOU SO MUCH! If you have not ordered your copy you can still get the **Limited Edition Signed Book** here: _[*"Chasing After The Wind"*](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12860.1.42fe5ac66af4222d603e9e4bbb1bb9cb)_ It is also available on [Amazon](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12861.1.48ec712fefa42095361007f37d3ccee1)\+ [Barnes & Noble](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12862.1.7cb54f672dd3a883e6c2b4d48d40ad52). **Amazon** : [https://www.amazon.com/Chasing-After-Wind-Catching-Everybody/dp/B0F7M4GK26](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12863.1.98530bf8fb14dabb12d768d1d605d908) **Barnes & Noble**: [https://www.barnesandnoble.com/w/chasing-after-the-wind-jackson-lahmeyer/1147391019](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12864.1.4804c9c60b77ed96e7ba09e78f1be703) I really want to thank **MLB LEGEND Darryl Strawberry** for writing the Foreword and becoming vulnerable by sharing his story. The Foreword is worth getting the book, I promise. This book is 200 pages and I am confident will change your life as it has mine. In ["Chasing After The Wind"](https://email.cloud2.secureclick.net/c/5961?id=24732399.12865.1.eb3ebb432a917cd830d12dea19403e98) I share VERY personal stories and I decided to get real and raw with the heartbreaks and triumphs I have experienced.

name: Wendy with Team Kaptur
subject: We want to be transparent, friend
body:
| |
---
Hi there, It's Wendy, from the Kaptur for Congress Finance Team. We're almost halfway through September, an **end-of-quarter month** , which means we are just two days away from our mid-month fundraising deadline. With this significant test of our campaign looming, I wanted to give you a look at where we stand. Most campaigns wouldn't make this data public, but we know that our grassroots supporters are the heart and soul of our campaign, and we believe in being transparent with you. **So here's the truth, friend — right now, we are falling behind. ** **Take a look at this graph from our fundraising dashboard:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115164759/569398603/-1968428927?=250913_wb_midmonth1_img&ms=250913_wb_midmonth1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNDJjNGYwOC1jYzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iIwDha5WAEjPouh5uGjcHeovSly073OPl9HhFoqpS48=) Our digital fundraising has fallen off, right at this critical moment. And these aren't just numbers on a spreadsheet. body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
FIRST: I fought to release the Epstein files so the American people could know the truth and survivors could have justice.
NOW: I’m under attack. Trump’s White House Press Secretary, Karoline Levitt, has attacked me by name for demanding accountability.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/epstein-files-1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/epstein-files-1]
WHY? Because I won’t back down from exposing who’s being protected and why.
This is what happens when you take on the powerful and demand transparency: they fight back. But I can’t back down now, and I need you with me.
Will you donate today to help me continue the fight? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/epstein-files-1]
When less than one percent of the Epstein files have been released, the DOJ and Trump’s allies want you to believe they can bury the truth. I refuse to let them do it.
I won’t be intimidated by Levitt or Trump. But to continue pushing for full disclosure and to stand up against these attacks, I need grassroots supporters like you at my back.
I don’t take PAC money. I don’t take lobbyist money. I don’t take corporate money. People like you fuel my campaign and ensure that I can stay in Congress fighting AGAINST big money and special interests.
Please, if you believe in truth and transparency, chip in now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/epstein-files-1]
Together, we will expose corruption, and no amount of political attacks will silence us.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
