name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m officially in the race for U.S. Senate.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1]
Hi, Peter,
I’m Roy Cooper, and I am running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina. I believe that our brightest days are still ahead, but we have to work together to fix what’s broken in Washington.
Politicians in DC are running up our debt, ripping away our health care, disrespecting our veterans, cutting help for the poor and putting our Medicare at risk — just to give tax breaks to the very rich. I’ve had enough.
We have to change things, but I need you with me. Together, we can win this Senate race and help Democrats take back the majority. Will you split a contribution of $20 or another amount that’s right for you between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC to get us started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1]
These are no ordinary times, Peter . I believe elected leaders should work to create safety, prosperity and opportunity for every American. Republicans in Washington don’t seem to share that sense of duty.
When I look at what’s happening in Washington now, lawmakers are tearing down our middle class to put even more money in billionaires’ pockets. They’re cutting critical jobs at agencies that help keep our country running. Not even our National Parks or Weather Service are safe.
They’re punching down — attacking the most vulnerable among us — to make themselves seem strong. Something has to give.
There’s another path, Peter. When I was Governor of North Carolina, we expanded Medicaid. We passed pay raises for public school teachers and we built a strong economy by investing in clean energy and investing in our people.
Washington can look like this, too. It’s time to elect leaders who are ready to do the hard work of strengthening our middle class, restoring voting rights and reproductive rights, protecting our environment and ensuring every child has the excellent education they deserve.
If this is the America you believe in, this campaign is for you, Peter .
We’re in for a tough election here in North Carolina, but with the help of committed supporters, we’ve won the toughest races before. I’m grateful to have The Real Texas's support in this crucial race, and I’d like to have yours, too. Your donation today will help us take on the challenge of the most competitive Senate campaign in 2026. Please give whatever is right for you and split a donation between our team and The Real Texas today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Roy Cooper and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1&amount=25]
Let’s do this together,
Roy Cooper
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-cooper?refcode=091325_1]
The Real Texas PAC
1150 N Loop 1604 W
Ste 108-230
San Antonio, TX 78248
United States
Contributions or gifts to The Real Texas PAC are not tax deductible. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, treasury funds, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/Pq6mZqR8vUu32u6MFdTiQw2?unsubscribedata=b41tGax%2FlN6etWr2SMMRhs5G5lIC9bKgLMp3XzD8KMUijAsuaNW6C0J1V4sdM0GTsMUeYjqPq66d0qfz9ZC6sSb5PahqBR0MRk061owysslY5nPujlgqQIpXRYz6jMq27TfgWFLB2CyKHPCb8MWwrBTnCpuZwT2%2B3qWV2gdgYgEoc99UeptkWXfylxhhBV428AfvBJXgcoOChuN%2Bl1zANDs6iIeFXpBCG7z%2Bvw%2BShJPiLSgm6%2Bw6HcBHHOwY1rWcuucvFcycjQT1uR4zFM0roDKjKw0Fe%2BQ4t4icSq03I%2FJTb%2FdSCgqfIlXki4MVTAJSW6XM87r97WA119EVTnAUWOGZ2TY3R11N8IeiMz%2BxF6HczLXB0fWj1eBmqZOO2awQGqorv7oRRtzNV5uXbl%2BixDOHx4VYOUDZyn3qcBf9CHg%3D .

subject: Republicans just showed their cards
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
It’s official: Defeating Prop 50 is GOP’s top priority |
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115166305/569404315/-1175830425?refcode=header&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY0ODNkNS1kNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxBY5bAMQuXmcZ1qZjtgt_mSL4BZrTEhouQRbP8Tvi4=)
---
| Last weekend, Republicans gathered at the California GOP Convention — _and their main focus was Proposition 50_. One GOP candidate for Governor at the convention attacked Prop 50 as an _“obviously corrupt, cheating move.”_ **That’s a total lie**. Prop 50 — the Election Rigging Response Act — is our defense against Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans’ plan to gerrymander Congress in their favor before next year’s midterm elections even begin. On the other hand... the founder of a pro-Trump special interest group talked about how he is terrified that passing Prop 50 means that Democrats will have a chance at taking back the U.S. House. _“There's another huge battle coming up next November, and if we lose three or four seats, guess who gets impeached for the third time? Donald Trump. And his entire agenda will be just like what he went through in his first term. It’ll come to a screeching halt.”_ **Well, he’s right about that**. Passing Prop 50 this November keeps Democrats in the fight to take back the U.S. House in 2026. **[That’s why we are asking: Will you rush a donation today to help the California Democratic Party correct all the misinformation coming out of the CAGOP Convention and pass Prop 50?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115166306/569404316/-1861291874?&refcode=20250913_FR_45DO_GOPConvention&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY0ODNkNS1kNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxBY5bAMQuXmcZ1qZjtgt_mSL4BZrTEhouQRbP8Tvi4=)** [CHIP IN $35 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115166309/569404318/-1861291874?&refcode=20250913_FR_45DO_GOPConvention&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY0ODNkNS1kNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxBY5bAMQuXmcZ1qZjtgt_mSL4BZrTEhouQRbP8Tvi4=) Here’s the truth that Republicans didn’t want to talk about at their Convention: ✅ Prop 50 is a temporary, emergency safeguard that expires in 2030; ✅ It ensures California voters (not MAGA politicians) approve the maps that determine our congressional representation; ✅ It’s the only way to stop Trump from stealing seats and silencing millions of Californians before ballots are even cast. **Republicans made it crystal clear at their convention last weekend: Defeating Prop 50 is their top priority**. It’s galvanized Republicans in support of Donald Trump’s plot, and with help from dark money donors, they are ready to spread misinformation to swing voters up and down the state. **[Every dollar you give today will fund canvassers, literature, and voter outreach to counter the GOP’s misinformation campaign. Can we count on you?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115166310/569404320/-1861291874?&refcode=20250913_FR_45DO_GOPConvention&amount=35&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY0ODNkNS1kNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxBY5bAMQuXmcZ1qZjtgt_mSL4BZrTEhouQRbP8Tvi4=)** [CHIP IN $5 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115166311/569404321/-1861291874?&refcode=20250913_FR_45DO_GOPConvention&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzUvMS84MDk5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWY0ODNkNS1kNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VxBY5bAMQuXmcZ1qZjtgt_mSL4BZrTEhouQRbP8Tvi4=)

clean_body: It’s official: Defeating Prop 50 is GOP’s top priority | = | Last weekend, Republicans gathered at the California GOP Convention — and their main focus was Proposition 50. One GOP candidate for Governor at the convention attacked Prop 50 as an “obviously corrupt, cheating move.” That’s a total lie. Prop 50 — the Election Rigging Response Act — is our defense against Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans’ plan to gerrymander Congress in their favor before next year’s midterm elections even begin. On the other hand... the founder of a pro-Trump special interest group talked about how he is terrified that passing Prop 50 means that Democrats will have a chance at taking back the U.S. House. “There's another huge battle coming up next November, and if we lose three or four seats, guess who gets impeached for the third time? Donald Trump. And his entire agenda will be just like what he went through in his first term. It’ll come to a screeching halt.” Well, he’s right about that. Passing Prop 50 this November keeps Democrats in the fight to take back the U.S. House in 2026. = = Here’s the truth that Republicans didn’t want to talk about at their Convention: ✅ Prop 50 is a temporary, emergency safeguard that expires in 2030; ✅ It ensures California voters (not MAGA politicians) approve the maps that determine our congressional representation; ✅ It’s the only way to stop Trump from stealing seats and silencing millions of Californians before ballots are even cast. Republicans made it crystal clear at their convention last weekend: Defeating Prop 50 is their top priority. It’s galvanized Republicans in support of Donald Trump’s plot, and with help from dark money donors, they are ready to spread misinformation to swing voters up and down the state. = = = = = = Thank you so much for being in this fight, \- CADEM | | = Our Democratic leaders are working hard to make California a better place to live. From fighting for good-paying jobs, combating climate change, to expanding healthcare access so all Californians can lead safe, healthy, prosperous lives — California’s Democratic leaders turn progressive ideas into meaningful action. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Charlie Kirk: His Legacy Has Been Borne
body:
Shame on Liberals and their evil rhetoric

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/fe37bb94b8cc/when-we-vote-we-win-14765211?e=8763c56857)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “The tyrant dies and his rule is over; the martyr dies and his rule begins.”— Søren Kierkegaard

---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# Opinion: Charlie Kirk
# – A Legacy Is Borne

---
| |
By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator

My fellow Americans, we gather at a moment of sorrow. A good man has been taken from us. Charlie Kirk is gone. But though his life has ended, his cause has only begun.
**Charlie Kirk was not the caricature his enemies painted.** He was not a fascist, not a divider, not a man of hate. He was the opposite. He stood for faith. He stood for freedom. He stood for America.
**He welcomed debate. He invited disagreement.** He turned division into dialogue and opposition into common ground. That is why he was feared. That is why he was killed.
_**He was killed because he spoke of God.**_
_**He was killed because he defended life.**_
_**He was killed because he told the truth about family, about freedom, about America.**_
Those who feared him thought they could end him. But they were wrong. They have not silenced him. They have made his voice eternal.
And what followed his death revealed much about the times in which we live. When dignity demanded silence, many mocked. **When respect demanded reverence, many jeered.**
**Rep. Ilhan Omar** mocked him still, saying, “These people are full of s—.”
**Matthew Dowd of MSNBC** sneered, “He’s been one of the most divisive... constantly pushing hate speech.”
When Speaker Mike Johnson called for a moment of silence, **liberal lawmakers booed.**
This is their compassion. This is their charity. This is their respect for human life.
**Contrast this with President Trump’s words at the passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg —** a woman who opposed him at every turn: “She was an amazing woman who led an amazing life.” That is dignity. That is America.
And so, let us not descend to the level of those who mocked. Let us not repay hatred with hatred.**For when conservatives mourn, we do not burn cities. We do not spit on police. We do not riot in the streets. We bow our heads. We pray. We remember.**
**But we must ask: where does this hatred come from?**
For years I have studied this question. Why are liberals so profane in their declarations? Why so quick to call their opponents fascist, racist, evil? Why such rage over politics?
The answer is this:**they are a movement without faith.** They have no belief in God. They have no compass higher than themselves. Over ninety percent of atheists in America identify as liberals or Democrats. And without faith, there is a hole in the heart — a void, a vacuum.
**Where faith should dwell, ideology takes its place. Where God should reign, politics becomes their altar.** When conservatives challenge their beliefs, they feel it as blasphemy, as an attack on the only thing they worship: their ideology.
That is why they hate. That is why they mock. That is why, in the wake of Charlie Kirk’s murder, they did not grieve, but sneered.
But **conservatives are different**. Our foundation is not rage. Our foundation is not ideology. Our foundation is faith. Our foundation is family. Our foundation is America.
And so, let us be clear: the e**nemies of truth may kill the man, but they cannot kill the mission.** They may strike down one leader, but they cannot stop the millions who rise in his place.
Charlie Kirk’s flame has been taken from this world. But his flame has lit a thousand others.
**He is gone from us now. But his legacy has just been born.**

_**God bless his family.**_
_**God bless his memory.**_
_**And God bless the United States of America.**_

---

This is getting incredibly scary, friend.

According to _NBC News_ , the Supreme Court [ **“allowed President Donald Trump to fire a member of the Federal Trade Commission despite a federal law [...] intended to restrict the White House’s power” over the agency.** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68757?t=9&akid=23393%2E4449941%2E0i7SwH)

_We can’t believe this!!!_

The Supreme Court is supposed to be a non-partisan branch of government that upholds the Constitution and keeps our leaders in check.

Instead, Donald Trump packed it with conservative, extremist Justices that allow him to yield power like a dictator!!!

We need to hold them accountable, team. That’s why we’re launching an emergency poll to see what Democrats in your area think of the Supreme Court. But last time we checked, we didn’t see your response...

[ **So please, friend, tell us before 11:59pm tonight: Do you trust the current Supreme Court? **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68757?t=10&akid=23393%2E4449941%2E0i7SwH)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68757?t=11&akid=23393%2E4449941%2E0i7SwH)
| | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68757?t=12&akid=23393%2E4449941%2E0i7SwH)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68757?t=13&akid=23393%2E4449941%2E0i7SwH)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68757?t=14&akid=23393%2E4449941%2E0i7SwH)
---
[ **If you opened this email and failed to respond, you will be marked as:
“Yes, I trust the current Supreme Court”. **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68757?t=15&akid=23393%2E4449941%2E0i7SwH)
Thank you,

Fight For Reform

_Abigail remains in a strong position to flip Virginia blue._ But four years ago, Republicans won the Governorship after consistently being down in polls. And this poll shows that tens of thousands of voters remain undecided.
**Now, with Trump attacking Abigail directly, we can't take anything for granted.**
We know it seems small in the scheme of things, but your $25 will fund critical investments in ads and organizers, which could be the difference between victory and defeat on November 4th.

clean_body: This is urgent, Peter. = Peter, the latest poll from Roanoke College shows Abigail's opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, closing the gap in the Virginia Governor's race. = This is urgent, Peter. = Peter, make a contribution to elect Abigail Spanberger: If you are signed up for ActBlue Express, your contribution to Abigail Spanberger will be processed immediately: = = = = Let's be clear about where things stand: Abigail remains in a strong position to flip Virginia blue. But four years ago, Republicans won the Governorship after consistently being down in polls. And this poll shows that tens of thousands of voters remain undecided. Now, with Trump attacking Abigail directly, we can't take anything for granted. We know it seems small in the scheme of things, but your $25 will fund critical investments in ads and organizers, which could be the difference between victory and defeat on November 4th. = = = = = = = Thank you, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: All eyes on NJ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
the stakes here are very high
Peter, every single day since he took office in January, it seems like Donald Trump has found new ways to abuse his power and make life harder for our families.
He’s illegally withheld funding that New Jerseyans rely on for child care, for health care, and for access to healthy food.
He’s deployed the National Guard to American cities in a transparent attempt to instill terror and fear.
He signed a devastating spending bill that guts Medicaid access and makes everything from groceries to heating your home less affordable — all to give billionaires a giant tax cut.
And honestly, that’s just a fraction of it.
**As Trump has inflicted all this damage on our country, Republican politicians like Jack Ciattarelli have cheered him on every step of the way.**
There is seemingly nothing Trump can do — no matter how illegal, reckless, or outright devastating for New Jersey families — that would make Jack Ciattarelli say “enough is enough.”
**And Peter, polls show that Ciattarelli is within a few percentage points of becoming New Jersey’s next governor.**
If we’re going to win that race and prevent that from happening, we need to work night and day these next 7 weeks to get our message out.
I intend to do exactly that, Peter — because the stakes for New Jersey, and for our nation, are too high to give it anything less. But I can’t win this race without your help.
**[Let’s send a message that the people reject Donald Trump and Jack Ciattarelli’s disastrous agenda, Peter. Let’s send a message that we won’t stand for their attacks on working families or on the rule of law — and that we’re ready to lead the way with a better path forward. Please rush a split donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94239?refcode=em20250913-9412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9412%2E614464%2EcaFzs7)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94239?refcode=em20250913-9412&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9412%2E614464%2EcaFzs7)**
Thank you,
Mikie

# [Murder In The Caribbean: The Trump Doctrine In Full Bloom](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=173476207&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNDc2MjA3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTc3OTM3MDgsImV4cCI6MTc2MDM4NTcwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nGvmjEXdMr6VZAIEELn46bt9cPboaT5nKaxwHC9WesI)
### Trump's International Cover Up Off the Coast of Venezuela
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---
| Sep 13
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=173476207&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNDc2MjA3LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc1Nzc5MzcwOCwiZXhwIjoxNzYwMzg1NzA4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0._G_IdK2wDYXDkcVfmdUXlvaLHELyCEIshHdCFYL30xY&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=173476207&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTczNDc2MjA3LCJpYXQiOjE3NTc3OTM3MDgsImV4cCI6MTc2MDM4NTcwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.nGvmjEXdMr6VZAIEELn46bt9cPboaT5nKaxwHC9WesI&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

### Take Advantage of [our 15% off Sale on a Paid Subscription to Blue Amp While it Lasts!](https://substack.com/redirect/f484f1a3-0651-43f5-acec-1a29f9c384e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[I want 15% off!](https://substack.com/redirect/d9c88b59-695b-4615-9820-38e6f35897b0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dcc8a7a8-8ad8-4a13-b605-b6df0f28e175?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Somewhere between the tacky furnishings and endless gold decor of the White House Oval Office, what used to be called decency has now been trampled yet again, this time by something even uglier: Donald J. Trump's belief that sovereignty, restraint, and human life are optional luxuries.
Trump recently committed an act that ought to scandalize the very foundations of our nation. He ordered the murder of eleven souls in a boat off the coast of Venezuela.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/abfc2c68-d83e-49b6-ad21-cbab5e13a946?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Eleven human beings -- perhaps criminals, perhaps not -- were blown to pieces by American aircraft after their vessel turned around and attempted to retreat.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9041cf54-2cf8-406c-a413-d45f5e90fa06?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
As first reported by the _New York Times_ and now by other news organizations, yes, the people in the boat essentially ran.
They were leaving.
And yet the United States, under the ghoulish hand of Donald J. Trump's second lunatic presidency, slaughtered them anyway.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9e6f4694-d9be-4711-909d-647f5d9d7b82?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
According to multiple reports, instead of just one airstrike as Trump showed in his video posted on social media, the U.S. military struck the boat repeatedly to make sure everybody was incinerated.
The Trump team claims the victims were smuggling drugs. But when asked to show the evidence or intel, the administration keeps refusing and hiding behind "classified sources and methods." That never stopped Defense Secretary Hegseth from placing classified information from other military airstrikes on an unsecure signal chat.
But I digress.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e79bb8a7-7f03-414a-9bd4-a277e681a72c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Given the grainy images of the Venezuelan boat itself, the Trump claim about drug smuggling doesn't even make sense. The boat was a relatively small open-air vessel, powered by an outboard motor, filled with eleven people. Usually, drug smugglers want as much space as possible on boats, trucks, and airplanes for their product. 11 people take up a lot of space.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1ddb26a4-1a3e-4f35-8c47-7ff9fb95671e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Relatedly, there are now claims from Venezuela that the human beings on board were not smugglers but rather refugees trying to escape that nation's political violence for the safer confines of Trinidad.
Regardless of who was on the boat or why, the fact is that even in the murkiest waters of international conflict, there is no doctrine that allows shooting fleeing people in the back merely because one imagines they might have been up to no good. Killing those who are retreating? There is no purer form of state sanctioned tyranny.
This wasn't an accident. The U.S. military knew the boat had already turned back. The pilots knew it. The analysts saw it. The radar confirmed it. Yet the order came: fire. Eleven dead. No warning, no trial, no chance for truce. Just smoldering corpses (or pieces) in saltwater and a message to the rest of the world - the United States is now judge, jury, and executioner and doesn't give a damn whether you are guilty or not.
This is pure thuggery. It's what happens when the presidency is turned over to a fascist, wanna-be-dictator who views the Constitution as a scrap of soiled toilet paper and international law as an optional suggestion from those pesky, dirty neighbors.
Trump and his stooges, including Vice President Vance and Defense Secretary Hegseth keep bleating about "national defense" and" narco-terrorism," and every other slogan their impotent speechwriters can pluck from the entrails of a Fox News chyron.
But make no mistake.
This was not a national defense operation.
This was not a war.
This was a political snuff film, a massacre designed to look tough on drugs and play well with the "bomb them all" MAGA crowd who see every brown person in a boat as a threat to our republic.
What kind of country drops bombs on people who are fleeing? What kind of government -- civilized, democratic, even minimally sane -- declares itself at war with a fishing boat and then opens fire after the boat turns tail? What's next? Airstrikes on jaywalkers? Drone executions for overdue library books?
And where are the patriots who once claimed to love liberty? The constitutionalists, the flag-humpers, the self-styled defenders of Western values? They are hiding, as always, behind the empty slogan "America First," which now means America Unhinged. America Unrestrained. America as the world's most powerful and least accountable death cult.
If Trump wants to attack motorboats 2,700 miles from the continental United States and treat such vessels as enemy combatants and threats to the homeland, Old Man Orange should seek a declaration of war from Congress.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e5c2f675-7d65-442c-bff6-8150e508dc8e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Take the argument about fentanyl poisoning tens of thousands of Americans and get U-S lawmakers somehow to approve military strikes. Then, give a warning to innocent fishermen off the coast of Miami. Because with all the narcotics smuggling boats nearby, those waters are going to get rough.
Of course, as of this writing, there has been no Trump effort to get Congressional approval for bombing motorboats and yachts. There has been no lobbying, hearings, or testimony. All we've gotten, slurred out on TV and conservative cable news channel appearances, are Trump cliches about "lots of drugs."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5f2522e1-c3d7-4072-95ef-77115bd7259f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Perhaps Trump is projecting again. As for the attack on that Venezuelan boat, let's not mince words. This was murder.
Not war.
Not justice.
Not even policy.
It was murder committed in our name and with our taxpayer dollars. It was a cold blooded mass killing by a Trump administration that mistakes cruelty for strength and annihilation for leadership.
And if we accept it -- if we permit this butchery to be swept away by the next news cycle or drowned in the next Trump policy diversion, then we, too, are accessories to the savagery. American citizens who do not rise in outrage are not citizens at all - just a herd, fattened for the next slaughter.
So here's what must be done: First, there should be an immediate independent investigation, one that does not take at face value the administration's self-justification.
Second, there must be legal proceedings against those who, without regard for law or life, ordered or carried out the attack.
Third, there must be an insistence from all of us, with every steely fiber of this nation, that no cause, however righteous we may imagine it, permits us to abandon our humanity.
To put it simply, we must do something. Because if these eleven deaths at sea aren't enough to stir the soul of our nation, then God help us when the body count comes closer to home.

The boat was a relatively small open-air vessel, powered by an outboard motor, filled with eleven people. Usually, drug smugglers want as much space as possible on boats, trucks, and airplanes for their product. 11 people take up a lot of space. | | ---|---|--- Relatedly, there are now claims from Venezuela that the human beings on board were not smugglers but rather refugees trying to escape that nation's political violence for the safer confines of Trinidad. Regardless of who was on the boat or why, the fact is that even in the murkiest waters of international conflict, there is no doctrine that allows shooting fleeing people in the back merely because one imagines they might have been up to no good. Killing those who are retreating? There is no purer form of state sanctioned tyranny. This wasn't an accident. The U.S. military knew the boat had already turned back. The pilots knew it. The analysts saw it. The radar confirmed it. Yet the order came: fire. Eleven dead. No warning, no trial, no chance for truce. Just smoldering corpses (or pieces) in saltwater and a message to the rest of the world - the United States is now judge, jury, and executioner and doesn't give a damn whether you are guilty or not. This is pure thuggery. It's what happens when the presidency is turned over to a fascist, wanna-be-dictator who views the Constitution as a scrap of soiled toilet paper and international law as an optional suggestion from those pesky, dirty neighbors. Trump and his stooges, including Vice President Vance and Defense Secretary Hegseth keep bleating about "national defense" and" narco-terrorism," and every other slogan their impotent speechwriters can pluck from the entrails of a Fox News chyron. But make no mistake. This was not a national defense operation. This was not a war. This was a political snuff film, a massacre designed to look tough on drugs and play well with the "bomb them all" MAGA crowd who see every brown person in a boat as a threat to our republic. What kind of country drops bombs on people who are fleeing? What kind of government -- civilized, democratic, even minimally sane -- declares itself at war with a fishing boat and then opens fire after the boat turns tail? What's next? Airstrikes on jaywalkers? Drone executions for overdue library books? And where are the patriots who once claimed to love liberty? The constitutionalists, the flag-humpers, the self-styled defenders of Western values? They are hiding, as always, behind the empty slogan "America First," which now means America Unhinged. America Unrestrained. America as the world's most powerful and least accountable death cult. If Trump wants to attack motorboats 2,700 miles from the continental United States and treat such vessels as enemy combatants and threats to the homeland, Old Man Orange should seek a declaration of war from Congress. | | ---|---|--- Take the argument about fentanyl poisoning tens of thousands of Americans and get U-S lawmakers somehow to approve military strikes. Then, give a warning to innocent fishermen off the coast of Miami. Because with all the narcotics smuggling boats nearby, those waters are going to get rough. Of course, as of this writing, there has been no Trump effort to get Congressional approval for bombing motorboats and yachts. There has been no lobbying, hearings, or testimony. All we've gotten, slurred out on TV and conservative cable news channel appearances, are Trump cliches about "lots of drugs." | | ---|---|--- Perhaps Trump is projecting again. As for the attack on that Venezuelan boat, let's not mince words. This was murder. Not war. Not justice. Not even policy. It was murder committed in our name and with our taxpayer dollars. It was a cold blooded mass killing by a Trump administration that mistakes cruelty for strength and annihilation for leadership. And if we accept it -- if we permit this butchery to be swept away by the next news cycle or drowned in the next Trump policy diversion, then we, too, are accessories to the savagery. American citizens who do not rise in outrage are not citizens at all - just a herd, fattened for the next slaughter. So here's what must be done: First, there should be an immediate independent investigation, one that does not take at face value the administration's self-justification. Second, there must be legal proceedings against those who, without regard for law or life, ordered or carried out the attack. Third, there must be an insistence from all of us, with every steely fiber of this nation, that no cause, however righteous we may imagine it, permits us to abandon our humanity. To put it simply, we must do something. Because if these eleven deaths at sea aren't enough to stir the soul of our nation, then God help us when the body count comes closer to home. Take Advantage of You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

subject: Donald Trump is making life harder for working families

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115167764/569408676/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC30_20250913_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWE5ZDc5NS1kYzkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=86MaVYpqg5QlAS-YvaHDYqXQl4cnLwyLl7SKW0N1wM0=)

**A new poll shows Jocelyn well ahead of John James and Mike Duggan in Saginaw, MI — a key bellwether county in the state.**
_Clearly, no candidate is better positioned to win the race for Michigan Governor than Jocelyn._

subject: My recovery after the car crash
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1e6ea431c27d42cdbb574e153e127565&_e=Hn4hL-1m80Oxrme_mFR61r-mwFT5nPFBYvnXtynZOyKVWLUcVSXQJL-Uj21YGTXru0D_TuTXg0sKldtDJkT1BgcYCYCFKgLOFCY1aSpuSomuhJVlKoeQ82ymOY4648KSg9HNUPdJpElbfJLB_FJOTO9n9tQpT3joM_X0QLL2ynTgprArsx2b0yGAfNOk4b56Zmk8qiaO-3X0JiTJj0YrTLdqI9C7vbhiqMxM7W43q5mjn3d7_Wm73xcvts4aV29QOYfXzk41pGQBac0JPwNt4XgZi0zoAgLbTbdHzemjBpvlmfCH4B8NMiyCvOamo8kIWjCMMGjld6KbxKgMknEt9mLMQtL9gdhXBYPrhqaIZGzEY9LHAFHUXF7UXATutbEwOaCc2nZMhw71ImbmmZjucE8ASge9ry3f5P2GbNKA770WA0Pte3wNlSMXWf7tRAwyDliMw4V7R-bDVnJ9d7oTADTuyXfEpzyy1jAdtW-sEhTd0iWcP9Rj36df88HOV5NBq8AuQTGj32fitk_ujUXRPOS10Gdbmt257DJqiWKL2CJHuxUWw9aMEqZIZafx8ctY9ZVyfiCA5CPTk_0mR63G5USK_VOfn3cQO6Et5djSu4S8Qo8Ru_wyjFa-PEHLbnaZTeQ650pxwvABRHNkZpiP3A%3D%3D)
---
Friend,
---
So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery.
---
I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed.
---
Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together.**
---
But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive **__ANYTHING!__**
---
[](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1e6ea431c27d42cdbb574e153e127565&_e=Hn4hL-1m80Oxrme_mFR61r-mwFT5nPFBYvnXtynZOyKVWLUcVSXQJL-Uj21YGTXru0D_TuTXg0sKldtDJkT1BgcYCYCFKgLOFCY1aSpuSomuhJVlKoeQ82ymOY4648KSg9HNUPdJpElbfJLB_FJOTO9n9tQpT3joM_X0QLL2ynTgprArsx2b0yGAfNOk4b56Zmk8qiaO-3X0JiTJj0YrTLklX8Bq7eo3pyEa7SxEeQgICX5yFUuktEUnaDakaOc9Ke60TQtie4q3_g5uM8XjKNPVdrJsqfgLYRWDyS-MUDVe9xev-WlMejKYf4td387WHwjJhogNEBrBQGGu5t_rqgGxCMrINe2G5A8qvkIwe-_AmxEazH26_ksFtmU7b0BvtJPu8Yexe5HVl2jPAEzi8nKfJW5i1jJoB7sTEWxqDSksDBPI8XAtYyPZDsh_1F6YKUhePoyrv7-66kEW471ZAzuE1UlPnULwPiDNLwwQClNb1sYVfFbq9PhYh0TbXG495QvqOJSJwmGH-S8KzvI5pxgd2gLeFoA9mVNMZQNo-ZEmC9HN3nGNT0RLm5E6nQ6GhqSTFx6Je1Jj0IfRDDyBu7-0EUt0NKzQIeEv4OPYuPWxr4VKu-rVrNiqJitAtvsXVl-qqcXbMeTgkV43Nyo6DQ%3D%3D)
__
---
One thing especially helped take the pain away...
---
...**President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – _the highest civilian honor in America._**
---
**President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to _federal_ cases, which means he _legally_ _cannot_ save me from the bogus _state-level_ charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS.**
---
**Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my _ONLY_ chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team.**
---
But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of **BANKRUPTCY**.
---
**And now, this car crash has set me back even more...**
---
And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like _YOU_.
---
That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my _FREEDOM_ and my _JUSTICE_.
---
__Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END!__
---
[**So, if you can, please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to ensure I have the resources needed to retain a top-notch defense team in what is now the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1e6ea431c27d42cdbb574e153e127565&_e=Hn4hL-1m80Oxrme_mFR61r-mwFT5nPFBYvnXtynZOyKVWLUcVSXQJL-Uj21YGTXru0D_TuTXg0sKldtDJkT1BgcYCYCFKgLOFCY1aSpuSomuhJVlKoeQ82ymOY4648KSg9HNUPdJpElbfJLB_FJOTO9n9tQpT3joM_X0QLL2ynTgprArsx2b0yGAfNOk4b56Zmk8qiaO-3X0JiTJj0YrTBvffHR4RwiRZ6S-lptWKkMW3dHseKH0E1oMvbzBKxVvI4wNKe24H2ts6IHbu4YyDg_b7xxkpv4Hax5p48G5Dx0MPueZk0I4PqGQE9wWnITgXqXlXwqc5UP-6X3ex0f8nKY1iQskA8mRYyxaFryI1-9ikjUG27l4JHwap5E9gTjlXozhvPWlsPrZMfQA3oOREssKEHnVEDXT06v3cIsp6z5iQYmFdUodUlppRJhc4psxatP5t9BNOXxiYC2BQO6zUksPgk796LL9t52f8SdSR7IvmBS-HBGuoYWRIA9zWUuhGV23doRDAxlEsY_GXAKpAUMOhS6PWZAbhxFKfDf2o09NZ219WqAtPyytep0nXZmKpx0HMFo62SkdWS8WrulXYBpR0VasB7jTlL_q6JDjn5DsVbA6VftC3SNkoo8WEqnfCUFmx9ZqjRlVUAwo_0MtBw%3D%3D)

clean_body: Because you’ve been a loyal supporter, I wanted you to hear this directly from me. | Friend, So many kind souls like you have asked how I’m doing, so I wanted to personally update you on my recovery. I was hospitalized after a devastating car crash. We were struck by a vehicle going what felt like 70-80 miles per hour. Had I not been wearing a seatbelt, I would’ve been killed. Right now, a back brace is holding my fractured spine together. But if I could survive being arrested in the most violent jail in America, I know I can survive ANYTHING! One thing especially helped take the pain away... ...President Trump has announced that he will award me with the Presidential Medal of Freedom – the highest civilian honor in America. President Trump knows I’m in a dire situation right now. His pardon powers only apply to federal cases, which means he legally cannot save me from the bogus state-level charges brought against me by a radical Democrat Attorney General who is trying to imprison me for 20 YEARS. Left with no pardon, no safety net, and no lifeline, my ONLY chance at walking free is to secure a top-notch defense team. But the reality is, the Left had already forced me to the point of BANKRUPTCY. And now, this car crash has set me back even more...** And so, my last remaining hope of assembling the quality of defense required to BEAT the Left’s sham charges and WIN the trial of my life is patriots like YOU. That’s why I’m making a final plea to humbly ask that you contribute whatever amount you can to my Legal Defense Trust as I continue fighting for my FREEDOM and my JUSTICE. Because when President Trump places the Medal of Freedom around my neck, I want history to always remember that I FOUGHT for my freedom and justice until the VERY END! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust

name: Mazie Hirono
subject: Congress’s first week back in session
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, Congress has only been in session for a little over a week, and Donald Trump is already back to abusing his power. If you feel like you’re getting deja vu reading this, it’s because you are: **Donald Trump has shown a blatant disregard for Congress and the law throughout his _entire_ presidency.** In July, he signed a “rescissions package” that cut $9 billion in bipartisan funding that had already been approved by Congress for local public radio and TV and life-saving foreign aid. And now, his administration is asking the Supreme Court to allow him to withhold billions of dollars that Congress has already approved. This comes on top of his threats to hold federal funding hostage and shut down the government at the end of the month if he doesn’t get his way during government funding negotiations. **This is par for the course for the Trump regime, Peter — rip away critical funding that people rely on so they can give more tax breaks to billionaires.** We have to put an end to this, which is why I’m fighting to hold this administration accountable and working to support Senate Democratic candidates across the country so we can secure a majority that puts working families first. **[The current Republican majority refuses to stand up to Donald Trump, so it’s time to elect a Democratic majority that will. Hi, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
In redistricting, the 42nd is being redrawn to take on more Republican voters than any other district in California and includes portions of Orange County that Katie Porter represented in Congress.
The newly incorporated areas of our redrawn district were represented by a true fighter. Katie Porter refused to let corporate interests drown out the voices of working Californians and always put people first.
I may not have the whiteboard magic like Katie, but I’m just as committed to making sure you have more power in our government than the morally bankrupt billionaires cozying up to Trump.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115167934/569409252/789508428?refcode=250913_RG_districtfrontlines-porter-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTMzNTQyMi1lMDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i92xOT_edj8lHCui3QNYJn-yBDtTJP3f62EvcLBJyvI=)
**Right now, I’m the leading Democrat on the House Oversight Committee — and as you’ve probably seen, we’re fighting like hell to hold Trump accountable for his Epstein cover-up.**
**But here’s the truth: The Trump Administration is corrupt as hell. Whether it’s Stephen Miller’s attacks on immigrants, Trump’s illegal use of our military in American cities, or his refusal to release the Epstein Files, we’ve seen what they are capable of. That means my role on the House Oversight Committee is more important than ever.**
**[That’s why I need you with me in this fight — starting now. Will you chip in what you can to help me defend my new district to fight back against Trump and his corrupt allies in Washington, hold them accountable for violating the rule of law, and end their reign of terror once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115167935/569409253/789508428?refcode=250913_RG_districtfrontlines-porter-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTMzNTQyMi1lMDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i92xOT_edj8lHCui3QNYJn-yBDtTJP3f62EvcLBJyvI=)**
[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115167936/569409254/-309737922?refcode=250913_RG_districtfrontlines-porter-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTMzNTQyMi1lMDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i92xOT_edj8lHCui3QNYJn-yBDtTJP3f62EvcLBJyvI=)
Trump already deployed the National Guard to Los Angeles in a retaliatory move against our governor.
This is a man who weaponizes our military against American citizens, simply because he can. In this moment, we cannot afford to back down — we have to keep our opposition strong, and our fight steadfast.
I’m grateful to have a district full of folks like you who refuse to sit back when our democracy is on the line.
Thanks for standing with me.
Robert Garcia

name: Wiley Nickel
subject: The fight keeps going
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
When I worked for President Obama, I learned something I’ll never forget |
#
---
Hi Peter, When I worked for President Obama, I learned something I’ll never forget: real leaders don’t wait for change. **They fight for it.** I’ve carried that lesson from the White House to the State Senate, to Congress, and right here in Wake County as a defense attorney. In every role, I’ve stood up for people who needed someone in their corner — whether it was defending voting rights, taking on special interests, or helping a client who’d been treated unfairly by a system that’s supposed to deliver justice for everyone. Some of my proudest moments have been right here at home, helping folks from marginalized and underserved communities navigate a criminal justice system that can be complicated, intimidating, and sometimes deeply unfair. I’ve seen how we can keep people safe while also making sure our justice system treats everyone fairly and compassionately. I’m not done fighting for those changes. In fact, I feel like we’re just getting started. In the months ahead, I’ll be talking more about how we can make real change right here in Wake County, and how I can help in that effort. We’ve done big things together before. And with your help, we’ll do even more in the future. — Wiley P.S. I hope you’ll be part of the movement we’re building. Make sure you’re signed up for our email updates, and follow me on body:
We’re aiming for $3,000 in grassroots contributions by Monday night |
#
---
_Here’s what we’re doing, Peter:_ **We’ve set a $3,000 mid-month goal** to make sure Tina’s campaign stays strong heading into the end-of-quarter deadline later this month. _Here’s why it matters:_ Tina is working every day to protect Oregon’s values — from expanding access to affordable housing to safeguarding reproductive health care to ensuring every eligible Oregonian can cast their ballot. name: (1) President Trump
subject: I’ve always believed in the power of prayer.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump National Committee JFC, Inc
body:
Do you believe in prayer in public schools? Under the Trump administration, we are defending our rights and restoring our identity as One Nation Under God!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.-g/scv4167cef9)
---
## **ONE NATION UNDER GOD!**

### **TRUMP MAGA POLL**

Friend, Under the Trump administration, we are defending our rights and restoring our identity as ONE NATION UNDER GOD!
We will always protect the Judeo-Christian principles of our founding.
For most of our country’s history, **the Bible was found in every classroom across the nation.** ****
Yet in many schools today, students are indoctrinated with anti-religious propaganda, and some are even punished for their religious beliefs.
I am pleased to announce that the Department of Education is issuing new guidance protecting the RIGHT TO PRAYER in our public schools.
I also created the first ever Department of Justice task force to eradicate anti-Christian bias.

|
---
|
# **TRUMP MAGA POLL**

**_Question #1:_** Do you approve of Trump defending PRAYER in public schools?
**_Question #2:_** Do you support an official task force to eradicate anti-Christian bias?

body:
As you read this, literally thousands of people have donated to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee to pass the Election Rigging Response Act in California.

Question for you. And Gavin Newsom is asking you to please give it some real thought:
If you knew -- and we mean really knew -- making a $3 contribution meant the impact of Donald Trump and Texas Republicans' redistricting would be nullified, wouldn't that donation be worth those seats?
What if you knew that same $3 meant Democrats would be able to take back the House and serve as a check on Trump during his final two years ... wouldn't it be $3 well spent?
We'll be upfront: it probably doesn't seem like $3 can do all that.
But as you read this, people from all over the country are contributing to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee before we have to make some difficult budget decisions on Monday.
Now they're hoping you'll do the same. Because if the voters of California pass this act, we'll give Democrats a fair chance to take back the House.

name: Marina Jenkins, All On The Line
subject: Anti-democracy forces are using this case to unravel the Voting Rights Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Here’s how we fight back
|
---

Peter —
I cannot overstate how much is at stake in _Louisiana v. Callais_ — the case involving Louisiana’s congressional map in which the Supreme Court will decide whether or not the Voting Rights Act (VRA) is constitutional.
Here’s some background:
In 2022, Louisiana passed a congressional map into law, which allowed Black voters to elect a candidate of their choice in just one of six congressional districts, although Black voters made up a third of the state’s population.
Our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation, initiated a legal challenge to this gerrymandered congressional map for diluting the voting power of Black Louisiana voters in violation of Section 2 of the VRA. The litigation was successful, and the court required Louisiana to enact a new map that would provide equal access to the political process by including two districts where Black voters could elect candidates of their choice, instead of just one.
**Immediately after the enactment of a new map drawn to comply with this court order, the _Callais_ case was filed, and a different federal trial court wrongfully struck down Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map.**
On October 15, the fair maps movement will once again argue that Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act is a valid, necessary federal law that not only complies with the U.S. Constitution — it helps fulfill its promise. The Supreme Court must uphold its own precedent in _Allen v. Milligan_ — which upheld Section 2 just three years ago — and protect Louisiana’s VRA-compliant map.
As John Bisognano, President of All On the Line, put it, **“ If the Court decides to now undo that precedent, it would be a head-spinning reversal of itself. It would also be abundantly clear to the American people — who are increasingly outraged by the targeted discriminatory voting practices underway in Texas and other states — that the Supreme Court’s majority is completely untethered to the reality that everyday Americans live day to day.”**
**No matter what the Court rules, many maps are in the balance, and we need to be ready to respond. All On The Line continues to mobilize supporters to fight for a truly representative democracy so every eligible voter can make their voices heard.[Please make a donation to support this critical work in Louisiana and wherever our rights come under attack.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115168446/569411158/1200718241?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_LASCOTUSUpdate_email_20250913-AOTL-Tier1-LASCOTUSUpdate-MJ_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250913-AOTL-Tier1-LASCOTUSUpdate-MJ_&utm_campaign=LASCOTUSUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ2ZjY1Njk5LWU0OTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-ljoYOkmiO2bO9-eYh4hotl8cdHzve5jF1eHN6Prr5k=)**
Thanks so much,
Marina

Executive Director
All On The Line

subject: I'm respectfully asking: Will you contribute $5 to my campaign for Governor?

body:
This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94751?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu)
Hi Peter, it's Abigail Spanberger, Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia. I'm respectfully asking: **[Will you split a $5 contribution right now between my campaign and State Democrats Committee, before our mid-month deadline?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94751?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=4&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94751?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu)
---
As the only Democrat who can flip a Governor's seat blue this year, I want to set an example for the nation.
That's why we've knocked on over 250,000 doors so far. It's why we've launched plans to make life more affordable and strengthen our schools. And it's why we've committed to building the largest grassroots campaign in our Commonwealth's history.
_This won't be an easy race, but I'm used to overcoming the odds._
Back in 2018, I ran for Congress in a district that Republicans had controlled for 50 years. People told me that I shouldn't run, that I couldn't win.
_Well, together, we pulled off the impossible._
**Now, I'm running for Governor of Virginia in the biggest election yet of Trump's second term.** National Republicans are throwing millions of dollars at us, but I know this team will have my back with so much on the line.
It may sound small, but your $5 contribution would help us make sure we can continue sharing our agenda with voters.
**[So, what do you say, Peter? Will you contribute $5 (or even more!) right now to my campaign and State Democrats Committee so we raise the resources we need by our mid-month deadline? Every dollar adds up and allows us to fund ads, organizers, yard signs, and other critical investments.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94751?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=11&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=12&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=13&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=14&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=15&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94752?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=16&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94751?refcode=em20250913-9414&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=17&akid=9414%2E614464%2EIORocu)

name: Troy Downing
subject: I risked it all to serve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
After 9/11, I risked it all to serve in the USAF/ANG. Now, I’m fighting for you in Congress to preserve our freedoms.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-x7Y58VQQBeWqtgFMg0TQ)I was 34 when the Twin Towers fell.
They said I was too old to be commissioned in the Air Force, but that didn’t stop me.
I walked into a recruiter’s office and said, **_“Hey, I have a commercial pilot’s license and used to teach math at NYU. What can you do with me?”_**
A few weeks later, I was sworn in, had my flight physical, and headed to boot camp. I trained on a Pave Hawk helicopter and flew rescue missions during two tours in Afghanistan.[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)What I saw there changed me. I realized American freedom isn’t guaranteed.
An oath isn’t just a promise for a moment. _**It’s a commitment for life.** _
I solemnly swore to support and defend the Constitution of the United States against all enemies, foreign and domestic as an enlisted member of the Air Force. Today, I pledge to uphold that same sacred duty as a Representative in the U.S. Congress.
**With the Swamp on their side and over $40 million in their pockets, Democrats are ready to use it to beat conservatives in next year's midterm elections.**
Peter, we can’t afford to fall behind. [Every dollar you contribute will help a combat veteran like me safeguard our America First values and defend this MAGA seat in Congress.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[RUSH HELP
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)From the skies over Afghanistan to the halls of Congress, my mission has always been clear: defend the freedoms that define us.

Thanks for having my back.
God bless you,
Troy Downing | |
---
Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
Troy Downing is a former member of the U.S. Air Force/Air National Guard. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense.
Troy Downing For Congress
P.O. Box 20333
Billings, MT 59104
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-vcEGYX9vA)
To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress, [click here](https://trk.emails.troydowning.__oeV1k75RPjMfnA)
---
---

body:
MAGA developers are pushing to build a massive new ICE detention center in Nevada. | | | Friend, We have an urgent fight ahead of us — and we need your voice. **A coalition of MAGA developers is pushing to build a massive new ICE detention center in Nevada known as the _“_** _**Coyote Compound.**_**_”_** From “traditional” ICE jails in Louisiana to new concentration camps in Florida, human rights abuses appear to be taking place daily, laving inmates with no or extremely limited access to lawyers or constitutionally required due process. **_It’s incarceration intended to be more about cruelty than justice._** The only good news is that there’s still time to stop it from happening. A true swing state, the state’s Republican Governor cares about being reelected and Nevada voters already oppose his decision to allow the state’s national guard to assist ICE with “administrative tasks.” **[Sign the petition: Tell Gov. Lombardo to REJECT Coyote Compound!](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_-6ezreVUDKM4uYMpG61B3-hEPvyOqL5Jj9dNBxcgDR6CJGI1MWQxNKfffYgCumBuSg00oEnNmbqpix-F8QhARAIrK_Y5xb7rYJFMJf8Q_PTPowTzSqTHpjbmvHULaNnC5Jm2qkaufIcKOoOX49pHCmW8xifQk1vf1JArVn5AEpfHVf8K6XBsu1psOpuTMrWVl90br_EMZwQbj-xxQHeHY_5WB1p-KyoWwCgDb77pWv5hmyN2lrQ5lRcfJqiRq0d1Sw8MhCuAc26wen5YBWMv7un6FySYtKjZ9S7GdoJdyV76nIN-t6Ha4GGqnsnoOyd7Xb4CNwn4fukP9pig-E26Da5RhYMGKPzQqN3N-WwxTiApJBSHRGIKJK22IQvZxNQUKnHfkZYDBhIWXd5_ewfD5253puPucV1o-RSCJU5mJ9K4VndrxgkAOJz0xNmfU7fpSu8YRVpiG2hAzTHQOxq21Dav8dBnVL_LEcUqrjX9LRg/4jv/InN97aKaSyCWlbf5szwTNg/h0/h001.5L5jZzhgM-kSMFCLAO8VkWhe5jPWkkJefexYx6Ola64)** This means public pressure could have a huge impact on the future of Nevada’s cooperation and coordination with ICE. **_That’s why it’s more critical than ever for us to organize and speak out now. Now’s the moment to make our voices heard._** **__[Send a Clear Message: We Reject this Horrific, Extremist Detention Camp.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm3_-6ezreVUDKM4uYMpG61B3-hEPvyOqL5Jj9dNBxcgDR6CJGI1MWQxNKfffYgCumBuSg00oEnNmbqpix-F8QhARAIrK_Y5xb7rYJFMJf8Q_PTPowTzSqTHpjbmvHULaNnC5Jm2qkaufIcKOoOX49pHCmW8xifQk1vf1JArVn5AEpfHVf8K6XBsu1psOpuTMrWVl90br_EMZwQbj-xxQHeHY_5WB1p-KyoWwCgDb77pWvyIwKlzEdLP8GXz1g-ycC-zaeRCiHbQpRZ5dSkZmO44zRXE3KCTaXLNL8AzJXPWdFBQiLsiZjbBYv0iza4xRTIf-yZnJ5LgUrnGdoFGOd3BDx7EssEPVzU7Pbe2c7A0m5kxgxAYSQ1zFj_EVDABHchx2g1fQTZKR3Pv2PQtftvtDfrf1dVg-bri-0SUMrXFexV9CUiEIarTKJTbjRZRz82H0x-InHkbLAfDdcCihb_hMK0cpnjwqFvZdqFZN4Jq5Ug/4jv/InN97aKaSyCWlbf5szwTNg/h1/h001.4i0yq0v7WIb4bwdQUi15kJrdZ7dq6o4ther67BcCVs0)** **Why this petition matters:**
* The facility would devastate fragile ecosystems and wildlife habitats long protected in our region.
* Local communities are already dealing with pollution, traffic, and stress on public services. Coyote Compound would only make these problems worse.
* If we don’t act now, these developers will exploit legal loopholes to bypass safeguards meant to protect citizens and nature.

Add your name to the petition demanding local officials reject the Coyote Compound plan. **_This is a fight for our futu_**** _re — our health, our wildlife, our shared home._** Thank you for standing strong with us. In solidarity,

clean_body: MAGA developers are pushing to build a massive new ICE detention center in Nevada. | | | Friend, We have an urgent fight ahead of us — and we need your voice. A coalition of MAGA developers is pushing to build a massive new ICE detention center in Nevada known as the “ Coyote Compound.” From “traditional” ICE jails in Louisiana to new concentration camps in Florida, human rights abuses appear to be taking place daily, laving inmates with no or extremely limited access to lawyers or constitutionally required due process. It’s incarceration intended to be more about cruelty than justice. The only good news is that there’s still time to stop it from happening. A true swing state, the state’s Republican Governor cares about being reelected and Nevada voters already oppose his decision to allow the state’s national guard to assist ICE with “administrative tasks.” This means public pressure could have a huge impact on the future of Nevada’s cooperation and coordination with ICE. That’s why it’s more critical than ever for us to organize and speak out now. Now’s the moment to make our voices heard. Why this petition matters: The facility would devastate fragile ecosystems and wildlife habitats long protected in our region. Local communities are already dealing with pollution, traffic, and stress on public services. Coyote Compound would only make these problems worse. If we don’t act now, these developers will exploit legal loopholes to bypass safeguards meant to protect citizens and nature. Add your name to the petition demanding local officials reject the Coyote Compound plan. This is a fight for our futu** re — our health, our wildlife, our shared home. Thank you for standing strong with us. In solidarity, The Cedar Key Progress Team | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . name: John Hickenlooper
subject: "Rise and fight again"
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HICKENLOOPER FOR COLORADO
body:
Can I tell you one of my favorite stories from our nation’s founding history? It’s relevant – I promise.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115168919/569412761/1435897075?refcode=email_091325_greene-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjUzNjRjMC1lNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYoB0oGYEMFEUZahcHSsPUJ3kxmFvdCHdu3VJNeJSQQ=&emci=69253936-0b90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=925364c0-e490-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=7280715) Hey folks, it’s John. Can I tell you one of my favorite stories from our nation’s founding history? _It’s relevant – I promise._ It’s the story of American Revolutionary War General Nathanael Greene. It was August of 1780, and the Continental Army, outnumbered ten to one, had endured several defeats and were being worn down in the South by British forces. That is, until General Greene took the reins. Nathanael Greene inspired his command under the mantra “we fight, get beat, rise, and fight again” and revitalized the American Revolution in the South. He was bold and creative, using strategic retreats and inventing guerrilla tactics to exhaust the British, force their surrender at Yorktown, and ultimately, give the colonies’ their independence. **“We fight, get beat, rise, and fight again.”** I think about this quote often as we face the battles of our time. The fight to save millions of peoples’ health care, or the battle to keep public lands in public hands. And the day-to-day struggles working people face when just trying to make ends meet. **Every day, no matter what, we have to rise up and fight again until we win – and I’m committed as Colorado’s Senator to doing just that. But I can’t do this alone.** **[It's going to take all of us working together to protect the progress we’ve made and stop Trump and Washington Republicans from doing even more damage. So please, if you’re with me, can I count on you to chip in a couple bucks before my mid-month deadline and help me continue fighting for you and your family in Washington? →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115168920/569412762/-984874665?refcode=email_091325_greene-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjUzNjRjMC1lNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYoB0oGYEMFEUZahcHSsPUJ3kxmFvdCHdu3VJNeJSQQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115168921/569412763/-984874665?express_lane=true&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&amount=5&refcode=email_091325_greene-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83MjY1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MjUzNjRjMC1lNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LYoB0oGYEMFEUZahcHSsPUJ3kxmFvdCHdu3VJNeJSQQ=)

Hey there — After the passage of Trump's _One Big Cruel Bill_ , you may have heard a lot about how federal cuts will increase health care costs, devastate low-income families and slash access to food assistance programs. **While those concerns remain true, we wanted to take a moment to highlight how Democrats are working hard to counter the harmful effects of Trump and the GOP-led Congress's misplaced policy priorities.** **The _Closing the Meal Gap Act of 2025_** Senator Gillibrand introduced the **_Closing the Meal Gap Act of 2025,_** which will expand and strengthen who qualifies for the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program (SNAP). Gillibrand's anti-hunger legislation is doing what Republicans won't — addressing some of the most pressing issues facing Americans today. This legislation not only raises the benefit amount for low-income families to keep up with inflation, but it also gives individuals with high medical costs and housing expenses access to the program.
**The _Medication Affordability and Patent Integrity Act_** Senator Maggie Hassan introduced the **_Medication Affordability and Patent Integrity Act_** to prevent large pharmaceutical companies from gaming the patent system to keep competitors from getting generic drugs to the market. Ultimately, this will ensure the availability of more affordable drug options to help lower the costs of prescription drugs for consumers.
**The _Federal Inquiry into the Nature and Documentation of Housing Loss Act_** U.S. Representative Angie Craig introduced the **_Federal Inquiry into the Nature and Documentation (FIND) of Housing Loss Act,_** which aims to combat the housing affordability crisis and help prevent hardworking Americans from losing their homes. There's a lot of uncertainty due to the chaos of this administration. However, we wanted to take a moment to remind you that there are still leaders in Congress who are fighting for everyday people and working families across the country. [**_Off the Sidelines is dedicated to electing and amplifying Democrats who will put people over politics, and our lives over their profits. Will you chip in any amount to power our collective work?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115169146/569413595/-204835043?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.12_OTS-60-second-update_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQzMTA2Ni1lZTkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nn6wJ7q9--lyF3Sv0XJwM2q01m2bqVzRWRZVeC99izM=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115169147/569413596/-204835043?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.09.12_OTS-60-second-update_B2_F1_S1_C1_45AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MWQzMTA2Ni1lZTkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nn6wJ7q9--lyF3Sv0XJwM2q01m2bqVzRWRZVeC99izM=)

name: Team Pappas
subject: Scott Brown just backed RFK. Jr’s vaccine conspiracy theories
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
Scott Brown is becoming a public health risk to NH.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2337%2E582294%2ExMyPU2)
This is concerning.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. just had his worst week yet as Health and Human Services Secretary — refusing to admit Americans died from COVID, claiming mRNA vaccines are deadly, firing top CDC officials leading to mass resignations and walk-outs, and saying that guns don’t cause school shootings.
RFK Jr. is deeply unqualified to serve, and he’s jeopardizing the health and well-being of Americans.
**But Scott Brown?**
He fully supports him, bragging in an interview about texting and being best buds with RFK Jr. He proudly said he helped prepare RFK Jr. for his Senate hearings (and we saw how that went) and boasted about a 2023 barbecue event they had together.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_2_brown?refcode=em20250913-2337&amount=5&refcode2=2337_582294_xMyPU2&akid=2337%2E582294%2ExMyPU2)
_Scott Brown and RFK at a BBQ in 2023_
[**We can’t afford a senator who will push RFK Jr.’s dangerous conspiracy theories. Will you rush a $5 donation now to keep New Hampshire’s Senate seat out of Brown’s hands?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_2_brown?refcode=em20250913-2337&amount=5&refcode2=2337_582294_xMyPU2&akid=2337%2E582294%2ExMyPU2)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_2_brown?amount=5&refcode=em20250913-2337&refcode2=2337_582294_xMyPU2&akid=2337%2E582294%2ExMyPU2)**
Scott Brown had the chance to stand up for our kids’ safety and America’s well-being. Instead he chose to make sure everyone knows what good buddies he and RFK Jr are.
We already knew that Scott Brown was a political opportunist, a MAGA yes-man, and a puppet for Wall Street. **_But now we know he’s willing to work with RFK Jr. to put public health at risk._**
Meanwhile, Chris Pappas is:
**
* Fighting to protect Medicaid patients from devastating cuts
* Introducing bills to lower prescription drug costs and expand access to care
* Leading the charge to build a full-service VA hospital in New Hampshire
**

**You already know that the contrast couldn’t be clearer.** But Scott Brown and GOP billionaire donors are working overtime to flood this race with misinformation and flip New Hampshire red. They’re getting ready to pour everything they’ve got into taking this seat because they know Chris stands in the way of their agenda.
We’ve won against Scott Brown in NH before, and we’re going to do it again. But we can’t take anything for granted.
[**Will you chip in $5 now to fuel our campaign? Anything you can give today will help expose Scott Brown to voters as a loyal supporter of RFK Jr. and his actions, which are putting public health at risk.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_2_brown?refcode=em20250913-2337&amount=5&refcode2=2337_582294_xMyPU2&akid=2337%2E582294%2ExMyPU2)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250913_2_brown?amount=5&refcode=em20250913-2337&refcode2=2337_582294_xMyPU2&akid=2337%2E582294%2ExMyPU2)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer&refcode=em20250913-2?t=2&refcode2=2337_582294_xMyPU2&akid=2337%2E582294%2ExMyPU2)**

subject: It's on all of us to flip the House and reject Trump and RFK Jr.’s reckless agenda.

body:
As your Congresswoman, it’s my job to ensure you are protected and that our government is working for you. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115169333/569414335/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTViODFjZi1mNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tGT2orCh4aY0Dt5Z6i8ERtw5ZcQ3DPsd8DzJL15EcU=&emci=33a5d5d9-d090-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=655b81cf-f490-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=15820338)
