As your Congresswoman, it’s my job to ensure you are protected and that our government is working for you, Peter.

_**That’s why I have strongly opposed Robert F. Kennedy Jr. and called for his immediate resignation as Secretary of Health and Human Services.**_

As a doctor, I can tell you confidently that what this administration is doing to our health and safety should have everyone, not just concerned, **but downright angry.**

First, Trump got Republicans to pass his big, ugly bill that ripped healthcare away from millions of Americans. Now, he’s allowing RFK Jr. to run roughshod with conspiracy theories that put our children directly in danger.

Time and time again, RFK Jr. has shown us exactly the kind of person he is. When confronted with the fact that ending childhood vaccine requirements would mean fewer kids get vaccinated— _and more deadly diseases would spread_ —he refused to acknowledge it. But I want to be clear: He knows exactly what the outcome of his reckless agenda is.**He just doesn’t care.**

**[If you’re ready to reject this dangerous agenda, please help me get ahead on our mid-month fundraising goal so we can lay the groundwork to build another winning campaign, protect this seat, and flip the House to put a check on Trump and RFK Jr.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115169334/569414336/-2117271196?refcode=em25_250913_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_250913_mm1_fndd_gq_act___KS_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=655b81cf-f490-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&refcode2=655b81cf-f490-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTViODFjZi1mNDkwLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5tGT2orCh4aY0Dt5Z6i8ERtw5ZcQ3DPsd8DzJL15EcU=)**

Peter, RFK Jr.'s personal anti-vaccine agenda is clouding his judgment about what’s best for our kids, putting families at risk, and propping up the so-called “wellness industry.”

At the same time, Trump is doubling down on his obsession with giving massive tax breaks to billionaires—even if it means undermining the very healthcare that hardworking families depend on... and that children who get vaccine-preventable diseases will need!

This kind of governing is completely backwards, and it’s why I’m fighting every single day to protect our children, defend access to care, and stand up for families who deserve better. _But I really need you with me._

**[We already have a GOP challenger, and we can’t take anything for granted. clean_body: It may not sound like much, but with less than two months until Election Day, we are running out of time to fund investments that really matter. = We'll come right out and say it: Your contribution of $25 today to Abigail Spanberger's campaign for Governor would make all the difference. See, we rely on grassroots supporters giving what they can, when they can to compete. It may not sound like much, but with less than two months until Election Day, we are running out of time to fund investments that really matter. Your $25 will allow us to counter right-wing disinformation. Your $25 will allow us to promote Abigail's plans to make our lives more affordable, strengthen our schools, and protect our freedoms. Your $25 will allow us to reach undecided voters all across the Commonwealth. = = = = = = = We're grateful to have you on our team, The Spanberger Campaign By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. Message & data rates may apply. Text HELP for more info. Text STOP to stop receiving messages. . Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. subject: Here’s how it went down, null:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Help Haley reach her mid-month goal and continue fighting for what's right

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=824%2E49239%2EaNWqgV)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5833?t=2&akid=824%2E49239%2EaNWqgV)
---
Here’s how it went down, null:

**FIRST** , Donald Trump deployed the National Guard into Los Angeles and Washington, D.C., without the consent of local leaders.
**THEN** , Mike Rogers tried to impress Trump and his MAGA friends by calling for the same thing to happen in Detroit.

**NOW** , Haley Stevens is fighting back – introducing legislation to stop this kind of authoritarian abuse of power and pushing for commonsense gun safety laws.
But she can't hold Trump accountable alone. We need you with us in this fight, null.

We’re up against a Trump-endorsed opponent, Republican megadonors, and a far-right super PAC that’s already raising millions to turn Michigan red.
**That’s why this mid-month fundraising goal is so critical. We set a goal to raise $150,000, and we need your immediate help to get there.[Will you rush $5 now to help Haley keep Michigan blue and continue fighting for what's right?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5834?t=3&akid=824%2E49239%2EaNWqgV)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5835?t=4&akid=824%2E49239%2EaNWqgV)
---
Thank you for standing with us.

Team Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5889?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=824%2E49239%2EaNWqgV) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5833?t=6&akid=824%2E49239%2EaNWqgV)

Thank you,
Haley

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: Trump wants to use the military in American cities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40142%2E3422442%2EUrFpEK)
Peter,
Donald Trump is promising to go to war with American cities.
First, he deployed the National Guard and the Marines in Los Angeles to racially profile residents and carry out his immoral mass deportations. Then, he seized control of Washington, D.C.’s police and flooded the streets with federal law enforcement. **Now, he’s promising to use his newly renamed Department of War on the streets of Chicago.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250913_2_ak?refcode=em20250913-40142&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40142_3422442_UrFpEK&akid=40142%2E3422442%2EUrFpEK)
Here in California, we know firsthand what Trump’s use of the military looks like. His goal is simple: enforce his draconian deportation policy by any means necessary—terrorizing immigrant communities and tearing innocent families apart.
The Supreme Court has even ruled that ICE can arrest people in LA without probable cause—simply based on their race, ethnicity, or the language they speak. That opens the door to even more mass roundups and racial profiling by unaccountable presidential police that violate the Constitution and our core freedoms.
**California’s next governor must stand up to Trump’s shameful policies—and Katie Porter will be that governor.** She held Trump accountable in Congress, and she’ll keep fighting for all Californians as governor.
But we need your help to stand up to Trump’s extreme agenda and keep Californians safe from his attacks.

Team Katie Porter

First, he deployed the National Guard and the Marines in Los Angeles to racially profile residents and carry out his immoral mass deportations. Then, he seized control of Washington, D.C.’s police and flooded the streets with federal law enforcement. Now, he’s promising to use his newly renamed Department of War on the streets of Chicago. If I miss my pivotal fundraising goal, the Left could win this seat, and our GOP Majority will lose ground we'll never get back. Your response could be the difference between saving our nation's future or watching Democrats rewrite the rules. I refuse to surrender, but I need YOU! I truly thank you for your continued support and I hope I can count on you for the fights to come! \- Young Kim [R-CA] | | | Paid for by Young Kim for Congress P.O.
